name: Conservatives for a Better Future for Ohio
subject: What kind of person do you want to represent you?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jane Timken for Ohio
body:
|

Friend,

We’re reaching out to you today to ask a simple question: What kind of leader would you like to represent Ohio in the U.S. Senate?

Out of the three choices below, which would you select?

** ☒ A candidate who quit on Ohio before

☒ A Hollywood wannabe who’s spent more time in Silicon Valley than Ohio

✔ A proven leader who’s delivered Ohio for President Trump TWICE and has a resume that backs up her talk**

The answer is simple. We must make sure Jane Timken represents Ohio in the United States Senate.

She’s right on the cusp of taking the lead and needs your support to give her the resources to get over the top. Will you step up? | | [**RUSH $500**](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=000ad8e780e94cdcabbe48134b2314da&_m=fc4fde46fa514e04818f0026f3f4e302&_e=kgpMOU0hylyvuiKA_YxZiNo3VfFNoWJDX7MgeUJSASe2Z1TT6MivXaFDdx5mYNA7LnLryffJfPAnBPJsu3sXdw2oHGT0Pjl0RjZEZsEwx-ZAsIN_ThYanJW_EzV1BdbmBp2xoiTgjeDTl2cbepLZHF6Ll69u_KI40yGKGh-Dfet0ETc8_l361kpn-aol-PmAQOiXs8hYXsrsr_M5HuXERkWb4W0Tjph8anv1I5MrToc3uy3w2SMXA96bCGVNnfVp4-VGYLvO_jhZYp50GgwA8JNr7PwW6NKx_Z8lheWbTKohrxzHVj3sbotYVFAyplwMgwBecU2idU5aCroyTcSHfmw2s8wZDqxFsiQYL5t95eVkYR27Uu3pt-iBysZYFTPsCYqoxUAYqDMqfqdDaPXndr8Nlre3nwf8z-kBu7hac2qGKzw44dYx1-1sq_IZJUOjxp3Z8EmbwlqYcLNk0R_4DNJMkepgwTAoJvbjeJXzK_r2SDYuP40bwRBs4yLCnElNFuHu5DGVelDqCAv8v0dcFi01FN9iGdoEQzSc9-XHYszPYCjlIm5afvxli4ZZVJ9w)

name: Team WisGOP
subject: Teachers Union Tony Evers backs CRT
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican Party of Wisconsin
body:
| [ ](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=BJAgHetUUIqrbBbKj3z09j9OpIZbBzc5g2-7VwfHf34&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=evers_crt_v1&n=1)
---
Friend -- In another Friday veto, last week Tony Evers rejected Republicans’ bill to ban critical race theory from Wisconsin public schools. It’s no wonder that Evers tried to conceal his support for this racist ideology, as teachings of critical race theory have garnered opposition from **[74 percent](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=6P0pzQAcx2lJrCTrJ9Rca_MIGG3ZurjcuxTkZXEhElY4HED6N-4NU5WJOFfRlmnCp7d5H-68p9gWj0YHVeNUVcyZm1r2L8kl9Hj3HfnkN9i0AsgungvQ50s9v6Dhgrx4n1HmBYfPxktKa5LawZTuILv9QT7WZC33dID9aB9lyr4&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=evers_crt_v1&n=2)** of Americans, and Terry McAuliffe’s refusal to acknowledge CRT’s existence contributed to his defeat in Virginia’s gubernatorial election. [](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=zveC7zroragI2qrXZZ9NarppR6GNDcDf3_76KcuzSbn_RcHc9OPjjzuruxQzCHmOE2zSx1eSZcS5pRp6hNLowk-VdNGoJCRzyoSdvFjhlxZ_XhcChEicyM_lQZC6pzk0gbrakMXbQa4Bo00OM_VRMMwCNEvSWmqaIePYHw7BGro&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=evers_crt_v1&n=3) Every step of the way, Tony Evers continues to prove that he only serves his teachers union bosses, not families. From vetoing bipartisan **[literacy](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=csoFBA2Yn8Km2Vms_ZQX_w6cdLjKrX4AGazC4HfcLjExVBxaUiWN9_ydFs2T-QWuKQ7qosq0neX3lm8O9AGoOcWayIo1UPyFbJ95C6oimVToRxTz_7JD-FXXPJpJi-zVFPqu_FoIEPB-Xjd0QFzT4cplV3TcSzo_g2KYwf1gtU8&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=evers_crt_v1&n=4)** and [**curriculum** **transparency**](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=1Md8n-ixLwkzQmZ02kVykADOmRW4PJqGM8SE6Vlf9KrZVYFaUosWAStmfd2kElmmUDI6GXfyF__fikNu-0ISlwhGgW3TErrPqHuOiZbMnHbHBKazcHuymTFauUoOkJLxnBnoq8VBynckww4K8aOOluIFAytMr6AnbbNeBawzd929f9VUuF07b9vYZx3V_QDQ&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=evers_crt_v1&n=5) bills, to trying to **[cap](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=FZeaJrGkqb-JdJpt5MxOBLJsdDKp7AeIiu8R8SikDvgkqlR37Ck-j-63aQil1tCsr2GTAdHLa75RkHT33medA2g6l7DbE0FcJbYFjcSGxjI&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=evers_crt_v1&n=6)** Wisconsin’s special needs scholarship program and **[denying](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=zx73Ln5fPWP4lzuefRMeTyMQgub_-Xk0Ev6t1lUEwek9u3AHVqUuhoX4mmTVZADTKxQOkBjl7zk6UQpC3cmX5I-88cTfQBeGFp44Jdg_zXkRyE-VL_5lsUB2o5bWNf6itplBQlcoQXKYFEyuHsoxSk2jRgRbULvU0pa9JdQmX0w&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=evers_crt_v1&n=7)** additional funding to a school that serves special needs students, Evers has repeatedly refused to empower parents. Meanwhile, according to DPI’s own **[data](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=a9lVzACUQtvW78T1Y1IgXSTAWhYy73r-ZfSkFnsT9TF1vSSExcQgjTKHldhAc5HCaeJTbHuZtK7cFOUrCok_UwROagdA9oU8NnK4Y-kXDf1XtnJYg-Tcap-oMR2-HJUULqDvfk0toel3thgUNQfF9usHT7uGyRFPT-qUx4F1vLTPRzJlHvBU_e02uCtgeSRwVFxQVT1DWzNr-AiErLS5dO7Sld42YRMFLWvH8lA-TDo&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=evers_crt_v1&n=8)** , English language arts proficiency is down by over 16 percent, math proficiency is down by over 20 percent, and just 8 percent of Black students are proficient in math. If Evers will only say “no” to Republican proposals, why has he neglected to propose any real solutions? As we said in our **[statement](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=sxV_uZjhTYiS0NkYk0dD0RNxilU3l3lzNwGsxbUXu0o3rNHVRoeFnhGsKNcdGJtLNvixZ7XpZA6sOLufWsl1tqCdlaUQdFIblbAZ75l8n0E&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=evers_crt_v1&n=9)** today, standing against parents simply to prop up a failed education establishment is a doomed-to-fail strategy for Tony Evers. Republicans will always fight to put students and families -- not teachers unions -- first. \- Team WisGOP | [](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYo--3UqFRYFg8Lsn0cgAtTvheTZIBulG9nsDqgd8dcDVLFWQ_qyO_aqXBD-eiY1kU3C8th8rvzAQA-kx_j-Vb2M&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=evers_crt_v1&n=10 "CONTRIBUTE") [CONTRIBUTE](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYo--3UqFRYFg8Lsn0cgAtTvheTZIBulG9nsDqgd8dcDVLFWQ_qyO_aqXBD-eiY1kU3C8th8rvzAQA-kx_j-Vb2M&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=evers_crt_v1&n=10)
---
[](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6myz1ydj26pS20sqllUBZd4&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=evers_crt_v1&n=11) [](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=YqgukYA3Mrlri-dqG7I8Tr24D9XbJYDft_QizpripYs&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=evers_crt_v1&n=12) [](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=6hyvAYXBs1PELL28GD73y0VJVp2OCKNw8zDVmWeSo7yP6jlGmDIaYIm5b1oT1T4S&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=evers_crt_v1&n=13) [](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=BJAgHetUUIqrbBbKj3z09j9OpIZbBzc5g2-7VwfHf34&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=evers_crt_v1&n=14)

From vetoing bipartisan and bills, to trying to Wisconsin’s special needs scholarship program and additional funding to a school that serves special needs students, Evers has repeatedly refused to empower parents. Meanwhile, according to DPI’s own , English language arts proficiency is down by over 16 percent, math proficiency is down by over 20 percent, and just 8 percent of Black students are proficient in math. If Evers will only say “no” to Republican proposals, why has he neglected to propose any real solutions? As we said in our today, standing against parents simply to prop up a failed education establishment is a doomed-to-fail strategy for Tony Evers. Republicans will always fight to put students and families -- not teachers unions -- first. \- Team WisGOP | "CONTRIBUTE" Paid for by the Republican Party of Wisconsin. Not Authorized by any Candidate or Candidate's Committee. 148 E Johnson St, Madison, WI 53703 | (608) 257 - 4765

Peter — the Supreme Court just voted 5-4 to _allow_ Alabama to dilute the voting power of Black communities. It’s so racist that even Chief Justice John Roberts sided with the liberal justices. Make no mistake: this is happening for two reasons: 1. Mitch McConnell stole the Supreme Court. 2. Kyrsten Sinema and Joe Manchin have sided with the Republicans in protecting the filibuster and refusing to pass voting rights legislation. **We need new federal voting rights legislation more urgently than ever** — because right now it’s clear the conservative-controlled Supreme Court and dozens of GOP-controlled state legislatures can’t be trusted with our democracy. Friends, Welcome back to the “Weekly Wyoming Wrap-Up.” It was another great week on the campaign trail, with almost 800 miles added to Harriet’s travels across Wyoming. It was announced this week that Harriet will be a speaker at CPAC on February 25! Stay tuned for more info and how to watch Harriet! For Wyoming, Team Hageman

---
| | **Around Wyoming **
---
Harriet traveled to Chugwater last week for a two-hour townhall meeting with more than 40 local residents. Topics included Biden’s border crisis and China’s actions in flooding fentanyl into our country, the challenges of providing funding to our local communities, how to battle the fake news narratives, federal government overreach, and the devastating policies coming out of Washington, D.C.
---

The sitting congresswoman’s candidacy attracted 32 resident donations totalling $25,830. But for Hageman, Equality State residents willing to personally donate were relatively more important. The Cheyenne attorney scored $188,850 from 150 in-state individual donors, which pencils out to 43% of her total quarterly contributions. Overall last quarter, Hageman raised $7 from Wyoming residents for every $1 Cheney took in.” **Hageman passes $1 million raised for House race against Cheney ** Harriet Hageman, Republican candidate for the U.S. House of Representatives in Wyoming, today announced that she has raised more than $1 million for her race against Rep. Liz Cheney less than five months after announcing her campaign. The amount includes fundraising totals for 2021 which she will file with the Federal Election Commission later today. In 2021, Hageman raised more than half of her funds from within Wyoming, a figure that Cheney will not come close to matching. Hageman was born and raised on a ranch outside of Fort Laramie, Wyoming, where she learned the value of hard work, integrity, loyalty, family, and community. She has spent much of her legal career fighting against the federal government, protecting water rights, property rights and constitutional rights. Hageman has been endorsed by former President Donald Trump, and beat Cheney in a state central committee straw poll in January by a lopsided 59-to-6 margin. Between September and December 2021, she visited all 23 counties in Wyoming, traveling over 9,000 miles and meeting with voters all over the State. Cheney has abandoned Wyoming’s interests, and spends her time as Democrat Speaker Nancy Pelosi’s hand-picked vice chair of the illegitimate January 6th Committee, which is solely focused on tearing down President Trump and his followers, while also deflecting attention from Biden’s disastrous administration. The Wyoming Republican Party has voted to censure Cheney, and recently voted to not recognize her as a member of the party. “Wyoming deserves to be represented by someone who cares about Wyoming, not someone who is consumed by her own personal war with President Trump,” Hageman said. “I have been to all 23 counties in Wyoming, and I know that the people are desperate for a change. We only get one House seat, and we can’t waste it on someone from Northern Virginia who does all of Nancy Pelosi’s dirty work to distract voters from Joe Biden’s disastrous administration. I am standing for Wyoming First and America First values, which is something that Liz Cheney cannot say and will not do.” Hageman has the support of many who once were with Cheney, including Lynn Friess, a former Cheney donor and widow of longtime GOP supporter Foster Friess. “Harriet Hageman has Wyoming in her DNA, and as our representative, she will always reflect the views and values of Wyomingites,” Friess said. “I’m excited to support Harriet, and I will be grateful to call her the Congresswoman from Wyoming in November.” As part of the more than $1 million she has raised, Hageman will show in her FEC filing that she raised $745,381 in 2021 after she announced her candidacy on September 9. That includes $443,460 in the fourth quarter of 2021. Her report will show $381,163 cash on hand at the end of 2021, although the actual current amount is higher because of funds raised since the end of the year. More than half of the money raised in 2021 came from within Wyoming.
**Harriet Hageman statement on the RNC censure of Liz Cheney** The Republican National Committee has approved a resolution censuring Rep. Liz Cheney and Rep. Adam Kinzinger, the two hand-picked “Republican” members of Nancy Pelosi’s sham, partisan January 6th Committee. Harriet Hageman, Wyoming Republican candidate for the U.S. House of Representatives, today issued the following statement: “This is further proof that Liz Cheney has completely lost her ability to be effective in Congress for the people of Wyoming. She doesn’t have allies in the Republican Party, and the Democrats only see her as a temporary and useful tool to achieve their partisan ends. She spends every minute of every day engaged in her personal vendetta against Donald Trump, and that is not why Wyoming sent her to Congress. “Wyoming deserves a representative who fights the battles that are important to the people of our state. The Biden administration is waging an all-out war on our way of life and the ability of our citizens to prosper and support their families. We need someone who will fight Joe Biden and stand up for property rights, constitutional rights, and personal freedoms, and who will push against the relentless overreach of the federal government. When I am Wyoming’s congresswoman, I will always stand for what’s important to the people of this state.”

clean_body: | | | | Friends, Welcome back to the “Weekly Wyoming Wrap-Up.” It was another great week on the campaign trail, with almost 800 miles added to Harriet’s travels across Wyoming. It was announced this week that Harriet will be a speaker at CPAC on February 25! Stay tuned for more info and how to watch Harriet! For Wyoming, Team Hageman | | Around Wyoming Harriet traveled to Chugwater last week for a two-hour townhall meeting with more than 40 local residents. Topics included Biden’s border crisis and China’s actions in flooding fentanyl into our country, the challenges of providing funding to our local communities, how to battle the fake news narratives, federal government overreach, and the devastating policies coming out of Washington, D.C. Harriet also traveled to Rock Springs for the Conservatives in Crimson Gala. This three-county event was widely attended, and Harriet had a wonderful time connecting with activists from across the state! | In The News Harriet was on two national conservative radio shows this past week discussing the congressional race. Check out the links below to hear the full interviews! “In the fourth quarter of 2021, just 1.3% of Cheney’s $2-million haul came from individual in-state donors. The sitting congresswoman’s candidacy attracted 32 resident donations totalling $25,830. But for Hageman, Equality State residents willing to personally donate were relatively more important. The Cheyenne attorney scored $188,850 from 150 in-state individual donors, which pencils out to 43% of her total quarterly contributions. Overall last quarter, Hageman raised $7 from Wyoming residents for every $1 Cheney took in.” Hageman passes $1 million raised for House race against Cheney Harriet Hageman, Republican candidate for the U.S. House of Representatives in Wyoming, today announced that she has raised more than $1 million for her race against Rep. Liz Cheney less than five months after announcing her campaign. The amount includes fundraising totals for 2021 which she will file with the Federal Election Commission later today. In 2021, Hageman raised more than half of her funds from within Wyoming, a figure that Cheney will not come close to matching. Hageman was born and raised on a ranch outside of Fort Laramie, Wyoming, where she learned the value of hard work, integrity, loyalty, family, and community. She has spent much of her legal career fighting against the federal government, protecting water rights, property rights and constitutional rights. Hageman has been endorsed by former President Donald Trump, and beat Cheney in a state central committee straw poll in January by a lopsided 59-to-6 margin. Between September and December 2021, she visited all 23 counties in Wyoming, traveling over 9,000 miles and meeting with voters all over the State. Cheney has abandoned Wyoming’s interests, and spends her time as Democrat Speaker Nancy Pelosi’s hand-picked vice chair of the illegitimate January 6th Committee, which is solely focused on tearing down President Trump and his followers, while also deflecting attention from Biden’s disastrous administration. The Wyoming Republican Party has voted to censure Cheney, and recently voted to not recognize her as a member of the party. “Wyoming deserves to be represented by someone who cares about Wyoming, not someone who is consumed by her own personal war with President Trump,” Hageman said. “I have been to all 23 counties in Wyoming, and I know that the people are desperate for a change. We only get one House seat, and we can’t waste it on someone from Northern Virginia who does all of Nancy Pelosi’s dirty work to distract voters from Joe Biden’s disastrous administration. I am standing for Wyoming First and America First values, which is something that Liz Cheney cannot say and will not do.” Hageman has the support of many who once were with Cheney, including Lynn Friess, a former Cheney donor and widow of longtime GOP supporter Foster Friess. “Harriet Hageman has Wyoming in her DNA, and as our representative, she will always reflect the views and values of Wyomingites,” Friess said. “I’m excited to support Harriet, and I will be grateful to call her the Congresswoman from Wyoming in November.” As part of the more than $1 million she has raised, Hageman will show in her FEC filing that she raised $745,381 in 2021 after she announced her candidacy on September 9. That includes $443,460 in the fourth quarter of 2021. Her report will show $381,163 cash on hand at the end of 2021, although the actual current amount is higher because of funds raised since the end of the year. More than half of the money raised in 2021 came from within Wyoming. Harriet Hageman statement on the RNC censure of Liz Cheney The Republican National Committee has approved a resolution censuring Rep. Liz Cheney and Rep. Adam Kinzinger, the two hand-picked “Republican” members of Nancy Pelosi’s sham, partisan January 6th Committee. Harriet Hageman, Wyoming Republican candidate for the U.S. House of Representatives, today issued the following statement: “This is further proof that Liz Cheney has completely lost her ability to be effective in Congress for the people of Wyoming. She doesn’t have allies in the Republican Party, and the Democrats only see her as a temporary and useful tool to achieve their partisan ends. She spends every minute of every day engaged in her personal vendetta against Donald Trump, and that is not why Wyoming sent her to Congress. “Wyoming deserves a representative who fights the battles that are important to the people of our state. The Biden administration is waging an all-out war on our way of life and the ability of our citizens to prosper and support their families. We need someone who will fight Joe Biden and stand up for property rights, constitutional rights, and personal freedoms, and who will push against the relentless overreach of the federal government. When I am Wyoming’s congresswoman, I will always stand for what’s important to the people of this state.” | | | |

name: =?utf-8?Q?Ingrid=20Centurion?=
subject: It's official... she's off and RUNNING
body:
News and Upcoming February Events | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/webvortex/its-official-shes-off-and-running?e=bb02dd73bf)
---
| | | [ ](https://centurionforcongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=986079a9d70593df507cfab3a&id=56f57ad271&e=bb02dd73bf)
---
| | | [Please Donate](https://centurionforcongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=986079a9d70593df507cfab3a&id=a8b5443e23&e=bb02dd73bf "Please Donate")
---
|
# You think you're busy? Imagine being "Ingrid-busy!"
With her sights firmly set on meeting as many people in the SC-01 district as possible, Ingrid is driving from Summerville to Moncks Corner to Edisto to Bluffton to...well, you get the picture! She has traveled all over the district to make sure she’s hearing from constituents. From small groups to large ones, she is out there telling the world about her awesome campaign. She wants to be the champion this congressional district deserves. She’s been all over the Lowcountry because she wants to represent We, The People.
---
| | | |
---
**January 22, 2022**
Shawn Jesse is the Winner of the January [Veterans and Bikes Contest](https://centurionforcongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=986079a9d70593df507cfab3a&id=48a797fb9d&e=bb02dd73bf). Tell me about your service and bike for February's contest.
|
---
**February 5, 2022**
Ingrid speaks with members of the [Berkeley County GOP](https://centurionforcongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=986079a9d70593df507cfab3a&id=508215e6fe&e=bb02dd73bf). Your issues are important for her to address in Congress.
| |
---
**January 24, 2022**
Ingrid visits [Sea Island Republican Women](https://centurionforcongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=986079a9d70593df507cfab3a&id=39d0b1ca7d&e=bb02dd73bf). Conservative women are encouraged to run for public office and be politically active.
|
---
**February 6, 2022**
Talking with voters at the [Lowcountry Oyster Festival](https://centurionforcongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=986079a9d70593df507cfab3a&id=bc5bce10e2&e=bb02dd73bf). South Carolina culture is the heart of the district's community vitality.
| |
---
**January 29, 2022**
Great listening to [Bona Lisa](https://centurionforcongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=986079a9d70593df507cfab3a&id=3833273f61&e=bb02dd73bf) & Joe Santana, [www.joesantana.net](https://centurionforcongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=986079a9d70593df507cfab3a&id=a25d6101e4&e=bb02dd73bf) in the Lowcountry. Support our creative professionals.
|
---
**February 6, 2022**
Giving some love to [Trudy Hicks](https://centurionforcongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=986079a9d70593df507cfab3a&id=53690d52e0&e=bb02dd73bf), a proud woman and a family owned small business that is preserving the Lowcountry.
| | | [ ](https://centurionforcongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=986079a9d70593df507cfab3a&id=73403f6bb9&e=bb02dd73bf)
---
| Find out more on Ingrid's [campaign website](https://centurionforcongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=986079a9d70593df507cfab3a&id=edb034db2c&e=bb02dd73bf).
---
| Hi D. P.,

Our mission for February is reaching out to supporters like you and holding events to meet as many new people as possible. You can help me find out what their biggest concerns are, and how replacing Mace will benefit SC District-01. Please attend and/or spread the word about upcoming events and tell your friends I'm running for Congress!

Upcoming events you can help the campaign by supporting or attending:

2/10 -- Walterboro GOP, 7 pm
2/17 -- Charleston St. Andrews Rotary, 12:30 pm
2/17 -- Moncks Corner VFW 10256 Town Hall, 6 pm
2/19 -- Summerville VFW 3433 Town Hall & Fundraiser, 6 pm (don't miss it!)
2/21 -- Edisto GOP, 6 pm
2/23 -- Summerville Parents Group, 7 pm
2/24 \-- Bluffton Sun City GOP, 7 pm
2/24-2/27 -- Orlando CPAC

Go to the campaign **[Events](https://centurionforcongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=986079a9d70593df507cfab3a&id=398fe24f65&e=bb02dd73bf)** page for details.

Are you a phone-aholic? We have the perfect opportunity for you! Contact [mystidatwell@gmail.com](mailto:mystidatwell@gmail.com?subject=I%20want%20to%20volunteer%20for%20the%20Centurion%20Campaign!) to sign up!

Its time for action! Would you like to host your first political party at your home - let's set up a Meet and Greet the Candidate at your home?

I look forward to hearing from you!

God Bless,
---
|
---
| **Ingrid Centurion
Republican Candidate for Congress, SC-01

_America First conservative Republican.
Entrepreneur, Army veteran, wife & mother_

_P.S. -- We need Republicans who speak, act and vote in the House the same way they campaign!_**
---
| [Please Donate](https://centurionforcongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=986079a9d70593df507cfab3a&id=6bbd505a29&e=bb02dd73bf "Please Donate")
---

---
_*YOU ARE ONE OF 1,500 HAND-PICKED DEMOCRATS SELECTED BECAUSE OF YOUR COMMITMENT TO THE DEMOCRATIC PARTY. PLEASE, ANSWER HONESTLY BEFORE MIDNIGHT!*_
Team, as the first woman Vice President, Kamala Harris has broken one of the highest glass ceilings in our country.
We think Harris will go down in history as one of the most important figures in American history.
_But Republicans are smearing her DAILY in hopes of ruining her legacy!_
So now, we’re reaching out to our BEST Democratic supporters — _including YOU!_ — to help us solidify Kamala Harris’ AMAZING legacy as Vice President.
**[COMPLETE YOUR SURVEY ON VICE PRESIDENT HARRIS NOW→](https://act.protectvoting.org/survey/Harris_Legacy_Survey/?source=VPP_20220207_EMSURV_E3_T0_AC_RS&t=9&akid=1233%2E878179%2ECH2kMQ)**
[COMPLETE THE 90-SECOND SURVEY BEFORE MIDNIGHT→](https://act.protectvoting.org/survey/Harris_Legacy_Survey/?source=VPP_20220207_EMSURV_E3_T0_AC_RS&t=10&akid=1233%2E878179%2ECH2kMQ)
---
Team, as you read this, Republicans are scheming to destroy Vice President Kamala Harris.

_They’re spreading disgusting lies to turn Americans AGAINST her. DISGUSTING!_
If we don’t fight back, Americans everywhere will BELIEVE the GOP’s lies – so we urgently need your input to show strong public support for Kamala Harris.
**We only selected 1,500 Democrats, and you were one of them -- because YOUR input is so valuable!**
**[PLEASE, before midnight: Take 90 seconds to complete our Kamala Harris Legacy Survey →](https://act.protectvoting.org/survey/Harris_Legacy_Survey/?source=VPP_20220207_EMSURV_E3_T0_AC_RS&t=11&akid=1233%2E878179%2ECH2kMQ)**
[**COMPLETE THE SURVEY →**](https://act.protectvoting.org/survey/Harris_Legacy_Survey/?source=VPP_20220207_EMSURV_E3_T0_AC_RS&t=12&akid=1233%2E878179%2ECH2kMQ)
---
Thank you,

\--VPP Research Team
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=1233%2E878179%2ECH2kMQ). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=1233%2E878179%2ECH2kMQ).**

body:
Events & Training - Feb 19 Centurion Town Hall on the TAKE BACK AMERICA Series Tour | | |
---
|
---
| | Hi Friends,

I am very grateful for all of your support helping me replace Nancy Mace!

The agenda for this Tuesday night's 2/8/22 volunteers meeting is as follows:

Briefing.
Calendar Scrub.
Highlight Important events especially 19 Feb.
Team actions at next weekend event and link up point to get your cap, palm cards and supporters sign-up sheets.
Set Campaign Team Training for March.

**The new Zoom link to join at 7:00 p.m. is **
[https://zoom.us/j/97756360462?pwd=Y1JIeTZmWmIrTjYyeGhNbllsQ2hmdz09](https://centurionforcongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=986079a9d70593df507cfab3a&id=17b64321f4&e=bb02dd73bf)
Upcoming events include:

2/10 -- Walterboro GOP, 7 pm
2/17 -- Charleston St. Andrews Rotary, 12:30 pm
2/17 -- Moncks Corner VFW 10256 Town Hall, 6 pm
2/19 -- Summerville VFW 3433 Town Hall & Fundraiser, 6 pm (don't miss it!)
2/21 -- Edisto GOP, 6 pm
2/23 -- Summerville Parents Group, 7 pm
2/24 \-- Bluffton Sun City GOP, 7 pm
2/24-2/27 -- Orlando CPAC

Go to the campaign **[Events](https://centurionforcongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=986079a9d70593df507cfab3a&id=659f8a94e8&e=bb02dd73bf)** page for details.
---
| | **ACTIONS NEEDED TODAY :
1\. I am officially on GAB, DISCORD and TELEGRAM. Make sure to follow and like and comment on GAB Social Media Platform.
2\. BE A 30 Second Volunteer by Liking, Commenting and Sharing on my [Facebook Page](https://centurionforcongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=986079a9d70593df507cfab3a&id=fe7031b886&e=bb02dd73bf), [YouTube CHANNEL](https://centurionforcongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=986079a9d70593df507cfab3a&id=a293984723&e=bb02dd73bf) , [Twitter](https://centurionforcongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=986079a9d70593df507cfab3a&id=a210befc50&e=bb02dd73bf), GETTR @IngridCenturion. DAILY!! DAILY!!**

Thank you all!
Ingrid Centurion
---
| |
---
| Republican Candidate for Congress, SC-01

_P.S. We need Republicans who speak, act and vote in the House the same way they campaign. Please consider making a_[ _donation_](https://centurionforcongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=986079a9d70593df507cfab3a&id=f716f57425&e=bb02dd73bf) _[today](https://centurionforcongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=986079a9d70593df507cfab3a&id=54d58cfc4a&e=bb02dd73bf)_ _._

name: URGENT ACTION REQUESTED (via DCCC)
subject: President Carter’s STUNNING call to action
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc
body:
| | | **[Did you see this?! In the wake of vicious GOP attacks on our democracy, President Jimmy Carter is sounding the alarm and calling us to action. President Carter only asks for our help when the situation is DIRE -- so it's urgent that we JUMP into action straight away. We're calling on 390 of our best grassroots Democrats to ANSWER President Carter's call and rush in $3 to DEFEND our Democratic House Majority and DEFEAT Trump's anti-democracy Republicans. Can we count on your help before midnight?](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/D_8wc66~)**

We're fired up like never before.

_**FIRST: **_

Republicans**LIED** about the results of the 2020 election,**INCITED** a deadly insurrection, and **ATTACKED** our voting rights.

_**BUT THEN:**_

President Jimmy Carter broke his silence to warn us about the GOP's dangerous, anti-democratic turn -- _**and called on us to help SAVE our democracy before it 's too late:

[](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/YG_zQVVDXdf~)**_

_**SO NOW: **_

****[We're rushing to answer President Carter's STUNNING call with a HISTORIC surge of grassroots support for strong House Democrats nationwide. name: Beto HQ
subject: Stickers!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
This sticker will look great on a notebook, water bottle, or car!
#
We’re facing our next mandatory fundraising deadline in less than two weeks. Everything we raise through February 19th will be made public.
We’re going up against Greg Abbott’s $62 million dollars in campaign cash and we need your help to fight back and prove that we have the resources to win this race. People are going to be watching closely after Abbott narrowly outraised us in January — and we need to rise to the moment so we beat him this time.
[Make your first contribution and we’ll send you a free sticker so you can show your support for Beto for Texas!](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/52528?refcode=ema20220207-175195&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=175195%2E444211%2EPtu2ic)
**[Get Your Sticker](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/52528?refcode=ema20220207-175195&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=175195%2E444211%2EPtu2ic)**
[](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/52528?refcode=ema20220207-175195&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=175195%2E444211%2EPtu2ic)
Greg Abbott’s failures as governor could not be more clear. Abbott isn’t working for the people of Texas because he’s too busy advancing the agenda of his big donors.
Beto will be a governor who fights for the people and listens to the communities he serves, but we need your help right now in order for him to win in November.
[ Make your first contribution ahead of the TEC reporting deadline on February 19th and we’ll send you a free Beto for Texas sticker to show our appreciation for your support.](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/52528?refcode=ema20220207-175195&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=175195%2E444211%2EPtu2ic)
More soon,
Team Beto

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bft-em-footer?refcode=em20220207-175195-footer&t=23&refcode2=175195_444211_Ptu2ic&akid=175195%2E444211%2EPtu2ic)**
---
Email us: info@betofortexas.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Grassroots supporters like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Beto for Texas, PO Box 302647, Austin, TX 78703.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/bft-receive-fewer-emails/)

Pol. Adv. Paid for by Beto for Texas.

name: Jimmy
subject: How I messed up on the campaign trail
body:
Last week I sent you an email about the article that the Sacramento Bee wrote about our campaign. I was SO excited to send it, this article
| | **Can't see this message?_[View in a browser](https://shoutout.wix.com/so/f9NxNNTM5/c?w=c2NtRF0VbkFOt2Iou2ieii1QG6_TKtQp3q-uCstY3MM.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zaG91dG91dC53aXguY29tL3NvL2Y5TnhOTlRNNT9sYW5ndWFnZVRhZz1lbiIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6ImU5ZWFjNjg5LWFiOGYtNDUwNi05OWQ2LTBjNDVhY2JiOWJmOCJ9)_**
---
| | |
---
| | I made a big mistake last week
---
| |
---
| | Last week I sent you an email about the [article](https://shoutout.wix.com/so/f9NxNNTM5/c?w=pTS9VcjCYRTYYSQw8ezLw-oD9y39uTQ07c5sWxw9KNo.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuc2FjYmVlLmNvbS9uZXdzL3BvbGl0aWNzLWdvdmVybm1lbnQvZWxlY3Rpb24vY2FsaWZvcm5pYS1lbGVjdGlvbnMvYXJ0aWNsZTI1Nzg4NDcwMy5odG1sIiwiciI6ImY2NjAyOTYyLTY1ZjgtNDRkOC03ZjYwLTM3ZGE1Y2M0YTgzOSIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6ImU5ZWFjNjg5LWFiOGYtNDUwNi05OWQ2LTBjNDVhY2JiOWJmOCJ9) that the Sacramento Bee wrote about our campaign. I was SO excited to send it, this article is a big deal for our campaign. I put the email together while I was in a hurry after I got home from teaching and before I rushed out the door. I missed one thing. The link on the donate button didn’t work. I was 20 minutes into the first act of watching “Anastasia: The Musical” at the Community Center Theater when I realized it and swore loudly enough for the little girl in front of me to turn around, aghast. I was devastated. Its alright though. This is one of the things about not leaning on corporate interests to run this campaign, I get to learn these lessons along the way. Our campaign is still getting a huge boost from this article, but I need you to do one more thing: click the donate button below and give to our campaign. I promise this time it actually works.
---
| | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://shoutout.wix.com/so/f9NxNNTM5/c?w=EccdsD_2hQmEQbeGoJXRvry5Jsj8zg0rZDakUkE1AmQ.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUubnVtZXJvLmFpL2NvbnRyaWJ1dGUvSmltbXlGcmVtZ2VuZm9yQ29uZ3Jlc3MiLCJyIjoiYzVhNGVkMDAtYzQwMi00NGM2LWE4ZWYtYTJmMzE2MDBiYzFhIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiZTllYWM2ODktYWI4Zi00NTA2LTk5ZDYtMGM0NWFjYmI5YmY4In0)
---
| | Thanks for your support of this campaign. Real people should be able to run for office and I am grateful of your patience as I try to do this the right way, instead of leaning on the political elite. Your friend,
---
| |
---
| |
---
| | [**Make checks payable to: Jimmy Fremgen for Congress 1809 S Street, Suite 101-117 Sacramento, CA 95811**](https://shoutout.wix.com/so/f9NxNNTM5/c?w=qrQdTBvQFSXToVwzPuRdXnIcD0t2m-FlQ2ycfhWKHFA.)
---
|
---
[**Visit our campaign website** ](https://shoutout.wix.com/so/f9NxNNTM5/c?w=zMlGbb9xyusYGyQrkSNXxioi5wJGIMq8rrn-uZZEgRw.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZWxlY3RqaW1teS5jb20vIiwiciI6ImI5MTE0YjIxLTA4NTItNDdjYy1hZDAwLTczZjI0NWRhMDVjZCIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6ImU5ZWFjNjg5LWFiOGYtNDUwNi05OWQ2LTBjNDVhY2JiOWJmOCJ9)
| | Created with [**Explore Ascend**](https://www.wix.com/ascend/home?utm_campaign=vir_promote_em_footer_wixads&referralInfo=SO_LP)
---
|
---

---
**If you feel you received it by mistake or wish to unsubscribe, please _[click here](https://www.wixapis.com/email-marketing/v1/email-subscriptions/unsubscribe?payload=JWS.eyJraWQiOiJZbHZQV0U0aSIsImFsZyI6IkhTMjU2In0..zXVticru4DWVC2c0oU-mV5tJ3BOIEZcETv63T4KafvM&language=en)_.**

name: Trump Social Media Notifications
subject: NEW private message for Trump Social Members
body:
As a Trump Social Member, you are the first to receive this private message. Open ASAP. It's time sensitive.

|
---
| | | **PRIVATE MESSAGE FOR TRUMP SOCIAL MEMBERS:**

We texted you yesterday asking if you'll accept President Trump's friend request but never heard back.

_**Peter, was this a mistake?**_ 98% accepted, so you are now in the bottom 2% of all Trump supporters.

Because you were one of the first to pledge to join Trump social, _**[we have resent your Trump friend request and extended your deadline for another 5 minutes.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59486725:JUAmjfENb:m:1:3253819041:E659DE3255217797D8A824783EC50C18:r "we have resent your Trump friend request and extended your deadline for another 5 minutes.")**_

name: Ben Shapiro
subject: 9 Antifa leftists arrested
body:
Peter, Insidious leftist ideology has taken hold of our educational system. It's never been more important that we expose it, because the Left has lit an ideological fire, and that fire is now consuming the minds of young Americans, burning itself through the most aspects of American culture and politics. That's why it's of utmost importance that I hear back from you today. I'm no stranger to the authoritarian attitudes on campus; I famously felt the brunt of it when conservative students invited me to speak on the University of California, Berkeley campus. Radical leftist groups like Antifa vowed to riot and cause harm to others. [**HELP US FIGHT THE RADICAL LEFT**](
https://yaf.revv.co/42a55c4c12eb19b7?utm_source=BDG-REV&utm_medium=em&utm_campaign=20220204_BDG_YAF_BSBI_REV_SMC-SMC) The fear of violence from leftist agitators was so great that:
* It cost $600,000 in security expenses and required hundreds of policemen to ensure that agitators didn't disrupt or try to cause violence at my speech.
* The University shut down six buildings on campus during my speech and erected concrete barricades (YES, a wall) to secure the Berkeley campus.
* For the first time in 20 years, the City of Berkeley voted to allow the use of pepper spray against violent protesters.
* In the end, police arrested nine leftists for trying to sneak banned weapons into our event, with the likely intent to do harm.

It's no longer just about the Left trying to suppress your conservative views on campus. It's about using the threat of violence to silence the conservative values you and I share. [](
https://yaf.revv.co/42a55c4c12eb19b7?utm_source=BDG-REV&utm_medium=em&utm_campaign=20220204_BDG_YAF_BSBI_REV_SMC-SMC) Meanwhile, schools roll out the red carpet for leftists like Angela Davis, Bill Ayers, Barack Obama, Bill Clinton, and Bernie Sanders. At Berkeley, taxpayer-funded school administrators tried to derail my event from even taking place. They told me that they didn't have a lecture hall available, which was a lie. School administrators even cut the venue in half by not allowing students to sit in the balcony, a dirty tactic to minimize attendance. **The good news is the radical Left's attempts to silence me completely backfired.****** More than 600 students showed up, and we were able to host an engaging and civil event. Then, OVER 10 MILLION PEOPLE watched my speech online (that's more viewers than any of the major evening newscasts). This victory for the Conservative Movement would have never happened if it weren't for the **Young America's Foundation** **(YAF)**. When Berkeley tried to illegally block me from coming to campus, YAF sued the university,**and won.** But the radicals who rioted and tried to incite violence at Berkeley are relentless. Their stranglehold on America's universities has not yet been broken. **Young America's Foundation** has been an incredible partner in making sure I am able to share our conservative values with students on campuses across the country. In fact, I speak on campuses **_exclusively_** through YAF because I know YAF has the experience and leadership necessary to run the nation's leading campus lecture program. Today YAF needs your help. **[Will you make a _TAX-DEDUCTIBLE_ contribution of $35 today to ensure that YAF can continue to present speakers, including Dr. Arthur Laffer, Katie Pavlich, Senator Ted Cruz, and many others to high school and college students? Without you, the mission to pass along our conservative values to future generations will stall out.](
https://yaf.revv.co/42a55c4c12eb19b7?utm_source=BDG-REV&utm_medium=em&utm_campaign=20220204_BDG_YAF_BSBI_REV_SMC-SMC)** Let me tell you a little bit more about what YAF does to advance conservative ideas. Speaking to an audience of Young America's Foundation students, Vice President Mike Pence noted, "Since its founding in 1960, YAF has been a bulwark of American greatness." YAF valiantly defends the values we share by educating impressionable young people who have been ideologically poisoned by leftist propaganda for decades, by the very teachers and professors they're told to trust. YAF's team is the best at what they do. They are _**#1: the LARGEST and MOST effective conservative youth outreach organization in America**._ Here's why:
* YAF introduces young audiences to the biggest names in the Conservative Movement through their leading campus lecture program. YAF speakers are the most inspiring conservative voices in America, including **Arthur Laffer, Katie Pavlich,** YAF's Ronald Reagan Presidential Scholar and Vice President **Mike Pence, Dinesh D'Souza, Lila Rose, Steve Forbes,** Lt. Col.**Allen West** , Speaker**Newt Gingrich, Michael Knowles, Dana Loesch, James O'Keefe,** NFL star and Congressman **Burgess Owens, Star Parker,** Fox News's**Jesse Watters,** and many others.
* YAF teaches **_millions of students_ **across the nation YOUR conservative values through breakthrough conferences, training seminars, and campus activism initiatives and activities. (In fact, YAF is the only Conservative Movement organization that has a full suite of conservative educational programs for high school students!)
* And YAF preserves and protects President Reagan's ranch in Santa Barbara, California and Boyhood Home in Dixon, Illinois. They saved these national treasures so young people can learn about Ronald Reagan's lasting accomplishments.

No other organization reaches conservative students with foundational American ideas on a bigger scale than Young America's Foundation. **That's why I prefer YAF to be my sole sponsor for campus events.** They fight for the right to ensure alternative voices are heard on college campuses. They stop campuses from being turned into Leftist echo chambers. I am glad I have YAF on my side and the side of the students. But YAF can't do this alone. As the Left continues to stoop to desperate new lows to silence conservatives, it's become more important than ever that our values are shared with the next generation of thought leaders. We both know that the Left doesn't want a fair discussion of ideas. But that's why YAF needs your help today. At any moment, a scheduled event could get shut down by campus radicals or administrators, and the YAF team must be ready to engage them on a moment's notice. [**Will you contribute $35 or more today so that YAF's rapid response team will always be ready to leap into action the next time leftists decide to shut down free speech and deprive students of the chance to hear your conservative ideas?**](
https://yaf.revv.co/42a55c4c12eb19b7?utm_source=BDG-REV&utm_medium=em&utm_campaign=20220204_BDG_YAF_BSBI_REV_SMC-SMC) Friend, a donation of $35 or whatever you choose does more than you know. The impact amplifying conservative voices will have on the future of our country can't be overstated. I cannot encourage you enough to consider giving to YAF today. Partnering with YAF today is our opportunity to win a generation that values freedom. I can't think of a better investment. Ronald Reagan stated, "There is no better way to establish hope for the future than to enlighten young minds." I look forward to hearing back from you. -Ben Ben Shapiro [**Will you support Young America's Foundation with a contribution of $35, $50, $100, or even $1000 today, to save this generation by presenting conservative ideas to students across the country? All donations to YAF are TAX-DEDUCTIBLE!**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59488447:6ab9NfEpN:m:1:3298722022:CA504784DF8C15F191262CA1882907CE:r) [**DONATE**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59488447:6ab9NfEpN:m:1:3298722022:CA504784DF8C15F191262CA1882907CE:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59488447:6ab9NfEpN:m:1:3298722022:CA504784DF8C15F191262CA1882907CE:r) | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59488448:6ab9NfEpN:m:1:3298722022:CA504784DF8C15F191262CA1882907CE:r) | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59488449:6ab9NfEpN:m:1:3298722022:CA504784DF8C15F191262CA1882907CE:r) | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59488450:6ab9NfEpN:m:1:3298722022:CA504784DF8C15F191262CA1882907CE:r)
---|---|---
**[www.yaf.org](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59488451:6ab9NfEpN:m:1:3298722022:CA504784DF8C15F191262CA1882907CE:r)**

11480 Commerce Park Dr, 6th Floor
Reston, VA 20191-1556

**[Privacy Policy](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59488452:6ab9NfEpN:m:1:3298722022:CA504784DF8C15F191262CA1882907CE:r) | [Unsubscribe]({{unsubscribeUrl}})**

name: 2022 Membership Services
subject: We need you to STAY on our team. Renew your 2022 Membership today!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Your 2 year membership streak is at risk. Renew now >>>
[View this message in your browser](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zet4dap2htu19h2i16130t04s5poms6dggdf3q4o_rp22sh2s8i66ob1cpi61o32c5h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq2sjlemo72sjk6ipr7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65tdhmhhnecrk6mpj8phh6thj2olmm8q3ccj0ceo66t1imcpn8slicupb6t3ie1jjfkjge9i3cc5icpp78cbmc3gb8p9gs2qj2p76cpj3applmoo7co36ehgb6oj7m2qmash5u)

| |
---
| | | Hey, we haven't heard from you. Are you letting your 2 year Republican Membership streak disappear or did you miss our email?

---
| | | [RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zdpe0vbirsoqdn9jfu3f6ic4ej6i1846gvvunnr0_rp22sh2s8i66ob1cpi61o32c5h2bs)
---

The 2022 Midterm Elections is the toughest battle we've seen yet. This sets the stage for what's to come for Republicans in 2024. If we fail to win back a Republican Majority in Congress, we will never take back the White House.

Now more than ever before, we need you to STAY on our team, **[but you only have until midnight tonight to renew your 2022 Republican Membership.](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z4hfeusnq8o4n7hg2it4qqt2b3515o0dh01je78o_rp22sh2s8i66ob1cpi61o32c5h2bs)**

---

**ATTN: Your Republican Membership has EXPIRED**
For the last **2 years** , you have consistently stood by House Republicans' side. You've supported the Conservative fight furiously and consistently through every battle we've seen, **but we have bad news for you.**

**It pains me to have to tell you that for the first time ever, you 've failed to renew your Republican Membership and have lost your support streak.**

There's good news though. I spoke with leadership about this special circumstance, and they have allowed us to extend our Membership renewal period to **[11:59 PM TONIGHT](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2ztangff1s681q0vupc1k97b8sl46r09jplo5o0j0_rp22sh2s8i66ob1cpi61o32c5h2bs)**.

name: Senator John Kennedy
subject: Don’t expect Joe to fix anything
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Kennedy for Us
body:
Joe Biden has got a mess on his plate [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8433%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=RLIAuS2v5ohbKmFpz2og0Q&sysid=1)
Joe Biden has got a mess on his plate

| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c13914%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=fSWOdADb2WS7loX9bOoUTA&sysid=1)
---

Folks,

**If it wasn’t bad enough, it's about to get a lot worse.**

Joe Biden has dealt the American people a bad hand. I’m not a great poker player, so believe me, I know a bad hand when I see one.

Rising inflation. A continuing border crisis. A shortage of workers for our businesses. Kids STILL can’t go back to school full time. **[Where does it end?](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c13925%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=CEFs4foylsyoHRXr%2ftuBZw&sysid=1)**

**These are just a few of the many crises that Joe Biden has caused, and it doesn't look like he intends on fixing them anytime soon.**

I’m asking for your support to deal with these issues our country is facing. If there's one thing I’ve learned from working in D.C., it’s that you can’t depend on Democrats to fix their own mess. **_That’s why I’m counting on you to help me clean up Joe’s mess._**
| | [$25 To Clean-up Joe’s Mess](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c13926%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=DYkCI2%2f9QDZzYHi%2fcpPpzQ&sysid=1)
---
| [$50 To Clean-up Joe’s Mess](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c13927%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=BS5tsxiKCM4E0Hq5tvGKfQ&sysid=1)
---
| [$100 To Clean-up Joe’s Mess](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c13928%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=NFVLMPZ%2foS0GULkYCcyXPw&sysid=1)
---
| [$250 To Clean-up Joe’s Mess](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c13929%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Q8K%2bXRvBWVEGe1xBX4uQ%2bQ&sysid=1)
---
| [$500 To Clean-up Joe’s Mess](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c13920%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=cPiwifKuihlaz8N03VXSNA&sysid=1)
---

**I know it seems like there’s a lot of chaos right now. But with the right leadership, we can solve these issues and get America back on track.**

God Bless,

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c13914%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=fSWOdADb2WS7loX9bOoUTA&sysid=1)
Senator Kennedy

Paid for by John Kennedy for Us
---
John Kennedy for Us
P.O. Box 80418
Baton Rouge, LA 70808
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8433%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=RLIAuS2v5ohbKmFpz2og0Q&sysid=1)_

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8433%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=RLIAuS2v5ohbKmFpz2og0Q&sysid=1)

name: Don Huffines
subject: Beto is a threat to Texas
body:

subject: Look who’s targeting me again…
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETH VAN DUYNE FOR CONGRESS
body:
It’s happening again; I have become one of the DCCC’s top targets. Ever since their bitter loss in 2020, they haven’t been able to get over it. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6796%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=bJrj0kWw513VFvRe4S3%2bAw&sysid=1)

**Now the Democrats are targeting me because they cannot stand having a strong, unwavering conservative woman fighting to retake areas of North Texas from Democrat control. **
_I have a huge responsibility and the DCCC is fighting me every step of the way, which is why I need your support._
---

| [DEFEAT THE DEMOCRATS](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69976%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=cgaVIg8p7ZjjJ%2blf2GAKAg&sysid=1 "DEFEAT THE DEMOCRATS")

| | I don’t need to tell you how important it is to have leaders who will fight to protect parents, bring order and security back to our southern border, and fight to ensure our freedoms and liberties are safe from the tyranny of Socialism.

I will never stop working for all Americans, but with our primary coming up on March 1st and the DCCC targeting me, [I need you in the fight to put America First in Congress!](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69972%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=lUe62AEJNUzs5fMIDRNhPg&sysid=1)

subject: We warned you that ignoring us would have consequences

body:
You won’t believe what Joe Biden just did...
& nbsp; &nb; sp;
Not interested? [Unsubscribe Here](https://trk.cp20.com/form?3gamg--fgxr-4qqlpo2&sl=2d&t=5&ac=gh7s)

| | Want to FIRE Pelosi? **Text FIRE to 21818** to help House Republicans take back the House for the American People.
---
| | | | [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3gamg-1x3k3-4qqlpo6/)
---

Fellow Conservative, we warned you that ignoring us would have consequences.

Joe Biden just sent **$15 MILLION** to help Democrats win back the House and Senate majorities in this year’s elections. Democrat officials say _**“he’s all in on the midterms.”**_

**Well Fellow Conservative, Republicans need YOU to be all in too or Conservatives will LOSE!**

---
| | | [STAND WITH HOUSE REPUBLICANS](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3gamg-1x3k4-4qqlpo7/ "STAND WITH HOUSE REPUBLICANS")

**[Will you finally renew your 2022 membership with our House Republican team?](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3gamg-1x3k5-4qqlpo8/ "Will you finally renew your 2022 membership with our House Republican team?")**

You have long been one of our top supporters who powered Republicans to victory, but you let your membership status lapse!

**[Republicans need to know if they still have your support.](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3gamg-1x3k6-4qqlpo9/ "Republicans need to know if they still have your support.")**

Together we can win the 2022 midterms and send a Conservative Red Wave to Washington. Losing your support this year would be a death sentence.

This is a battle for the future of our country – _Corruption versus Constitution, Socialism versus Opportunity, Tyranny versus Freedom._
---
| | | [START THE RED WAVE](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3gamg-1x3k7-4qqlpo0/ "START THE RED WAVE")
---

Democrats are obviously going to be flush with campaign cash and they enjoy the power of the President on their side.

That means each and every Republican supporter is crucial to Conservative victory.

You can help stop the dark money Democrats from buying Congress in 2022 by renewing your exclusive membership and sending House Republicans a small donation.

---
| | | [STOP THE DEMOCRATS](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3gamg-1x3k8-4qqlpo1/ "STOP THE DEMOCRATS")
---

The first membership deadline has already passed, but we extended it just a few days longer because of the news that Biden is sending millions to help the Democrats.

**[Will you sign up as a 2022 Republican supporter to stop Biden’s Democrats?](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3gamg-1x3k9-4qqlpo2/ "Will you sign up as a 2022 Republican supporter to stop Biden’s Democrats?")**

Thank you,

House Republicans

PS - We can overcome the Democrats’ millions in spending, but we can’t do it without you. **[Republicans need you to renew your support now.](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3gamg-1x3ka-4qqlpo2/ "Republicans need you to renew your support now.")**
---
| |
* * *

[](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3gamg-1x3kb-4qqlpo3/ "Red Wave Image Link")

Pelosi’s raising MILLIONS and spending MILLIONS MORE attacking freedom-loving patriots across the nation. We need each and every patriot who sees this to join the fight. If we fall even a dollar short, we will lose the House to Pelosi FOREVER.

**[Can we count on you to step up?](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3gamg-1x3kc-4qqlpo4/ "Can we count on you to step up?")**

There's good news though. I spoke with leadership about this special circumstance, and they have allowed us to extend our Membership renewal period to **[11:59 PM TONIGHT.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zqvj4ldmfui6i2lh3p6r7tsqe2lvfh06jk2l1ubg_rp22sh2s8i66ob1cph6cob2cjh2bs)**

We're approaching the biggest battle of our lives. The 2022 Midterm Elections will be the toughest election we've seen yet, and we need our strongest grassroots supporters on our side.

**The Democrats raised over $130 MILLION last year alone.** We're already behind, but with your help, we can close the gap, and take back the Conservative Majority in Congress.

Americans across the country are counting on you. Don't let them down.

Thank you,

Mark, National Republican Membership Office

name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: Teachers are grooming our children...
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59490545:J4nUmfENt:m:1:3298722022:C9D1EA4160CE27630D6E06381CFA5410:r) Public schools are allowing teachers to manipulate children's gender and sexual preferences behind parents' backs. I know this sounds unthinkable, but allow me to share Jessica Konen's story... Jessica discovered that her 12-year-old daughter had been manipulated into identifying as a boy, changing her name on school records, binding her breasts so she wouldn't look like a girl, and keeping all of this a secret from Jessica. Teachers went as far as to tell Jessica's daughter that she couldn't trust her own mother. When I heard Jessica's story, I knew I couldn't stand idly by. **Now, the Center for American Liberty is helping Jessica defend her parental rights by suing the predatory leftist teachers who tried to brainwash her daughter with transgender propaganda,****and we need your help****.** **[If you believe parents have the right to raise their children how they see fit, can I count on you to make an urgent tax-deductible gift to the Center for American Liberty today as we launch this critical lawsuit?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59490545:J4nUmfENt:m:1:3298722022:C9D1EA4160CE27630D6E06381CFA5410:r)** [**MAKE MY GIFT TO DEFEND PARENTAL RIGHTS**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59490545:J4nUmfENt:m:1:3298722022:C9D1EA4160CE27630D6E06381CFA5410:r) Let me introduce myself. My name is Harmeet Dhillon, and I am the founder of the Center for American Liberty. Through the last few years, we've sued a laundry list of radical left-wing politicians, organizations, and companies for trying to destroy our fundamental rights. Just one example of our work: Last year, California Governor Gavin Newsom attempted to ban private religious gatherings in the name of COVID-19 we stepped in and stop him. We were able to step into sue Newsom over his unconstitutional mandate. **And we won!** But back to Jessica's story... It's a parent's job to raise their children, NOT anyone else's. But the radical left disagrees. They think they own our children. And there's a simple reason they're after our kids. **_Leftists inside public schools know if they can sever the ties between you and your children, they can replace the values you raised your kids to have with theirs._** They know if they can brainwash our youth, we'll be led into socialism by a generation driven by hatred of America and conservative values. **Sadly, for Jessica Konen and her daughter, they've become collateral damage in the war leftists are waging against kids and their parents in our nation's schools.** But Jessica isn't going quietly. Instead, she's fighting back, and I'm proud to represent her and her daughter in this pivotal case. Jessica knows exactly what's at stake and I think you do too. [**That's why I hope you'll make a gift today to protect our children from the radical left, and ensure that parental rights are preserved.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59490545:J4nUmfENt:m:1:3298722022:C9D1EA4160CE27630D6E06381CFA5410:r) I'll be honest, the more I tell you about this case, the more you'll be horrified. It all started when school staff formed a secret "equality club," where they recruited preteens, including Jessica's daughter, to "question sexual and gender identities." At club meetings, these radical teachers planted the seed in her mind that not only was she really a boy trapped in a girl's body, but that she also was sexually attracted to BOTH men and women. Keep in mind, Jessica's daughter was only twelve at the time. Jessica had no idea her daughter was in this "club." She had no idea her daughter was being subjected to near-constant manipulation by leftist teachers. Only when these radicals were sure they had successfully "transitioned" her daughter did they bother to contact Jessica. **Even worse, she was told she was**** _expected_****to call her very own daughter a boy's name with male pronouns, and that her daughter's name and gender had already been changed in official school records. ** This isn't just immoral. This is flat-out evil. **It's child abuse.** And, Friend, you can guarantee this isn't just isolated to California. In fact, it's already been uncovered in Wisconsin too... **_Would you bet it's not happening at the public school down the street from you? _** Because if it's not already, it's only a matter of time before radical leftists bring their insane and twisted ideas about sex and gender to your local public schools. They don't truly care about education. They don't care about your kids or their mental health. They only care to recruit as many children as possible to become foot soldiers for their dangerous ideology, regardless of the children they hurt or the families they shatter. [**That's why it's critical you and I stop these leftists before it's too late to save our kids or our country, and you can do that with a tax-deductible gift to The Center for American Liberty today.** ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59490545:J4nUmfENt:m:1:3298722022:C9D1EA4160CE27630D6E06381CFA5410:r) When I heard about Jessica Konen's case, I knew I wouldn't be able to rest until I was sure that what happened to her daughter doesn't happen again. But it's only possible for The Center for American Liberty to leap into action to defend your rights through the generous support of patriots like you. You see, we at the Center filed Jessica Konen's case last week. But this JUST the beginning. From what we know of this case, it looks like we're in for a knock down drag out legal battle... Which means this case promises to be an expensive fight, _and one you and I simply cannot afford to lose. _ [**If you believe parents have the right to raise their children as they see fit, can I count on you to make an urgent tax-deductible gift to help Jessica win this case and hold radical leftist teachers and school districts accountable?** ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59490545:J4nUmfENt:m:1:3298722022:C9D1EA4160CE27630D6E06381CFA5410:r) It doesn't matter how large or small your gift is, every single dollar counts. And make no mistake, we cannot win without the support of patriots like YOU. As soon as we receive your gift, I'll make sure to let Jessica know you're standing with her in this quest to deliver justice for her and her daughter. I know she'll be encouraged by your generosity, as well as your commitment to securing the rights of every parent in America. **For Freedom,** **Harmeet K. Dhillon** **Founder & CEO,** **The Center for American Liberty** [**MAKE MY GIFT TO DEFEND PARENTAL RIGHTS**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59490545:J4nUmfENt:m:1:3298722022:C9D1EA4160CE27630D6E06381CFA5410:r) P.S. I wanted to leave you with a parting thought. If there's a silver lining in Jessica Konen's story, it's this. Everything Jessica and her daughter experienced happened right before COVID hit and schools went to remote learning. Her daughter came home from school using a boy's name with male pronouns. But then a funny thing happened. **With Jessica's daughter no longer being constantly groomed and conditioned by the staff at school, she reverted to her original gender - once again using her given name and the pronouns that match her biological sex.** You see, Friend, that's because if truth has a chance, it will overcome lies. And we must stop these leftist attempts to brainwash our children into believing they're something they're not before our kids are damaged for life. **[No child, no parent, no family should ever go through what the Konen family has endured. And with your support of the Center for American Liberty today, you can make sure no one else does.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59490545:J4nUmfENt:m:1:3298722022:C9D1EA4160CE27630D6E06381CFA5410:r)** Thank you for all you do. [**MAKE MY GIFT TO DEFEND PARENTAL RIGHTS**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59490545:J4nUmfENt:m:1:3298722022:C9D1EA4160CE27630D6E06381CFA5410:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59490545:J4nUmfENt:m:1:3298722022:C9D1EA4160CE27630D6E06381CFA5410:r) **[Please consider supporting our efforts to defend our Constitution with a donation today.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59490545:J4nUmfENt:m:1:3298722022:C9D1EA4160CE27630D6E06381CFA5410:r)** The Center For American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization created to fight against growing anti-free-speech and anti-civil liberties trends.
Â(C) The Center for American Liberty | [www.libertycenter.org](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59490546:J4nUmfENt:m:1:3298722022:C9D1EA4160CE27630D6E06381CFA5410:r) PO Box 2510, Leesburg, VA 20177 Click here to [unsubscribe.]({{unsubscribeUrl}})
---

| | Friend,
The first stop on the Great American Comeback Tour is Roswell! Please join me and my team on March 2nd at 5:30 p.m. at Mac McGees (936 Canton Street, Roswell, Georgia 30075) in Roswell.
We look forward to seeing you then to share our vision to deliver the great comeback to retake America! Spacing is limited so please RSVP to [finance@jake.org](mailto:finance@jake.org). We look forward to seeing you soon.

body:
This is about western Wisconsin.

| Peter, Deb’s Republican opponent — Derrick Van Orden — should not represent our district in Congress. Here’s why:

🚩 He called an LGBTQ+ Pride display at the Prairie du Chien library propaganda and made a teenage staff member feel unsafe
🚩 He tried to blame the fentanyl crisis on immigrants
🚩 He used his 2020 campaign funds to attend the January 6th insurrection
🚩 He is proudly endorsed by Donald Trump

Van Orden does not represent western Wisconsin values. He represents the same dangerous rhetoric that put our democracy at risk on January 6th 2020. Meanwhile, Deb lives by the values of faith, respect, and hard work, and will uphold the oath she took to protect our democracy as an Army Captain and CIA Officer.

But getting Deb into office will take teamwork. Van Orden — with the help of Trump’s base — has already raised over $2.6 million. If we’re going to defeat them, we need to organize and work together.

clean_body: This is about western Wisconsin. | Peter, Deb’s Republican opponent — Derrick Van Orden — should not represent our district in Congress. Here’s why: 🚩 He called an LGBTQ+ Pride display at the Prairie du Chien library propaganda and made a teenage staff member feel unsafe 🚩 He tried to blame the fentanyl crisis on immigrants 🚩 He used his 2020 campaign funds to attend the January 6th insurrection 🚩 He is proudly endorsed by Donald Trump Van Orden does not represent western Wisconsin values. He represents the same dangerous rhetoric that put our democracy at risk on January 6th 2020. Meanwhile, Deb lives by the values of faith, respect, and hard work, and will uphold the oath she took to protect our democracy as an Army Captain and CIA Officer. But getting Deb into office will take teamwork. Van Orden — with the help of Trump’s base — has already raised over $2.6 million. name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Have you seen this?
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vWOdm23HN2

State of education

I don't believe the majority of the public really knows
what is being taught to our children and grandchildren. They
assume they are taught the same
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWOdm23HN2

From the
Desk of Dr. Ben Carson:
Hello,
I don't
believe the majority of the public really knows what is being
taught to our children and grandchildren.
They
assume they are taught the same lessons we learned growing
up-that America is a land of freedom and opportunity where anyone
has a chance at success.
From what
I've seen, this isn't always the case. However, I want to know
what you've seen.

Dr. Ben
Carson, Founder and Chairman of American Cornerstone Institute
I believe
that children as young as elementary age are being taught to
reject our American values.
They are
told that our Founding Fathers were massively flawed and that it

Hello,
In a moment, I’m going to ask you to make a donation to my campaign against Chuck Grassley and help me protect our Democratic Senate majority. But before I do, let me explain why your donation to turn Iowa’s Senate seat blue is so important right now.

Iowa was one of the closest Senate races in 2020, and the latest poll from the Des Moines Register shows a paltry 27% of Iowa voters want to reelect Grassley.
I’m happy for the fight ahead, but I’m not taking money from corporate PACs. Instead, I’m counting on grassroots donors like you to give now if we’re going to win and turn Iowa blue. **We’re less than 48 hours away from our most important fundraising deadline yet, and right now we’re still very short of our $120,000 goal. name: Roy Cooper
subject: I’m calling for a Nonpartisan Redistricting Commission in North Carolina. Will you join me, Peter?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
Our democracy is on the line. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41549612/329300984/823540626?refcode=ea.50cc2164-e788-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.50cc2164-e788-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MGNjMjE2NC1lNzg4LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sNi9ydUiErz3TIB6LG9khbO_gtbu3fQ4_FIJwVsPWiU=&emci=46c1fe2a-6488-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=50cc2164-e788-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=1049176)
You deserve to know that your vote counts the same as any other, Peter. That’s how our democracy is supposed to work — one person, one vote, where all of us have an equal say in our government. **But partisan gerrymandering tactics ensure that some votes count more than others.** Peter, _redistricting should not be used for partisan advantage._ Last week, the North Carolina Supreme Court ruled that the congressional and legislative maps drawn by Republican legislative leaders in Raleigh are an unconstitutional gerrymander. A healthy democracy requires free and fair elections. That’s why I want North Carolina to establish a Nonpartisan Redistricting Commission to ensure that future legislative maps accurately reflect the political reality of our state and fairly represent all our people. **[Our democracy is on the line. Sign my petition today to stand with me and call for a Nonpartisan Redistricting Commission>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41549614/329300986/1055395322?refcode=ea.50cc2164-e788-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.50cc2164-e788-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MGNjMjE2NC1lNzg4LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sNi9ydUiErz3TIB6LG9khbO_gtbu3fQ4_FIJwVsPWiU=&emci=46c1fe2a-6488-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=50cc2164-e788-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=1049176)** | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41549615/329300988/1055395322?refcode=ea.50cc2164-e788-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.50cc2164-e788-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MGNjMjE2NC1lNzg4LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sNi9ydUiErz3TIB6LG9khbO_gtbu3fQ4_FIJwVsPWiU=&emci=46c1fe2a-6488-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=50cc2164-e788-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=1049176)
---
Here in North Carolina, the Republicans gerrymandered our district maps in 2010 and 2020 so blatantly that the maps got _thrown out_. **It’s egregious partisanship on display for all to see, and we have to put an end to it.**
**[Will you join me in the fight? Sign my petition today to call for a Nonpartisan Redistricting Commission for North Carolina>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41549617/329300989/1055395322?refcode=ea.50cc2164-e788-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.50cc2164-e788-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MGNjMjE2NC1lNzg4LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sNi9ydUiErz3TIB6LG9khbO_gtbu3fQ4_FIJwVsPWiU=&emci=46c1fe2a-6488-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=50cc2164-e788-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=1049176)**
Thanks for standing with me,
Roy

clean_body: Our democracy is on the line. | You deserve to know that your vote counts the same as any other, Peter. That’s how our democracy is supposed to work — one person, one vote, where all of us have an equal say in our government. But partisan gerrymandering tactics ensure that some votes count more than others. Peter, redistricting should not be used for partisan advantage. Last week, the North Carolina Supreme Court ruled that the congressional and legislative maps drawn by Republican legislative leaders in Raleigh are an unconstitutional gerrymander. A healthy democracy requires free and fair elections. That’s why I want North Carolina to establish a Nonpartisan Redistricting Commission to ensure that future legislative maps accurately reflect the political reality of our state and fairly represent all our people. | Here in North Carolina, the Republicans gerrymandered our district maps in 2010 and 2020 so blatantly that the maps got thrown out. It’s egregious partisanship on display for all to see, and we have to put an end to it. Thanks for standing with me, Roy = = = Send donations via check to: Cooper for North Carolina PO Box 1190 Raleigh, NC 27602 Thank you! mailto:info@roycooper.com | Cooper for North Carolina PO Box 1190 Raleigh, NC 27602 United States Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. | | | Hi Fellow Conservative,

Right now, truckers are leading the charge to finally put an end to the coercive and overbearing COVID mandates the Left loves so much.

With everyday citizens by their sides, the truckers are demonstrating through their resistance just how much power grassroots patriots can have when they join together and stand up to elite control.

And here’s the thing, we are closer than ever to defeating the Radical Left’s anti-freedom COVID regime, but we MUST make our voice heard, loudly, clearly, and all together.

**[Sign the official petition to show your support for the truckers and join our virtual convoy for freedom>>>](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3gb9e-1x4c3-4qqlpo6/ "Sign the official petition to show your support for the truckers and join our virtual convoy for freedom >>>")**

PATRIOTS NEEDED: 100,000

subject: RE: Please don't let your membership expire!

body:
|

---
| | | Hello Peter,

I am reaching out with an URGENT NOTICE. **You failed to renew your 2022 Membership and it has LAPSED. **
---
| | | [RENEW NOW](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59488782:6A212fENo:m:1:3253819041:E3EA65DA719B0399ED87B56328BE875A:r "Generic Button")
---
Dan Crenshaw was upset to not see your name on our 2022 Membership list. He asked me to reach out to you personally to **extend an exclusive membership deadline till 11:59 PM TONIGHT for you. **

**[Will you answer Dan Crenshaw's plea and renew your 2022 Membership?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59488782:6A212fENo:m:1:3253819041:E3EA65DA719B0399ED87B56328BE875A:r "Will you answer
Dan Crenshaw's plea and renew your 2022 Membership? ")**

As Crenshaw said, renewing your membership is one of the most important things you can do to help House Republicans win back the Majority in 2022.

I don't know about you, but I am fed up with Speaker Pelosi and her Radical Left Minions. They are destroying this country with their COVID Mandates, free speech bans, and open borders. We must hold Pelosi accountable and get her FIRED in 2022.

**[We can't do it without you though. That's why I NEED you to renew your 2022 Membership before the extended February 8th, 11:59 PM deadline.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59488782:6A212fENo:m:1:3253819041:E3EA65DA719B0399ED87B56328BE875A:r "We can't do it without you though. That's why I NEED you to renew your 2022 Membership before
the extended February 7th, 11:59 PM deadline. ")**

You are _crucial_ in this fight.

Don't let Dan Crenshaw or the rest of the House Republicans down.

---

Michael
NCCC Communications Director

From: Dan Crenshaw
Subject: Please don't let your membership expire!

It's Dan Crenshaw. I'm reaching out to let you know that your current 2022 Membership status is listed as _EXPIRED_.

Button")
---

Let me tell you why renewing your 2022 Membership is so important:
1.Beating Nancy Pelosi's House Democrats is going to be impossible without YOU on our side.
2. This is the most important election of our lifetimes - it will truly decide whether or not America chooses the failed socialism of the Left or the freedom and prosperity of conservatism.
3\. Your 2022 Membership is _essential_ to showing Pelosi that our grassroots donors are more powerful than her evil dark money cronies.

---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59488782:6A212fENo:m:1:3253819041:E3EA65DA719B0399ED87B56328BE875A:r)
---

Because we have yet to hear from you, your membership lapsed. **But I have good news: we have extended our deadline until midnight on February 7th.**

---
| | | [RENEW NOW](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59488782:6A212fENo:m:1:3253819041:E3EA65DA719B0399ED87B56328BE875A:r "Generic
Button")
---

I can only extend this offer to you for a limited time - but it's critical you renew your 2022 Membership before the deadline. If we fail to make our mark, the Liberal Media, pollsters, and pundits will say it's indicative of the electoral outcome and everything will snowball.

**[Please, I'm humbly asking: renew today >>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59488782:6A212fENo:m:1:3253819041:E3EA65DA719B0399ED87B56328BE875A:r "Please,
Peter. I’m humbly asking: renew today >>>")**

Sincerely,

Dan Crenshaw

---

Link")

Pelosi's raising MILLIONS and spending MILLIONS MORE attacking freedom-loving patriots across the nation. We need each and every patriot who sees this to join the fight. If we fall even a dollar short, we will lose the House to Pelosi FOREVER.

**[Can we count on you to step up?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59488783:6A212fENo:m:1:3253819041:E3EA65DA719B0399ED87B56328BE875A:r "Can we count on
