subject: CONGRESS FLIPS TO REPUBLICAN CONTROL
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
|
---
| | |
I can picture it now:
| "CONGRESS FLIPS TO REPUBLICAN CONTROL"
November 9, 2022
---

This could be the headline this November _IF and ONLY IF_ we secure the resources we need to mobilize our voters, and stave off the relentless lies, smears, and fake news from the Radical Left.

You've seen what the Democrats have done to DESTROY President Trump's legacy in just one short year - we simply CANNOT afford 3 more years of this... We need to win only 5 seats to FIRE Pelosi, take back Congress, and get our country back on track. But each of those seats will take considerable effort. **Are you with us?**
| | [TAKE BACK CONGRESS](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59614079:s9zmo3HNj:m:1:2516168964:C96DC2EE9288343883AA78737CF86FE3:r)
---
**The problem is: we don 't have the resources.** Pelosi has the cash advantage, the Fake News media, Big Tech censorship, and now - the war she is waging against voter ID laws...

Which means we need twice as many boots on the ground to mobilize the Red Wave. The stakes have NEVER been higher. [**BUT, with your help today, YOU can make ALL the difference**.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59614079:s9zmo3HNj:m:1:2516168964:C96DC2EE9288343883AA78737CF86FE3:r "BUT, with your help today, YOU can make ALL the difference.")

With just **[ONE click](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59614079:s9zmo3HNj:m:1:2516168964:C96DC2EE9288343883AA78737CF86FE3:r "ONE
click")** from the other side of this screen, your contribution can guarantee more resources for:
-> Door-knocking
-> Advertisements
-> Voter Registration
-> Campaign Events
-> Volunteer Resources

All you have to do is chip in $25, $10, or even $5, and our team will take care of the rest. Let's turn this headline into a reality - **[pitch in now](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59614079:s9zmo3HNj:m:1:2516168964:C96DC2EE9288343883AA78737CF86FE3:r "pitch in now")** :
---
| | [TAKE BACK CONGRESS](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59614079:s9zmo3HNj:m:1:2516168964:C96DC2EE9288343883AA78737CF86FE3:r)
---
Thank you,

House Republicans

---
**A note from Kevin:**
---
| [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59614080:s9zmo3HNj:m:1:2516168964:C96DC2EE9288343883AA78737CF86FE3:r "Kevin McCarthy urgently needs YOU to take action")
---

As Leader of the House Republicans, I'm committed to flipping the House of Representatives in 2022 to restore the Republican Majority and steer America back on the right track. I'm incredibly grateful for your support in this fight and want you to know that I'm doing everything in my power to secure victory for Republicans. Your sustained support fuels our grassroots movement and provides us with the resources necessary to combat the Left's political games. If you'd like to make another contribution, I will fight tooth and nail to ensure every cent goes towards advancing the conservative agenda and winning back the House -- _**[EXPRESS DONATE HERE >>>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59614080:s9zmo3HNj:m:1:2516168964:C96DC2EE9288343883AA78737CF86FE3:r "EXPRESS DONATE HERE
>>>")**_

The fight is far from over, and we're only getting started.

Kevin McCarthy
Leader, House Republicans

Did you get Letitia’s survey, Peter?
Attorney General Letitia James has fought tirelessly to defend the rights of every last New Yorker from the corrupt influence of the powerful and wealthy. And now, less than a year before New Yorkers decide who will serve as the state’s attorney general for the next four years, Letitia’s counting on your invaluable input.
We set a goal to receive at least 1,000 survey responses before midnight tonight, but we’re still 215 short – and it looks like your response is missing, Peter. **Before I meet with Letitia tomorrow morning to go over the results, will you take 60 seconds now to fill out our priorities survey?**

Peter, I didn't grow up with power or privilege.

I was born and raised in Brooklyn, attended New York’s public schools, and had no special ties to political leaders. And, like millions of other New Yorkers, I was not given a platform to adequately voice my concerns or thoughts.
When I became the People’s Lawyer, I vowed that I would give a voice to all – especially those who have been without one for generations.

**Peter, ensuring New Yorkers have a voice in our government remains my top priority – that’s why my team created this quick survey.[Will you take 60 seconds to fill out my priorities survey so I can continue to fight for what matters most to you?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41552932/329314962/-1862283746?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk321-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMzg4YWVhZi1lZDg4LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IBdLxOCmZQpMVIeYiGYYXSbLysegIPo8ZPqkHrxlqCc=&emci=fae1840b-de86-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=3388aeaf-ed88-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=25369504)**
| | [Take my survey](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41552935/329314964/-1862283746?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk321-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMzg4YWVhZi1lZDg4LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IBdLxOCmZQpMVIeYiGYYXSbLysegIPo8ZPqkHrxlqCc=&emci=fae1840b-de86-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=3388aeaf-ed88-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=25369504)

As this election year continues, we have so many critical fights ahead of us. And I want you by my side as I hold Big Pharma accountable for exorbitantly high prescription drug prices, crack down on the gun violence epidemic, fight to preserve voting and reproductive rights for all, and so much more. I am dedicated to each and every fight, large or small, and I know that you are too.
**Peter, I need at least 1,000 responses on my priorities survey to gain a better understanding of what matters most to you, but your response is still missing.

[Will you take a moment to answer my survey so I can understand which fights to prioritize this election year?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41552936/329314966/-1862283746?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk321-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMzg4YWVhZi1lZDg4LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IBdLxOCmZQpMVIeYiGYYXSbLysegIPo8ZPqkHrxlqCc=&emci=fae1840b-de86-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=3388aeaf-ed88-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=25369504)**

name: Marcus Flowers
subject: I’m running to defeat Marjorie Taylor Greene -- will you join me?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41554857/329324302/2005998736?refcode=20220208_MF_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MDQ4ZGZkZS1mMDg4LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kGi0pr2hnDUGGqPgppn0bQiN2FYRYLo32Q0k4glr3yU=)
My name is Marcus Flowers and I am an Army veteran running to defeat Marjorie Taylor Greene and restore civility and common sense to our political discourse. As someone who spent a decade of my life serving in war zones, I’m sick of seeing Marjorie Taylor Greene and the other leaders of the alt-right hijack the phrase "patriotism" to serve their own vile beliefs. I know patriotism -- and the reality is they’re the farthest thing from it. **Through my work serving overseas on four continents, I’ve seen firsthand the damage done by radicalism, extremism, disinformation, lawlessness, and propaganda -- and after seeing Marjorie Taylor Greene bring her conspiracy theories and hatred to my home district? I knew I had to get in the race.** [**I’m asking you to split a donation between my campaign and Seth Moulton so we can stop the alt-right and Marjorie Taylor Greene:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41554858/329324304/2005998736?refcode=20220208_MF_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MDQ4ZGZkZS1mMDg4LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kGi0pr2hnDUGGqPgppn0bQiN2FYRYLo32Q0k4glr3yU=) [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41554859/329324306/-238118833?refcode=20220208_MF_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MDQ4ZGZkZS1mMDg4LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kGi0pr2hnDUGGqPgppn0bQiN2FYRYLo32Q0k4glr3yU=)
Now, let’s not kid ourselves: the battle to unseat Greene and other Trump-Republicans will be difficult. She is the new darling of the Radical Right media machine -- and she’s backed by millions in special-interest money. But one thing I’ve learned throughout my career in service is that when the mission is this important, you have to stay focused. [**If you believe that Greene is unfit to serve -- chip in now to help me and Seth Moulton stop the radical right. A donation of $25, $50, or $100 will go such a long way in ensuring that we can defeat hatred in our communities.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41554860/329324307/2005998736?refcode=20220208_MF_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MDQ4ZGZkZS1mMDg4LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kGi0pr2hnDUGGqPgppn0bQiN2FYRYLo32Q0k4glr3yU=) Together we can accomplish great things, Marcus Flowers
[Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41554861/329324309/-238118833?refcode=20220208_MF_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MDQ4ZGZkZS1mMDg4LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kGi0pr2hnDUGGqPgppn0bQiN2FYRYLo32Q0k4glr3yU=)

body:
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001qKU4OpWFfqX1j9wZ4sO4QaqydHPuewImv_LUeuH_tT-lVuo5RDVqsFPLo_YsuexqyMzT1TwnnwAnDO1lvNY7r-97NUhnwL58Ngeo6Qw1s4ZsmmDnQy-EP2rggtaCc4Es8IkaRB1DM79NvJSD6sVOByknTIZuPD53RigPVx-P22tqmwpwlvwCfQ==&c=XL0CWSbnEsydppr6mKtj5PDM9-H5PVy-clBjmpk0r4CrQCX6ZBrpTg==&ch=koDtxqlcGIWLk6wI6nbSaNcDdC45d2T7VWbsQsaCsMyfFYt0ZdeWag==)

| Peter,

Feeling optimistic about keeping Georgia RED in November?
[Well, here's a number for you: $9.2 million. ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001qKU4OpWFfqX1j9wZ4sO4QaqydHPuewImv_LUeuH_tT-lVuo5RDVqsFPLo_YsuexqyMzT1TwnnwAnDO1lvNY7r-97NUhnwL58Ngeo6Qw1s4ZsmmDnQy-EP2rggtaCc4Es8IkaRB1DM79NvJSD6sVOByknTIZuPD53RigPVx-P22tqmwpwlvwCfQ==&c=XL0CWSbnEsydppr6mKtj5PDM9-H5PVy-clBjmpk0r4CrQCX6ZBrpTg==&ch=koDtxqlcGIWLk6wI6nbSaNcDdC45d2T7VWbsQsaCsMyfFYt0ZdeWag==)
And once more for those who are scrolling through: $9.2 million.
That number...$9.2 million...is what radical liberal Stacey Abrams raised for her gubernatorial campaign since jumping in the race two months ago.
[For those who are keeping score, she's on pace to break every fundraising record on the books in Georgia.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001qKU4OpWFfqX1j9wZ4sO4QaqydHPuewImv_LUeuH_tT-lVuo5RDVqsFPLo_YsuexqyMzT1TwnnwAnDO1lvNY7r-97NUhnwL58Ngeo6Qw1s4ZsmmDnQy-EP2rggtaCc4Es8IkaRB1DM79NvJSD6sVOByknTIZuPD53RigPVx-P22tqmwpwlvwCfQ==&c=XL0CWSbnEsydppr6mKtj5PDM9-H5PVy-clBjmpk0r4CrQCX6ZBrpTg==&ch=koDtxqlcGIWLk6wI6nbSaNcDdC45d2T7VWbsQsaCsMyfFYt0ZdeWag==)
Want even worse news? $9.2 million is what she raised for the campaign. That doesn't include her dark money network of political organizations that have been cashing checks from George Soros, Hollywood, and the coastal elites since Stacey LOST in 2018.
In short, things aren't looking good down here...and we have to do something NOW or prepare for the next 8 years of socialist rule in the Peach State.
At Stop Stacey, we have worked diligently over the past year to rally the troops and raise resources to ultimately derail Abrams' quest for power and prestige.
While proud of what we've accomplished in short order, we have to crank it up FAST.
[We are asking all patriots - in Georgia and around the country - to double down with a contribution of $50, $100, or even $500.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001qKU4OpWFfqX1j9wZ4sO4QaqydHPuewImv_LUeuH_tT-lVuo5RDVqsFPLo_YsuexqyMzT1TwnnwAnDO1lvNY7r-97NUhnwL58Ngeo6Qw1s4ZsmmDnQy-EP2rggtaCc4Es8IkaRB1DM79NvJSD6sVOByknTIZuPD53RigPVx-P22tqmwpwlvwCfQ==&c=XL0CWSbnEsydppr6mKtj5PDM9-H5PVy-clBjmpk0r4CrQCX6ZBrpTg==&ch=koDtxqlcGIWLk6wI6nbSaNcDdC45d2T7VWbsQsaCsMyfFYt0ZdeWag==)
And after you do that, encourage your friends and neighbors to do the same.
The Republican Primary is hot and competitive. The candidates can't focus on Stacey...but with your generous contribution...we can.
[So chip in HERE and then forward this email to your address book. Together, we will topple Abrams and her fundraising machine. With your help, we will Stop Stacey and Save America!](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001qKU4OpWFfqX1j9wZ4sO4QaqydHPuewImv_LUeuH_tT-lVuo5RDVqsFPLo_YsuexqyMzT1TwnnwAnDO1lvNY7r-97NUhnwL58Ngeo6Qw1s4ZsmmDnQy-EP2rggtaCc4Es8IkaRB1DM79NvJSD6sVOByknTIZuPD53RigPVx-P22tqmwpwlvwCfQ==&c=XL0CWSbnEsydppr6mKtj5PDM9-H5PVy-clBjmpk0r4CrQCX6ZBrpTg==&ch=koDtxqlcGIWLk6wI6nbSaNcDdC45d2T7VWbsQsaCsMyfFYt0ZdeWag==)
Best,
Jeremy Brand Stop Stacey, Inc.

Floridians are struggling to find basic shelter — to keep a roof over their heads — and politicians like Ron DeSantis have done nothing to help them. Of course, they’ll swear up and down that they care about this crisis — that they’re taking it seriously and working to help Florida families afford housing. **And while they pay lip service to Florida’s working families, they’re hoping like hell that we’ll overlook the truth: that they’re the ones who caused this crisis in the first place:** **** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41556530/329331112/-1468176026?refcode=affordability&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82OTQxOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MmM1ODI0NS1mMzg4LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RK6FB63-VDbHGArh66UoZCdFaX5YJAxpbBMjYoAmONY=) **_But we won’t let them get away with that, right Peter? _** For decades, GOP governors have gutted funding for affordable housing. Will you pitch in any amount to help us keep the Senate Majority and defeat Ron Johnson? = Paid for by Lasry for Wisconsin Stay connected with Alex's campaign to defeat Ron Johnson: Lasry for Wisconsin P.O. Box 511549 Milwaukee, WI 53203 United States It's going to take everyone on this team to win this election, but if you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please . If you'd like to stay on our list but receive fewer emails, fill out **.

name: Senator John Kennedy
subject: Like giving whiskey and car keys to a 16-year-old
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Kennedy for Us
body:
[View this message in your browser](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zpc40jfgn7s843v5la88177ukc53mpmeg5c0llu8_rp22sh2s8i66ob1cpj62oj5cph238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpqedtge1p7adjkm4qj7cbkmgor79hnmmrq8cjm62qb6t9nkjhf4onhmuqm1oj2eopmfd9mc4or3d74cpq7eppiejg7cdhk65om1o9gejhjdc77mcr61puie1p64pjgm9j71p5jcdjr4d3661pb6oj7maqmcc3gm9j61o5lcdge1d9h66qj3dbi4no)
Joe Biden has got a mess on his plate

| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z8jkk6csq5e36jslsmve83d45vidpksbnlgvb32g_rp22sh2s8i66ob1cpj62oj5cph2bs)
---

Folks,

**If it wasn’t bad enough, it's about to get a lot worse.**

Joe Biden has dealt the American people a bad hand. I’m not a great poker player, so believe me, I know a bad hand when I see one.

Rising inflation. A continuing border crisis. A shortage of workers for our businesses. Kids STILL can’t go back to school full time. **[Where does it end?](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zr36ul3lc7l1avpm2ja1nqhnbvkbsnv45fk5l8so_rp22sh2s8i66ob1cpj62oj5cph2bs)**

**These are just a few of the many crises that Joe Biden has caused, and it doesn't look like he intends on fixing them anytime soon.**

I’m asking for your support to deal with these issues our country is facing. If there's one thing I’ve learned from working in D.C., it’s that you can’t depend on Democrats to fix their own mess. **_That’s why I’m counting on you to help me clean up Joe’s mess._**
| | [$25 To Clean-up Joe’s Mess](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zaecmvgo50lkh6erqg1gdvf3mkfpbcu5v78v5doo_rp22sh2s8i66ob1cpj62oj5cph2bs)
---
| [$50 To Clean-up Joe’s Mess](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zb3j2r2sksst49u7u8oujftoh2jipfpvdtgt4kuo_rp22sh2s8i66ob1cpj62oj5cph2bs)
---
| [$100 To Clean-up Joe’s Mess](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2ze7os7tann2n2tq5ef6mjrm6t0gr5r8rpvgr5vao_rp22sh2s8i66ob1cpj62oj5cph2bs)
---
| [$250 To Clean-up Joe’s Mess](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z29tp4in28aiknhedalit38otb8gtehd1fl31f58_rp22sh2s8i66ob1cpj62oj5cph2bs)
---
| [$500 To Clean-up Joe’s Mess](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zqn24bkgnmthktkh4krlhepo6cvh5u1mlf82bs40_rp22sh2s8i66ob1cpj62oj5cph2bs)
---

**I know it seems like there’s a lot of chaos right now. But with the right leadership, we can solve these issues and get America back on track.**

God Bless,

[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z3f88qdk4k2beemecv54rvrhhct78ist2022khdg_rp22sh2s8i66ob1cpj62oj5cph2bs)
Senator Kennedy

subject: There's still time to endorse my campaign, friend.

body:
|

Friend,

It's been a busy couple of weeks on the campaign trail here in NC-14. We're officially in an election year, so we've been ramping up our outreach efforts.

I'm so proud that I've been able to run an issues-focused campaign centered on the needs of Western North Carolina. We're not shying away from tough conversations, and we won't write off anyone because they're “too conservative” or disillusioned with the process.

**That's the difference between me and guys like Madison Cawthorn. For them, winning means dividing our community and riling up the extreme-right of their party. For us, winning means uniting our community so we can get back to work for Western North Carolina families.**

**[I have a special request today: Will you add your name to say you personally endorse my campaign for Congress? Now that we are entering the next phase of our campaign, we're hoping to lock in 500 grassroots endorsers to kick off the election year with strength.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41558351/329338929/1791157811?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDg3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNjVlZDhiMy1mNjg4LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gtJZI5jcC_RnNz1wgx6wM9ugJK4W7rjVRgr1yt7n6m8=&emci=64129f6a-f588-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=f65ed8b3-f688-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=18459276)**

Eric Gash **[Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41558355/329338949/1573964380?refcode=em-2.8.22-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDg3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNjVlZDhiMy1mNjg4LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gtJZI5jcC_RnNz1wgx6wM9ugJK4W7rjVRgr1yt7n6m8=)**

name: Mike Gibbons
subject: BREAKING: Rand Paul endorses Mike Gibbons
body:
I am proud to accept Rand Paul’s endorsement for my Senate campaign. America’s economy is struggling. Inflation is eroding the middle class. Instead of solving the problem, Democrats are wasting your money
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001jEhxlDwMpUh0PSg1OKsNocHZdaKUOuu1mjAvSHMdOWK9Q-Osd90hB7tmf4UMj-6hDZrtbm6QTJtVKQCa9VkQKhpkaZZh1g5JYo0slM1VwzMDl2Kt24OGBu8qMIGoXNLjQGfzedzwEm4dG09OdU6tsLy2AFP68IyF78Ad6-mShvC61bxu7s_zBw==&c=4vUCahN5VexuTUZbV08meYJjoDzLnhSOiM16I8baR7mgR_YpW0wxeQ==&ch=YCZUDXrl6nQyeCSm6-1NW1Pfjsq9cSFGT1J6_44ti7A8WAfdlGM9mA==)
---
| Peter,
I am proud to accept Rand Paul's endorsement for my Senate campaign.
America's economy is struggling. Inflation is eroding the middle class. Instead of solving the problem, Democrats are wasting your money, killing the filibuster, and pushing for a radical federal takeover of our elections.
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001jEhxlDwMpUh0PSg1OKsNocHZdaKUOuu1mjAvSHMdOWK9Q-Osd90hB7tmf4UMj-6hDZrtbm6QTJtVKQCa9VkQKhpkaZZh1g5JYo0slM1VwzMDl2Kt24OGBu8qMIGoXNLjQGfzedzwEm4dG09OdU6tsLy2AFP68IyF78Ad6-mShvC61bxu7s_zBw==&c=4vUCahN5VexuTUZbV08meYJjoDzLnhSOiM16I8baR7mgR_YpW0wxeQ==&ch=YCZUDXrl6nQyeCSm6-1NW1Pfjsq9cSFGT1J6_44ti7A8WAfdlGM9mA==)
---
| [Click here to join Rand Paul in supporting Mike Gibbons >>>](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001jEhxlDwMpUh0PSg1OKsNocHZdaKUOuu1mjAvSHMdOWK9Q-Osd90hB7tmf4UMj-6hDZrtbm6QTJtVKQCa9VkQKhpkaZZh1g5JYo0slM1VwzMDl2Kt24OGBu8qMIGoXNLjQGfzedzwEm4dG09OdU6tsLy2AFP68IyF78Ad6-mShvC61bxu7s_zBw==&c=4vUCahN5VexuTUZbV08meYJjoDzLnhSOiM16I8baR7mgR_YpW0wxeQ==&ch=YCZUDXrl6nQyeCSm6-1NW1Pfjsq9cSFGT1J6_44ti7A8WAfdlGM9mA==)
With Rand Paul behind me, we can take on the Washington machine. I will take on tyrants in government like Anthony Fauci and Chuck Schumer.
Rand knows that I mean what I say and that I'm not a politician. I'm a businessman and Washington outsider. Here are the reasons he stands with me:

* I am a Constitutional Conservative, and I will always fight for our Second Amendment rights.
* I'm 100% pro-life, and I believe that we must protect all life.
* I support controlling our borders and I believe we must continue to build the wall started under President Trump.
* I will stand up for election Integrity -starting with voter ID and ending ballot harvesting

Peter, Rand endorsed me because he knows this is the most important race in the country. Can you join Rand Paul today in supporting my campaign?

name: Kimeka
subject: My student loan story.
body:
Sign our petition for federal student loan cancellation.

| | Dear Friend, **My name is Kimeka and I’m a health center director and activist in Harrisburg, PA. I’m also a student loan borrower and I’m here to tell you my story.** **I graduated with my doctorate in 2014 from Penn State, ready to make a difference in my field and contribute to my community as a public servant.** However, with over $200,000 in student loans, I felt limited in what I could accomplish in my community. **It felt impossible to pay down on a loan that I’d never see gone in a lifetime.** Before the student loan payment pause, my monthly payments were equivalent to that of a mortgage. I felt like I could never get a breath of relief. **During the pandemic and the payment pause, I’ve been able to get my footing and build some savings for the future.** Most of the money I’d saved during the pause has been put back into my nonprofit, which works to empower professionals of color within the community. This work, my passion, is the reason I’m fighting for student loan cancellation. Stopping loan payments will allow us to contribute directly to the economy and give back to our local communities. **I believe canceling student debt would create happier workers and encourage others to work in public service.** Without the benefit of loan forgiveness, which is offered in some private-sector jobs, people are discouraged from engaging in work that could make a greater impact. Canceling student debt could make tangible, meaningful change in our communities. Roughly 85 percent of Black bachelor’s degree recipients currently hold student loan debt. Building generational wealth in Black families has been explicitly halted by racist policies stemming from slavery through Jim Crow to mass incarceration. **Student debt prevents Black Americans from achieving financial freedom and continuously chips away at our quality of life.** **The unsurprising, sickening truth of the matter is that Black students have been forced to take on more loans with relatively less means to pay off their debt, and the vicious cycle continues. ** The facts of structural discrimination in student loan borrowing are clear. Student debt cancellation is undoubtedly a racial justice issue that NextGen America is continuing to fight for. **I urge you to join our cause.** [**Add your name: Sign our petition that urges President Biden to quickly take executive action and eliminate all federal student loan debt.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/41558828/329342535/-110804149?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNzBmNzkyNy1mODg4LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UiJwOcrOO3G2d5ituoI_FZYHnFEhTvRJmhakUhyddwM=&emci=af56c3e6-3e88-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=f70f7927-f888-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=6787172) | [Sign petition](https://click.everyaction.com/k/41558838/329342556/-1441617255?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNzBmNzkyNy1mODg4LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UiJwOcrOO3G2d5ituoI_FZYHnFEhTvRJmhakUhyddwM=&emci=af56c3e6-3e88-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=f70f7927-f888-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=6787172 "CTA Button")

Kimeka

Hi everyone,

**As a former Democratic nominee in NY-01, I'm proud to be endorsing Kara Hahn today.**

I’ve been working to flip NY-01 for the better part of the last five years, and I can honestly tell you we're about as close as we've ever been to doing just that. Still, I know how much work lies ahead in order to build a winning campaign, and Kara needs our support now in order to compete and win. Kara's progressive values are the closest to my own and represent our best option to win this seat. The fate of the House majority and, in turn, our Democracy are depending on it.

With its new district lines, Long Island's 1st district is now one of just a small number of Republican-held districts that Biden won in 2020. That makes this a __must win__ for Democrats in order to hold the House in 2022 and keep extreme Republicans like Kevin McCarthy and Marjorie Taylor Greene from taking over.

**[I know Kara personally, and I can tell you she's _never_ lost an election because voters know they can count on her to put our interests first. And her vision for the future is the best choice among the candidates in the Democratic primary. **Even with a bluer 1st district and without Lee Zeldin on the ballot, this is going to be a very tough election.**

Perry Gershon
NY-01 2018 Democratic Nominee
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41559281/329344736/-2026774271?refcode=em22_220208_perryendo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNDYxYThlMC1mODg4LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=p4iGjdmcjo3XZvtFMaHyDIxNUfzbzaKsf7AG35n4p10=)

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: I'm counting on you, friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH |
body:
My focus continues to be fighting for families like yours.
| | |
---
Friend,
I'd prefer not to send you emails asking for money. My focus continues to be fighting for families like yours.
However, my finance team is telling me we're in a bit of a sticky spot. We have a significant gap in our fundraising, and we need to raise $9,157 by midnight tonight. **That's bad under normal circumstances, but with the GOP spending more against me than any other Senate Democrat in the country, it is the absolute worst time for our numbers to lag.**
As I said, asking for money is one of my least favorite things to do, but **Mitch McConnell and Republicans across the country have spent over $7 million to unseat me.** And if I miss this goal, it will invite even more dark money in New Hampshire. In a purple state like New Hampshire, that could be the difference between winning or losing.
That's why I need your help to get us out of this rut, friend. **[Will you please donate what you can right now to help close our fundraising gap and protect this seat – and the Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41559359/329345174/-947982778?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk656-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YzM1ODVkYS1mODg4LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mkMCWEn752XNiG5NZA_mqt4ePCpIUpSDk-Xgb5EbzCg=)**

My Senate race was the closest one on the map in 2016. The only way we'll win in November is if we have the resources we need to reach every voter and push back against the GOP's misleading attack ads.
I know it's easy to think that a grassroots donation won't make a dent. But I'm counting on grassroots supporters like you to power our campaign, and your $5 makes a huge difference.

However, my finance team is telling me we're in a bit of a sticky spot. We have a significant gap in our fundraising, and we need to raise $9,157 by midnight tonight. That's bad under normal circumstances, but with the GOP spending more against me than any other Senate Democrat in the country, it is the absolute worst time for our numbers to lag. As I said, asking for money is one of my least favorite things to do, but Mitch McConnell and Republicans across the country have spent over $7 million to unseat me. And if I miss this goal, it will invite even more dark money in New Hampshire. In a purple state like New Hampshire, that could be the difference between winning or losing. name: Team Cammack
subject: Biden is weakening America at home and abroad
body:
Other countries think they can walk all over us with no consequences.
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001d0NCdE5xqYua4pSfc0OUJYBetoq8hIOS-6dpZ9tml6Fya4J_JIca0Mlb0ioSUPRoR35StS5fXMXPJsE9n1b2zx6fgF3c9hOCBE8cdMkKwIdibtCk-FQU_kLY4JMAFSLyKth4Qfa9DYaztD6CchXOardVp9e9PoI6-AykP1ew6BITSIjHHsudFBdN3-ARNaKLLZ9f9UFxXvdQxozBj7N33AKMPZs8mqvF&c=-nImr4KDnganlEEB8wPu8XJr5N71aJ1_pu4fIOcr7r6txvXNBZ9hWA==&ch=HiN0zjt_nErEqR30V9s4mvfBUOQDOWJc0uV6J2Zd7PBDnoj12I5CrQ==)
---
| Friend,
Other countries think they can walk all over us with no consequences. While all eyes turn to Ukraine, our homeland is being ravaged and invaded by millions of illegal migrants.
Despite this, Biden uses American tax dollars to combat "climate change" with Xi Jinping. On just about every issue, Biden's incompetence and ineptitude make America look weak, so other countries take advantage of it.
As a member of the Homeland Security Committee, national security is a top priority for Kat. Regardless of politics, ALL American leaders should be taking these events far more seriously.
---
| | | [KEEP OUR COMMUNITIES SAFE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001d0NCdE5xqYua4pSfc0OUJYBetoq8hIOS-6dpZ9tml6Fya4J_JIca0Mlb0ioSUPRoR35StS5fXMXPJsE9n1b2zx6fgF3c9hOCBE8cdMkKwIdibtCk-FQU_kLY4JMAFSLyKth4Qfa9DYaztD6CchXOardVp9e9PoI6-AykP1ew6BITSIjHHsudFBdN3-ARNaKLLZ9f9UFxXvdQxozBj7N33AKMPZs8mqvF&c=-nImr4KDnganlEEB8wPu8XJr5N71aJ1_pu4fIOcr7r6txvXNBZ9hWA==&ch=HiN0zjt_nErEqR30V9s4mvfBUOQDOWJc0uV6J2Zd7PBDnoj12I5CrQ==)
---
| America is less safe today than it was under America First leadership. Back then, our enemies didn't dare slight or challenge us on the world stage because we exemplified strength and grit.
Biden has neither of these American qualities. He is far more preoccupied with vacationing in Delaware than our national security.
---
| | | [FIGHT FOR A STRONGER AMERICA](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001d0NCdE5xqYua4pSfc0OUJYBetoq8hIOS-6dpZ9tml6Fya4J_JIca0Mlb0ioSUPRoR35StS5fXMXPJsE9n1b2zx6fgF3c9hOCBE8cdMkKwIdibtCk-FQU_kLY4JMAFSLyKth4Qfa9DYaztD6CchXOardVp9e9PoI6-AykP1ew6BITSIjHHsudFBdN3-ARNaKLLZ9f9UFxXvdQxozBj7N33AKMPZs8mqvF&c=-nImr4KDnganlEEB8wPu8XJr5N71aJ1_pu4fIOcr7r6txvXNBZ9hWA==&ch=HiN0zjt_nErEqR30V9s4mvfBUOQDOWJc0uV6J2Zd7PBDnoj12I5CrQ==)
---
| We can't reclaim America's rightful place as leader of the free world until we reclaim the House of Representatives. [With your support, Kat can continue fighting for a safer America and help reclaim the majority.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001d0NCdE5xqYua4pSfc0OUJYBetoq8hIOS-6dpZ9tml6Fya4J_JIca0Mlb0ioSUPRoR35StS5fXMXPJsE9n1b2zx6fgF3c9hOCBE8cdMkKwIdibtCk-FQU_kLY4JMAFSLyKth4Qfa9DYaztD6CchXOardVp9e9PoI6-AykP1ew6BITSIjHHsudFBdN3-ARNaKLLZ9f9UFxXvdQxozBj7N33AKMPZs8mqvF&c=-nImr4KDnganlEEB8wPu8XJr5N71aJ1_pu4fIOcr7r6txvXNBZ9hWA==&ch=HiN0zjt_nErEqR30V9s4mvfBUOQDOWJc0uV6J2Zd7PBDnoj12I5CrQ==)
---
| | | [TAKE BACK THE HOUSE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001d0NCdE5xqYua4pSfc0OUJYBetoq8hIOS-6dpZ9tml6Fya4J_JIca0Mlb0ioSUPRoR35StS5fXMXPJsE9n1b2zx6fgF3c9hOCBE8cdMkKwIdibtCk-FQU_kLY4JMAFSLyKth4Qfa9DYaztD6CchXOardVp9e9PoI6-AykP1ew6BITSIjHHsudFBdN3-ARNaKLLZ9f9UFxXvdQxozBj7N33AKMPZs8mqvF&c=-nImr4KDnganlEEB8wPu8XJr5N71aJ1_pu4fIOcr7r6txvXNBZ9hWA==&ch=HiN0zjt_nErEqR30V9s4mvfBUOQDOWJc0uV6J2Zd7PBDnoj12I5CrQ==)
---
| Thanks for your support,
Team Cammack

For over 20 years, the Harvard Public Opinion Project has provided the most comprehensive look at the political opinions, voting trends, and views on public service held by young Americans. A [**Fall 2021 survey**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41561541/329355386/664617513?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYzk3MjExMC0wMDg5LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=htqOajlsnDrqqSUAuJMILJpiF7VHF8RgnYuP6P0bcZ0=&emci=33fc2b72-fd88-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=cc972110-0089-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=15167427) of 2,109 young Americans between 18- and 29-years-old, includes young Americans’ concerns on their mental health, COVID-19, climate change, and foreign policy. The results are alarming. This needs our urgent attention.
* Only 7% of young Americans view the United States as a “healthy democracy”; 27% described the nation as a “somewhat functioning democracy,” 39% a “democracy in trouble,” and 13% went so far as to declare the nation a “failed democracy.”
* Young Americans place the chances that they will see a second civil war in their lifetime at 35%; chances that at least one state secedes at 25%.
* More than half of young Americans believe the Federal government is not doing enough to address climate change. A majority (56%) of young Americans expect climate change to impact their future decisions – and nearly half (45%) already see its local effects.
* More than half (51%) of young Americans report having felt down, depressed, and hopeless – and 25% have had thoughts of self-harm – at least several times in the last two weeks.
* **_By a margin of more than two-to-one, young Americans value compromise over confrontation._**
* Less than one-third believe that “America is the greatest country in the world”.
* Strengthening the economy, uniting the country, and improving healthcare are the keys to a successful presidency in the eyes of young Americans.
* Other top issues include:

* * Addressing climate change.
* Reducing economic inequality.
* Improving our public education system.
* Ensuring social justice.
* Improving America’s standing on the international stage

As a Democratic candidate for Congress, we need this to change. We need our youth to believe in our future and trust our government and its leaders. I will work hard to make this a reality. There are fundamental differences when I compare our campaign, vision, and policies to Jack Bergman’s.
* We believe it is possible to unite our country while strengthening our economy.
* We believe improving our health and education system is fundamental, and that is why I support social programs making their way through Congress.
* We believe it is possible to represent all members of Northern Michigan and the Upper Peninsula by compromise rather than confrontation.
* We believe we can mitigate the ravages of climate change to give our children a brighter future.
* We will strive to be the greatest country in the world – including recognizing our deficits, learning from them, and addressing them to strengthen and grow.
* We can stand tall on the international stage by showing our compassion and principles, not just our military strength.

Last year, according to the Marquette Mining Journal, Jack Bergman expressed special concern about 18-year-olds, who in his mind have no concept of civics, American history, and constitutional government.” “Our middle schools and high schools do not teach American history,” [**he said**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41561542/329355387/-704656780?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYzk3MjExMC0wMDg5LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=htqOajlsnDrqqSUAuJMILJpiF7VHF8RgnYuP6P0bcZ0=&emci=33fc2b72-fd88-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=cc972110-0089-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=15167427). He called the situation “disturbing.” **Where Jack sees deficient youth, I see deficient leadership.** So often we hear “our youth are our future,” but the reality is, our youth are our now. We **_all_** can have an immediate impact on shaping democracy, and all generations deserve leadership they can trust. When dishonesty is the norm in politics, how are we to blame them for becoming disengaged? We have let them down and now is the time for a change. I would be honored to have the support of all generations of this great district, so I can advance policies that give young people hope. Thank you, friends. Hope everything in your neck of the woods is going well. – Dr. Bob Lorinser [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41561543/329355388/1277889215?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYzk3MjExMC0wMDg5LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=htqOajlsnDrqqSUAuJMILJpiF7VHF8RgnYuP6P0bcZ0=) # # # If you’re interested in getting involved with Dr. Bob Lorinser's grassroots campaign, let’s build a movement together. Register for Dr. Bob's fellowship program or sign up for volunteer opportunities. [**JOIN OUR FELLOWSHIP PROGRAM**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41561544/329355389/381894659?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYzk3MjExMC0wMDg5LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=htqOajlsnDrqqSUAuJMILJpiF7VHF8RgnYuP6P0bcZ0=&emci=33fc2b72-fd88-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=cc972110-0089-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=15167427) [**SIGN UP TO VOLUNTEER**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41561545/329355390/-232506344?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYzk3MjExMC0wMDg5LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=htqOajlsnDrqqSUAuJMILJpiF7VHF8RgnYuP6P0bcZ0=&emci=33fc2b72-fd88-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=cc972110-0089-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=15167427) While we work to prove how we can positively influence the government for the benefit of young people in Northern Michigan and the U.P., it’s important to register to vote. More than half of young Americans believe the Federal government is not doing enough to address climate change. A majority (56%) of young Americans expect climate change to impact their future decisions – and nearly half (45%) already see its local effects. More than half (51%) of young Americans report having felt down, depressed, and hopeless – and 25% have had thoughts of self-harm – at least several times in the last two weeks. By a margin of more than two-to-one, young Americans value compromise over confrontation. Less than one-third believe that “America is the greatest country in the world”. Strengthening the economy, uniting the country, and improving healthcare are the keys to a successful presidency in the eyes of young Americans. Other top issues include: Addressing climate change. Reducing economic inequality. Improving our public education system. Ensuring social justice. Improving America’s standing on the international stage As a Democratic candidate for Congress, we need this to change. We need our youth to believe in our future and trust our government and its leaders. I will work hard to make this a reality. There are fundamental differences when I compare our campaign, vision, and policies to Jack Bergman’s. We believe it is possible to unite our country while strengthening our economy. We believe improving our health and education system is fundamental, and that is why I support social programs making their way through Congress. We believe it is possible to represent all members of Northern Michigan and the Upper Peninsula by compromise rather than confrontation. We believe we can mitigate the ravages of climate change to give our children a brighter future. We will strive to be the greatest country in the world – including recognizing our deficits, learning from them, and addressing them to strengthen and grow. We can stand tall on the international stage by showing our compassion and principles, not just our military strength. Last year, according to the Marquette Mining Journal, Jack Bergman expressed special concern about 18-year-olds, who in his mind have no concept of civics, American history, and constitutional government.” “Our middle schools and high schools do not teach American history,” . He called the situation “disturbing.” Where Jack sees deficient youth, I see deficient leadership. So often we hear “our youth are our future,” but the reality is, our youth are our now. We all can have an immediate impact on shaping democracy, and all generations deserve leadership they can trust. When dishonesty is the norm in politics, how are we to blame them for becoming disengaged? We have let them down and now is the time for a change. I would be honored to have the support of all generations of this great district, so I can advance policies that give young people hope. Thank you, friends. Hope everything in your neck of the woods is going well. – Dr. Bob Lorinser = # # # If you’re interested in getting involved with Dr. Bob Lorinser's grassroots campaign, let’s build a movement together. Register for Dr. Bob's fellowship program or sign up for volunteer opportunities. While we work to prove how we can positively influence the government for the benefit of young people in Northern Michigan and the U.P., it’s important to register to vote. College students can register in the precinct in which they live while attending school. = = = You may . PAID FOR BY THE FRIENDS OF DR. BOB LORINSER FRIENDS OF DR. BOB PO BOX 936 Marquette, MI 49855 United States

name: Peter Franchot

body:

I am very excited to announce that former State Senator and former Secretary of Aging Gloria Lawlah has endorsed my campaign for Governor.
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/Individual_GloriaLawlah_1200x1200.png]As one of Prince George’s County’s most treasured public servants, Gloria has dedicated her career towards serving the state that she loves. I am truly honored to have received the endorsement of such a long-standing, trailblazing leader.
Gloria, thank you for your trust and your friendship. As Governor, I’ll work hand-in-hand with leaders from around the state to lift all of our communities into the high quality of life that they deserve.
This latest endorsement announcement is a major moment for our campaign. Will you help spread the word by sharing with your friends on social media?

Thank you,

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Haley Stevens for Congress
body:
|
---
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41562104/329357893/-1653583832?refcode=ste_headerlogo&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODA3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMDgzYTQ4ZS0wMDg5LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UwY7_ipZhi6bfQDQbRtGHAC4qnI2mtlEOm6Qunnm6t8=)

| | Folks, Haley was on Lawrence O’Donnell’s show to discuss Michigan Republicans’ plans to carry guns to the polls. Yep, you read that correctly. This is nothing short of a dangerous and blatant attempt at voter intimidation and a direct threat to our nation’s democracy. Imagine turning on the news to learn that an armed mob is flooding your polling place because they were simply following marching orders all the way from the twice-impeached former president down to Michigan’s Republican candidate for governor. Let’s be clear: January 6th wasn’t a wake-up call for us in Michigan. We already had dress rehearsals in Lansing when an armed mob swarmed the capitol in protest of stay-at-home orders. That’s why Haley is taking this so seriously and calling the GOP out for what they are – anti-democratic. Haley is running for re-election in MI-11 to stand up against the GOP and their unhinged agendas. She is fighting to protect voting rights and enforce gun safety measures, but she’s being targeted every step of the way. [**Winning re-election won’t be easy. Haley must continue connecting with voters across MI-11, and she needs the resources to keep up. clean_body: | = | | Folks, Haley was on Lawrence O’Donnell’s show to discuss Michigan Republicans’ plans to carry guns to the polls. Yep, you read that correctly. This is nothing short of a dangerous and blatant attempt at voter intimidation and a direct threat to our nation’s democracy. Imagine turning on the news to learn that an armed mob is flooding your polling place because they were simply following marching orders all the way from the twice-impeached former president down to Michigan’s Republican candidate for governor. Let’s be clear: January 6th wasn’t a wake-up call for us in Michigan. We already had dress rehearsals in Lansing when an armed mob swarmed the capitol in protest of stay-at-home orders. That’s why Haley is taking this so seriously and calling the GOP out for what they are – anti-democratic. Haley is running for re-election in MI-11 to stand up against the GOP and their unhinged agendas. She is fighting to protect voting rights and enforce gun safety measures, but she’s being targeted every step of the way. = | | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = At a time when our democracy is threatened and gun violence continues to soar, we’re counting on your support. – Jeremy Jeremy Levinson Campaign Manager, Team Haley | | = | If you'd like to support Haley Stevens for Congress, you can = We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: Let’s discuss what’s “Inappropriate”
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GREENE FOR CONGRESS INC
body:
[](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/59485515:6tJ7KfENH:m:1:3103520637:5FB9163CC52CFBB06D19A70C37BEA018:r "Tweet") Peter, When President Trump spoke about pardoning some J6 defendants, it was a reasoned response to the over-prosecution, and frankly persecution, of non-violent protestors caught up in the events of that day. It makes sense to people like you and me, but not to RINO Lindsey Graham, who had the audacity to call Trump's words **" inappropriate."** Let me tell you what's "inappropriate," Sen. Graham - RINOs like you and Liz Cheney kowtowing to Pelosi and the liberal' witch hunt against defenders of our freedoms! **[Help me fight back against the RINO's assault on J6 protestors and save our Republic with your generous donation of $25 or $50 today!](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/59485515:6tJ7KfENH:m:1:3103520637:5FB9163CC52CFBB06D19A70C37BEA018:r "Help
me fight back against the RINO’s assault on J6 protestors and save our Republic with your generous donation of $25 or $50 today!")** You know what, let's talk about what else is inappropriate. [](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/59485515:6tJ7KfENH:m:1:3103520637:5FB9163CC52CFBB06D19A70C37BEA018:r "Video")Not knowing exactly what information Pelosi had about J6 and why she didn't call in extra security even though she was warned of potential violence? **That 's inappropriate.** J6 defendants being treated worse than the BLM/Antifa members who literally burned down cities and attacked police officers? **That 's inappropriate.** "Hands off my body" is okay when murdering an innocent child in the womb, but verboten when it comes to unproven vaccines? **That 's inappropriate.** **[This is what I'm fighting against in the Swamp... Hypocrites in my own party doing the dirty work of Biden and Pelosi. Help me fight back against these unjust attacks by chipping in $50, $100, $250, or whatever you can afford today.](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/59485515:6tJ7KfENH:m:1:3103520637:5FB9163CC52CFBB06D19A70C37BEA018:r "This is what I’m fighting against in the Swamp...
Hypocrites in my own party doing the dirty work of Biden and Pelosi. Help me fight back against these unjust attacks by chipping in $50, $100, $250,
or whatever you can afford today.")** [](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/59485515:6tJ7KfENH:m:1:3103520637:5FB9163CC52CFBB06D19A70C37BEA018:r "RINO")I'm being attacked on all fronts for simply following President Trump's example and pushing for equal treatment under the law for the non-violent J6 protestors. **Talk about "inappropriate!"** But I'm undeterred. I refuse to let RINOs like Lindsey Graham or Liz Cheney be the arbiter of what's inappropriate. The Bible and the Constitution are the two things that guide me on what is appropriate or not. It's what's guided me in life, in Congress, and it scares the living daylights out of turncoats like Lindsey and Liz. That's why the Deep State establishment and leftist media are doing everything they can to stop me. They made my district more blue. They've even got a fellow RINO to challenge me in the GOP primary. **That 's why my team has set a fundraising goal of $42,781.53 that I need to raise by midnight tonight** to defend my seat from the RINOs determined to silence people like me who speak the truth! **[I need you to dig deep and help me fight for the heart and soul of our country. Whether it's $25, the federal maximum donation of $2,900, or any amount in between, I need your support today.](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/59485515:6tJ7KfENH:m:1:3103520637:5FB9163CC52CFBB06D19A70C37BEA018:r "I need you to dig deep and help me fight for the heart and soul
of our country. Whether it’s $25, the federal maximum donation of $2,900, or any amount in between, I need your support today.")** It's time to stop the inappropriate RINOs from doing the dirty work for the Left, and with your help, we can show them that America First is never inappropriate! **[Donate today.](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/59485515:6tJ7KfENH:m:1:3103520637:5FB9163CC52CFBB06D19A70C37BEA018:r "Donate today.")** Thank you. God Bless America. [](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/59485515:6tJ7KfENH:m:1:3103520637:5FB9163CC52CFBB06D19A70C37BEA018:r "Marjorie Taylor Greene")
Marjorie Taylor Greene
Congresswoman (R-GA)

name: Wesley Hunt
subject: Houston is now the Most Dangerous City in America
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress
body:
Friend,
Houston used to be referred to as the Energy Capital of the World or as Space
City, but after a record number of murders last month, Houston might now be
known as the Most Dangerous City in America. 48 Houstonians were murdered last
month, which is more than in Los Angeles, New York City, and ties us with the
city of Chicago. Among those 48 killed was a Houston Police Officer who was
murdered just a few weeks ago by an illegal immigrant who crossed our wide-open
southern border. This out-of-control violence must stop!

Houston is the city I grew up in. My family lives here. My two daughters,
Olivia and Victoria, were born here. This is NOT the Houston that raised me
and this is NOT the Houston I want my two daughters to grow up in. Enough is
enough. Mayor Turner, Judge Hidalgo, and every single elected official that
presides over Harris County must fully commit to funding our law enforcement,
eliminating revolving door PR Bonds, and fulfill their duties to keep our city
safe.

Furthermore, the Biden Administration must be held accountable for their gross
negligence in handling the southern border crisis. Some of the crime we’re
seeing is a direct result of open border policies which have allowed over two
million to cross into our country illegally.

I am proud to have the endorsement of the Houston Police Officers Union and
the Texas Fraternal Order of Police. When elected to Congress, keeping Houston
safe will be one of my top priorities. We must give law enforcement all the
tools and support they need to do their job and we must secure the border!

Sincerely,
Wesley

Paid for by Hunt for Congress. Military images and information do not imply
endorsement by DOD [Department of Defense] or any service branch.

clean_body: Peter, they need your help TONIGHT | | | Peter: We’re reaching out with a CRITICAL update from Rep. Adam Schiff and Democrat Abby Finkenauer about the must-win race against Sen. Chuck Grassley (R) in Iowa. = If Abby flips this seat blue, then Democrats will be virtually GUARANTEED to maintain Senate control! = | Sen. Grassley has never been more vulnerable, Peter: Polling shows 64% of likely Iowa voters DON'T want to reelect him, and he's facing RECORD-LOW approval ratings! Top Democrats like Congressman Schiff know that this is our best chance in decades to flip this seat blue. But with our Senate majority on the line and the GOP Senate campaign arm sitting on a war chest of more than $32 MILLION to stop challengers like Abby, the ONLY way we will win is if grassroots donors like you rush a contribution TONIGHT. That's why we’re counting on your $5 donation by 11:59 p.m. tonight so we can hit our $10,000 goal, stay on track to compete with GOP spending and counter attacks against Abby. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. | Floridians inspire us here at DeSantis HQ every single day, Peter. Their acts of service to their communities are well-known throughout the country, and we have A LOT to be proud of here in the Sunshine State. Recently, Governor DeSantis announced a bold proposal to re-establish the Florida State Guard, an organization built on tradition, public safety and pride in our great state. In recognition of his leadership to protect communities across the state, we're rolling out brand new merchandise celebrating Florida featuring the motto: "Let Us Alone."

As a Senator, I will always promote legislation that protects women's rights and that offers common sense solutions... This is not rocket science!

body:
This represents so much of why having Stefanik in Congress is dangerous.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41563410/329364286/-852028741?refcode=BLU-PUT-20220208-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTEwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjODQ0MTBiZC0wNDg5LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SVctOL3Z3DeHGUVUvNwdMB5eZAxFDRAefR4HqYhWWjo=)
---
| Throughout my time traveling across NY-21, I’ve learned so much about how our government can be better serving our community, and the common thread I heard was **sincere disappointment in Elise Stefanik’s performance in Congress.**

It’s clear that folks are [_**fed up with her antics**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41563412/329364287/-852028741?refcode=BLU-PUT-20220208-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTEwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjODQ0MTBiZC0wNDg5LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SVctOL3Z3DeHGUVUvNwdMB5eZAxFDRAefR4HqYhWWjo=). Check out this excerpt from a recent local Letter to the Editor:
---
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41563415/329364289/-852028741?refcode=BLU-PUT-20220208-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTEwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjODQ0MTBiZC0wNDg5LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SVctOL3Z3DeHGUVUvNwdMB5eZAxFDRAefR4HqYhWWjo=) **“Stefanik is literally out to lunch — unmasked at Donald Trump’s event when she warmly politicked with him in sunny Florida. When I called her office to find out whether she was vaccinated, they didn’t know. Every major bill that Biden has proposed to end the pandemic, she has opposed. She has done zero to get us out of the COVID crisis (OK: Once, for political cover, she spoke in favor of vaccinations, on July 20).”**
---
This represents so much of why having Stefanik in Congress is dangerous – **she’ll do whatever it takes, even putting us in harm’s way, to appeal to her radical base.**

clean_body: This represents so much of why having Stefanik in Congress is dangerous. | = | Throughout my time traveling across NY-21, I’ve learned so much about how our government can be better serving our community, and the common thread I heard was sincere disappointment in Elise Stefanik’s performance in Congress. It’s clear that folks are =. Check out this excerpt from a recent local Letter to the Editor: | | = “Stefanik is literally out to lunch — unmasked at Donald Trump’s event when she warmly politicked with him in sunny Florida. When I called her office to find out whether she was vaccinated, they didn’t know. Every major bill that Biden has proposed to end the pandemic, she has opposed. She has done zero to get us out of the COVID crisis (OK: Once, for political cover, she spoke in favor of vaccinations, on July 20).” This represents so much of why having Stefanik in Congress is dangerous – she’ll do whatever it takes, even putting us in harm’s way, to appeal to her radical base. = | = Thank you for your commitment, Matt * | | = Paid for by Matt Putorti for Congress Matt Putorti for Congress PO Box 45 Whitehall, NY 12887 United States | | | ---|---|--- = = Email communication is a crucial part of our campaign, but if you no longer wish to receive emails about how you can be a part of the movement to defeat Elise Stefanik, please

name: Katie Pavlich
subject: They tried to silence me.
body:
If you’ve watched me co-host “The Five” on Fox News or guest co-host “Fox and Friends” then you know I don’t apologi
[View this message in your browser](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zf3j9bd8cj9dodn2p7jus0csu1hn2plkk9ut9mio_rp22sh2s8i66ob1cpgm8p34sjh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq2d9ieuqfbdbie4rrcdljkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbp72cjkc9qjcdr0emo64dr56doj8c34mmpb3dhgshoj4cri6pj6cornm4o62oj76v970sj46oob4pjiegonco70mhij1o5l65iecpj66ljjbdhnm8omcc5kmkqefc5lclp2bs)
If you’ve watched me co-host “The Five” on Fox News or guest co-host “Fox and Friends” then you know I don’t apologize for my conservative values, and I’ll defend my constitutional rights to the hilt. I’m proud of America... **NOT ASHAMED!** **And, I know since you are reading this, that you aren’t ashamed of America or our values either.** **But there are millions of young people who aren’t provided with the truth about your conservative ideas... ** [**Will you help give these young people the opportunity to hear your conservative ideas?**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zbfqc2nd6etpdcknnde7jtvnfbp7nobhts0ir6fo_rp22sh2s8i66ob1cpgm8p34sjh2bs) It’s easy to see why young people are impressionable to liberal indoctrination. They’re high school and college students in schools where free speech is under constant assault and where political correctness and socialism is pushed in the classroom. Liberals bully students showing interest in your conservative ideas. I should know—just ten years ago I was a young, impressionable student at the University of Arizona. **It didn’t take me long to realize that my teachers didn’t just dislike the conservative values my parents had instilled in me...****_they hated them._** My professors relied on MSNBC and CNN as the “gold standard” when it came to presenting the “truth” in their classes. But I had no idea they’d try to silence my voice until I got involved with a national conservative organization called **Young America’s Foundation (YAF).** With YAF’s support and access to their campus lecture program, I decided to invite conservative author and activist **David Horowitz** to speak on our campus. He had just written a book about “how radical professors at America’s top colleges indoctrinate students and undermine our democracy. “ And I was just about to discover just how right he was. Just two days before the lecture, the school threatened to shut David Horowitz’s lecture down unless our campus group coughed up cash to pay for “security” because administrators had deemed the lecture “controversial.” Meanwhile, leftist activists tore down our signs and posters advertising the event so students wouldn’t know about it. Then, just three hours before the start of the event, the school moved the lecture to a hidden-away classroom in the hopes that no one would show up. Yet, despite every roadblock they threw at us, **the event was a HUGE success.** University of Arizona students got to hear David Horowitz explain why free enterprise and conservatism are the true roots of freedom. **And I learned a valuable lesson: ** **The Left will do anything to prevent young people from hearing conservatives because they know that students who hear the truth about our values will reject socialism.** Oh, you won’t hear much about the threats, violence, and intimidation pointed at conservatives in schools from the mainstream media. But I've witnessed it firsthand. [**And despite the fear and intimidation tactics these radical leftists use in schools, I want you to know YOU can play a pivotal part to ensure more young Americans hear the truth about our conservative values by joining YAF today.**** **](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zl5moet8t0bkj95i73d9qutihc8sc1n5ld81dong_rp22sh2s8i66ob1cpgm8p34sjh2bs) **You see, YAF had such an impact on my life that today I’m one of their speakers.** And I personally know how enraged the Left can get when we speak up for commonsense values that used to be taken for granted – such as border security, free enterprise, and traditional family values. For example:
* When I spoke at the university of Wisconsin, radical campus activists protested my speech by committing an obscene act that should have been treated as sexual harassment. Instead, the university ignored protestors, labeled me as “controversial” and imposed a “security fee” on the local YAF chapter.
* And later, at Kennesaw State University in Georgia, campus administrators tried to prevent me from speaking. They claimed I was “controversial,” and campus administrators tried to force the local YAF chapter to pay a heavy handed “security fee” in a clear effort to stifle free speech.

But I’m not the only YAF speaker who’s had to deal with this kind of intimidation. Many other YAF speakers have been disrupted... **and even seriously endangered.** **Ben Shapiro was threatened by a violent Antifa terrorist demonstration, after U.C. Berkeley was forced to allow him to speak after a lawsuit filed by YAF.** The First Amendment says every American deserves to have their voice heard in the public square. Everyone deserves a chance to share their opinion and defend their viewpoints. **_But the Left is terrified of your ideas._** That’s why the Left seeks to SILENCE our voices, instead of debating us. I’ve heard many good people say it’s too late...there’s nothing we can do to stop the Left from indoctrinating young people on college campuses with socialism. **_But it’s simply not true – YAF is living proof we CAN stop them. _** Time and time again, **_YAF has sued campuses who sought to censor conservative speakers and WON_** – ensuring young Americans can hear our shared conservative values and ideas. **Let’s face it – with the far Left firmly in control of our public school system and most colleges, young Americans won’t hear these basic truths unless YAF is there to tell them** And time is running out for us to fight the lifetime of indoctrination forced upon our college age students. **[If you want to help recruit the largest audiences of young people into the Conservative Movement, I hope you will make a tax-deductible gift to Young America’s Foundation today.](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zgrko14suonkjt9lsqn2gnc6m6493g5gsp2dd73g_rp22sh2s8i66ob1cpgm8p34sjh2bs)** Remember, the Left is determined to silence voices like ours in schools across the country. In fact, they tried their best to stop YAF... _Your support of YAF is so important because without your help, they'll succeed and your conservative values WILL BE SILENCED._ **This is simply not a battle we can afford to lose.** We must decide whether our country remains a bastion of freedom or it will be twisted and transformed into a socialist dystopia. The next generation is the key in ensuring that our nation doesn't make the wrong choice. Thank you in advance for you support of this crucial mission. Gratefully, **K atie Pavlich ** _Fox News Contributor_ _New York Times Bestselling Author_ _Editor, Townhall.com_ _Young __America's Foundation Speaker_ [**DONATE**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zihf7nf3qhih0fvv2t8if70i4lkbsq998dfrh7b8_rp22sh2s8i66ob1cpgm8p34sjh2bs) [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z32l09h495ddic7b7s5q5e9krflrtqiaestsjmi0_rp22sh2s8i66ob1cpgm8p34sjh2bs) | | [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z1ff101aujoeqss8hkn53dpigukgevifaaf9hai8_rp22sh2s8i66ob1cpgm8p34sjh2bs) | [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z1co9dmaqd27j7kj1qn3nafndk83t7hiik2m9kho_rp22sh2s8i66ob1cpgm8p34sjh2bs) | [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z80he0hgf4qgfbltk8rt5eaqb9j6himalkhlord0_rp22sh2s8i66ob1cpgm8p34sjh2bs)
---|---|---
**[www.yaf.org](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zadaf7b3bo6btd7cpc2kqhnjsrs4jk8fg06ok5m0_rp22sh2s8i66ob1cpgm8p34sjh2bs)**

1-800-USA-1776

Young America's Foundation
National Headquarters
11480 Commerce Park Drive, 6th Floor
Reston, VA 20191-1556

The Reagan Ranch Center
217 State Street
Santa Barbara, CA 93101

The Ronald Reagan Boyhood Home
816 S. Hennepin Avenue
Dixon, IL 61021

**[Privacy Policy](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z8k22lajlghnqfjabcf4rs9aqo277t9ojc4nomgg_rp22sh2s8i66ob1cpgm8p34sjh2bs)
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Deroy Murdock, [please use this preferences page](http://e.deroymurdock.com/prefs/9z2zkjmd04dloh5l4dgk4fqa42skc4t373986rdb728).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

body:
"legitimate political discourse." In a moment, I'm going to ask you to **[chip in $3](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41563856/329366317/-217444029?refcode=em-2.8.22-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYTAwYTFjZC0wNjg5LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mqL1f0d3ADb8QjamOoAE1DARkvZAUD0FQR4wdfca6GA=)** to our campaign to stop Kevin McCarthy from becoming Speaker of the House. But first, let me explain what's at stake.

**The Republican Party has officially made extremism and political violence a part of their platform.**

On Friday, The Republican National Committee held a vote declaring the Jan 6. insurrection to be a form of **"legitimate political discourse."** Hours later at a rally, Donald Trump promised to pardon the rioters who stormed the Capitol and brutally attacked police officers.

Kevin McCarthy has lost any bit of decency he has left in order to placate Trump and the far right. He’s desperate to become Speaker, but as one of his Republican colleagues confessed, “The GOP is no longer about what it believes in, it's about how intensely loyal they are to Donald Trump."

**The idea that McCarthy is on the verge of taking the gavel should frighten everyone. And if we're going to stop today's GOP from taking control in Congress, it starts by DEFEATING McCarthy here at home.**

**[Can you chip in $3 to our campaign to STOP GOP Leader Kevin McCarthy? name: Jasmine
subject: A month of gratitude and reflection
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jasmine Beach-Ferrara for Congress
body:
|
---
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41564223/329367969/459488397?refcode=jas_headerlogo&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYWM1YWFlYy0wODg5LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pZRrtghpG6tgRVFoYpETywuoQeyBK_XxdrXEYcGTJSA=)

| | Peter, February is Black History Month, and I wanted to take a moment for some reflection. Black leaders and organizers are at the center of the American story. Leaders like Harriet Tubman, Ida B. Wells, Dr. Martin Luther King Jr., John Lewis, Bayard Rustin, Marsha P. Johnson, and so many others have stood on the side of justice and have been an enduring force for change in our country. The fight for justice and equity is far from over. Systemic racism remains ingrained in our institutions, and far too many Black Americans experience disparities in every sphere of life, from health care to affordable housing to voting. Our governments at the local, state, and federal levels have critical work to do addressing these systematic issues. But the work doesn’t begin or end there. It needs to happen every day of the year, year after year, in every part of our lives – as voters, at school and work, with our families and friends, in our places of worship. **[Please join me in taking concrete action today by calling your elected officials and asking them to pass voting rights legislation.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41564224/329367970/2127295227?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYWM1YWFlYy0wODg5LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pZRrtghpG6tgRVFoYpETywuoQeyBK_XxdrXEYcGTJSA=&emci=71482943-1985-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=2ac5aaec-0889-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=22032259)** In solidarity, Jasmine

| Dear Neighbor,
I am proud to announce that I have received the endorsement of the Oil & Gas Workers Association ([OGWA](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001jWnxJb2JOX8Gw8ABnyI20kRdj7zC7PoFNgmBqyBbKwfQZSspeuH81ntikqsEmQK3GXXDifWGsAgth1_tYgxOQQn9lN19GTkH-3h1CVlkBLPLsLWZuRUveO60BXLx8ZrNchQ12HYZYo6AvO0JRvlvpg==&c=iKiGsh1etvuqiur6iJjuiahRK3IAMKkMGZXZMW5vvBgmzB9hzGixoQ==&ch=njTeS6zyQaJrYgmsdybYiRcpNd9KlHsGXUZ5MS4uDuHEKxYz-jHAFw==)) for U.S. Congress.
---
---
Living in Texas, we know that the oil and gas industry is not only important to the energy independence of our nation, but it is also the lifeblood of both our state and Houston's economy. OGWA is dedicated to securing, growing, and sustaining oil & gas jobs for the American worker, while actively working to promote and ensure American oil and energy independence. The organization has over 45,000 members and is regarded as the leading oil and gas workers association in the country.
I'm proud to have the endorsement of an organization whose work has such a great and positive impact on my country, my state, and my city. It's an honor to have their support in the fight to regain our energy independence and to ensure both job security and opportunity for my neighbors who are members of the oil and gas community.
---

clean_body: Premier Energy Group Supports Brett Guillory | | | | | | == | | | | | Dear Neighbor, I am proud to announce that I have received the endorsement of the Oil & Gas Workers Association (==) for U.S. Congress. Living in Texas, we know that the oil and gas industry is not only important to the energy independence of our nation, but it is also the lifeblood of both our state and Houston's economy. OGWA is dedicated to securing, growing, and sustaining oil & gas jobs for the American worker, while actively working to promote and ensure American oil and energy independence. The organization has over 45,000 members and is regarded as the leading oil and gas workers association in the country. I'm proud to have the endorsement of an organization whose work has such a great and positive impact on my country, my state, and my city. It's an honor to have their support in the fight to regain our energy independence and to ensure both job security and opportunity for my neighbors who are members of the oil and gas community. | | == | | == | mailto:info@BrettGuilloryforCongress.com | == == == | | | Paid for by Brett Guillory for Texas. | | | | | | | | Brett Guillory for Texas | 13121 Louetta Rd., Box 1465, Cypress, TX 77429 | | Sent by mailto:info@brettguilloryforcongress.com

name: Kelly Hall
subject: My Op-Ed in Slate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Fairness Project The Fairness Project
body:
Last week, I had the opportunity to publish an op-ed in Slate about the calculated attack on voting rights. In the piece, I covered a lot but today, I wanted to speak with you about one critical takeaway: | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/41564807/329370368/765663662?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZmU2OWFhMS0wOTg5LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=L0EUr9SwQ3hbLPNefUNYtV3ceTmDFPBw0DiPX2H2H_8=&emci=581875b5-ff88-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=5fe69aa1-0989-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=561582) | Hi there, Last week I had the opportunity to publish an op-ed in Slate about the calculated attack on voting rights. In the piece, I covered a lot **but today, I wanted to speak with you about one critical takeaway. ** It’s no secret that our democracy is facing a widespread attack on voting rights — just last year, state legislators in 49 states introduced more than 440 bills to restrict voting, and 34 of these attacks on our democracy succeeded and became law. But while these attacks have garnered lots of media attention, **these same state legislatures are attacking another critical part of our democracy: the citizen-driven ballot measure process.** For over a century, American voters have been able to petition and place issues on the ballot and enact them directly into law, forcing their government to respond to their needs. Not taking the threat direct democracy faces seriously means risking the loss of a vital tool in American self-governance. Since our creation in 2016, we’ve won 23 of the 24 ballot measure campaigns we’ve run. And these very measures have helped provide workers with higher wages, expanded and improved health care access, and provided so many more life-changing improvements for millions of Americans in _blue, purple, and red_ states across the country. **We’ve seen an electoral pattern emerge: When voters have a chance to choose policy, even in some of the most conservative states, they tend to choose progress.** And that is why ballot measures are now facing a very real and under-the-radar, existential threat. Officials in majority-conservative state legislatures across the country have seen this progress, and often these attacks on the ballot measure process are in direct reaction to the success of progressive-leaning initiatives. **It’s why we launched our Ballot Measure Rescue Campaign — a $5 million effort to protect direct democracy in states across the country.** If people are denied access to ballot measures, voters will lose their only guaranteed pathway to making progress — on wages, on health care, on paid leave, and on protecting voting rights themselves. [_**If you’re with us in the fight to protect the ballot measure process and continue our work towards progress, will you chip in to fuel our efforts today?**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/41564808/329370369/-721817740?refcode=E13952-20220208-KellyLongform-SL-Other-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZmU2OWFhMS0wOTg5LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=L0EUr9SwQ3hbLPNefUNYtV3ceTmDFPBw0DiPX2H2H_8=) [DONATE](https://click.everyaction.com/k/41564809/329370370/-721817740?refcode=E13952-20220208-KellyLongform-SB-Other-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZmU2OWFhMS0wOTg5LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=L0EUr9SwQ3hbLPNefUNYtV3ceTmDFPBw0DiPX2H2H_8=) Thanks for your support, Kelly Hall
_Executive Director
Fairness Project_
---

name: Leader Kevin McCarthy
subject: Humbly requesting 30 seconds of your time to go over some numbers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
This is Leader Kevin McCarthy. I’m humbly requesting 30 seconds of your time to go over some numbers. Republicans are 5 seats
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z51gk99j8nivafdfis5a7956rn3vd06ihb09ucc8_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37c9l6cqj7djl6eqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbqefdtie8q38pr0sjjr1c5je9q75cbiedp36spm6eqj8c9m6mr76db1mdqe4o30cv970sj46oob4pjiegonco70mhij1o5l65iecpj66ljjbdhnm8pmcd70mdi3fc5lclp238h1e8he4933c5gmcob6c9h6aoh5u)

|
