| | | This is Leader Kevin McCarthy. I'm humbly requesting 30 seconds of your time to go over some numbers.
* Republicans are 5 seats away from the majority.
* A record 29 Democrats have retired so far.
* This cycle, we have some of the best GOP candidates I've ever seen.

I want to introduce you to 8 of the best:

Esther Joy King (IL-17)
Amanda Adkins (KS-03)
Bruce Poliquin (ME-02)
Ryan Zinke (MT-01)
Tom Kean Jr. (NJ-07)
Monica De La Cruz (TX-15)
Wesley Hunt (TX-38)
Derrick Van Orden (WI-03)

---
| | [ENDORSE OUR RED WAVE](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zkfhrtc5ds8h72nsdd0fs8iea8klhpusj3qndg78_rp22sh2s8i66ob1cpgmcoj2clh2bs)
---

* 5 seats to take back the house
* 29 Dem retirements
* 8 tier 1 candidates who will crush their competition.

**The numbers are good.**

But we have one problem: These candidates need resources to go up against the liberal money machine.

---
| | [ENDORSE OUR RED WAVE](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zg9vfd4ci8mj8c5bvhshu51egercfngecmoflsu8_rp22sh2s8i66ob1cpgmcoj2clh2bs)
---

As Republican Leader of the House, I am begging- will you chip in $10, $20, or anything you can give to help us ensure victory in the 2022 midterms? I will personally match every dollar you give for the next hour:

---
| | [CHIP IN NOW](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z6sghruridj0a2n8g725kehrmtbcoijfr4ja24eo_rp22sh2s8i66ob1cpgmcoj2clh2bs)
---

Thank you,
---
| [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zccuafvg6mdql6qp2m5ei160jjh61u48vmbamm4g_rp22sh2s8i66ob1cpgmcoj2clh2bs)
---
Leader Kevin McCarthy

---
**A note from Kevin:**
---
| [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zrkjqtllnoa3h7fi48shnfj2rnbhsqtsbaknc0q8_rp22sh2s8i66ob1cpgmcoj2clh2bs)
---

As Leader of the House Republicans, I'm committed to flipping the House of Representatives in 2022 to restore the Republican Majority and steer America back on the right track. I'm incredibly grateful for your support in this fight and want you to know that I'm doing everything in my power to secure victory for Republicans. Your sustained support fuels our grassroots movement and provides us with the resources necessary to combat the Left's political games. If you'd like to make another contribution, I will fight tooth and nail to ensure every cent goes towards advancing the conservative agenda and winning back the House -- _**[EXPRESS DONATE HERE >>>](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z3h6ab1q37uoj3s4m2qpc39ak90qejispkqbg5mg_rp22sh2s8i66ob1cpgmcoj2clh2bs)**_

The fight is far from over, and we're only getting started.

Kevin McCarthy
Leader, House Republicans

body:
You can now own one of Hillsdale College’s most popular online courses, “Winston Churchill and Statesmanship,” on DVD.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zng8adkc8da18h93u8ac9mbk3kpr7hu5ajeahlo0_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jk1p7fcdkmcqjas3h6gonact66uqrf91ieoob9crl6uie5sj2uoqm4pbnmcq79cdlmeor2sj0c9ob1dr1mlp3cstgm8p36s3jmhjj1pb6m4r6ddpnq9o74p1m62p6csjk65r61o5kckoe1d9hcjj6cphlcsqrcdti6dj30tpjcdjr1db5e8gq48bi4bh28or1c5j62pj6c1hm49fg)
This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zu8g26m7snv4m3etr186tboisl1a55sq4s757v50_rp22sh2s8i66ob1cpgmcpj0cdh2bs) Dear Fellow American, You can now own one of Hillsdale College’s most popular online courses, **“Winston Churchill and Statesmanship,”** on DVD. Thousands of people have enjoyed this in-depth course online since its release, _**and now you can add it to your personal library or give it as a gift.**_ In recent years Winston Churchill, who is best known for his leadership during World War II, has been portrayed in numerous films and television shows, proving without a doubt that Americans find the “British Bulldog” captivating. The reasons for this sustained interest in Churchill are profound. No statesman has better diagnosed the threat of modern technology; no statesman has spoken more effectively in opposition to socialism; and, no statesman has displayed more courage in the face of tyranny. It should come as little surprise that so many “academics” and activists are working to smear his legacy, which makes studying a true account of Churchill’s accomplishments more important than ever. **For precisely this reason, I am so excited to offer you this powerful DVD set:** **_[https://secure.hillsdale.edu/winston-churchill-dvd-offer/](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z7tobe90f70av9sp968e8ifthm81o54uhpf077f0_rp22sh2s8i66ob1cpgmcpj0cdh2bs)_** As a student of Dr. Arnn myself, I know that his lectures on Churchill will teach you more about this subject than any of the many books and videos available to you, and they will reveal profound lessons that can be applied to the urgent problems of today. [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zitu2dterr20hhvu7e661kdq2j5be8odkeu3cgc8_rp22sh2s8i66ob1cpgmcpj0cdh2bs) Only a limited number of these DVD sets are available, so I hope you’ll take this opportunity to add it to your personal library or give it as a gift—before they’re gone. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of **“Winston Churchill and Statesmanship** ” on DVD: _[**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/winston-churchill-dvd-offer/**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zglbbc4hfkb06qfhe19580mehcucv07gd0843jjg_rp22sh2s8i66ob1cpgmcpj0cdh2bs)_ You’ll undoubtedly enjoy this close study of Churchill’s words and deeds.

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, ‘09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College |

body:
[https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif] https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vv-mnc-email?refcode=220105_FR_newyearnewemail_LOGO [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vv-mnc-email?refcode=220105_FR_newyearnewemail_LOGO] [https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif]
Victoria needs our help. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/victoria-for-congress?refcode=phonebanks] We just started our phone bank program, and we need volunteers to make calls to share Victoria's vision for the 8th.
We hold our phone banks twice a week:
*
Sundays,
5-7pm
EST
[http://www.mobilize.us/victoriaforcongress/event/439372/]
*
Thursdays,
6-8pm
EST
[http://www.mobilize.us/victoriaforcongress/event/439372/]
All of our phone banks are virtual, so you can make an impact all in the comfort of your own home. [http://www.mobilize.us/victoriaforcongress/event/439372/]
In the last 2 weeks since we've launched, our volunteers have talked with voters who were excited about the campaign's platform and Victoria's proposed solutions to housing, health care, and more.
This type of direct-voter contact will continue to pay off for Victoria and the campaign [http://www.mobilize.us/victoriaforcongress/event/439372/] , but we need your help. If you are able to commit to 2 hours at least one day a week, please sign up below.
Make an Impact today [https://www.mobilize.us/victoriaforcongress/event/439372/] .
If you are unable to volunteer or phone banking is not your thing, you can make a small contribution to keep our phone banks running. It is because of your continued support that we are able to invest in a dialer system and reach out to thousands of voters . [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/victoria-for-congress?refcode=phonebanks]
There will be more volunteer opportunities coming up , so please sign up today! [https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSfkYE6GtINzoiCPeWnzeG8WGTxHmfP2aZgcq7z3OKvYOgaLwg/viewform]
Every dollar counts, especially with a grassroots campaign like ours. Will you help our phone bank program today? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/victoria-for-congress?refcode=phonebanks]
Thank you!
Team Victoria
If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
$10 » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/victoria-for-congress?refcode=phonebanks&amount=10] $25 » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/victoria-for-congress?refcode=phonebanks&amount=25]

Your support means everything.
EXPRESS DONATE to Victoria Virasingh for Congress
If you've stored payment info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
$10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vv-mnc-email?refcode=220105_FR_newyearnewemail_BEL&refcode2=EL10&express_lane=true&amount=10] $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vv-mnc-email?refcode=220105_FR_newyearnewemail_BEL&refcode2=EL25&express_lane=true&amount=25] $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vv-mnc-email?refcode=220105_FR_newyearnewemail_BEL&refcode2=EL50&express_lane=true&amount=50] $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vv-mnc-email?refcode=220105_FR_newyearnewemail_BEL&refcode2=EL100&express_lane=true&amount=100]
Victoria Virasingh is the daughter of immigrants. She grew up housing insecure and watched her working parents struggle to pull their family out of poverty. But today, even those opportunities to work hard and live the American dream are becoming less and less attainable.
That's why Victoria is running for Congress in Virginia's 8th District -- to create equitable opportunities for those who have been left behind, to expand access for the store owner to the refugee, to support our struggling elders and students, and to lift up working families.
Victoria is a fearless progressive champion who will fight for bold policies to improve the daily lives of Virginians, and she's bringing the fresh new leadership that we need to move our state forward.
Pitch in to help elect Victoria Virasingh as the next voice of VA-08 >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/vv-mnc-email?refcode=220105_FR_newyearnewemail_BIO]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vv-mnc-email?refcode=220105_FR_newyearnewemail_BIO]

Their acts of service to their communities are well-known throughout the country, and we have A LOT to be proud of here in the Sunshine State. name: Team Zoe
subject: Your Morning Cup of Zoe (Lofgren)
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LOFGREN FOR CONGRESS
body:
| | |
Immigration Court Bill Would Give Judges Independence, Tackle 1.6M Case Backlog
KQED

“You never know when immigration issues touch your community or your family,” [Lofgren] said. “We should all be for the rule of law, and that's what this is about."

[Keep reading and listen...](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41565562/329373518/785469063?refcode=ZL_EM_EN_4MO_220208_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82OTYwNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzM2NmZjgzZC0wYzg5LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JISLLDNrKKY0FOvTevn9dvzJaVWSE6bUs92j6kh_Gy8=&emci=33314658-5c88-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=33cff83d-0c89-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=6468171)

Zoe Lofgren introduces bill to remove immigration courts from attorney general control
The San Francisco Chronicle

The courts have been an increasingly dysfunctional piece of the nation’s immigration system, with ever-skyrocketing backlogs that keep immigrants seeking to stay in the U.S. in limbo for years... Advocates of making the courts independent say it’s a necessary step both to improve the effectiveness and the fairness of the courts.

[Keep reading...](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41565563/329373519/-1535085730?refcode=ZL_EM_EN_4MO_220208_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82OTYwNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzM2NmZjgzZC0wYzg5LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JISLLDNrKKY0FOvTevn9dvzJaVWSE6bUs92j6kh_Gy8=&emci=33314658-5c88-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=33cff83d-0c89-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=6468171)

Bay Area Congresswoman proposes independent immigration court system
KTVU

"People should be able to navigate this system not only in a humane manner but in a fair manner, in a clear manner, where people are not only held accountable but there is transparency," said [Berto] Hernandez, [an immigrant youth coordinator with the California Immigration Youth Justice Alliance].

[Watch...](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41565564/329373520/-94939461?refcode=ZL_EM_EN_4MO_220208_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82OTYwNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzM2NmZjgzZC0wYzg5LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JISLLDNrKKY0FOvTevn9dvzJaVWSE6bUs92j6kh_Gy8=&emci=33314658-5c88-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=33cff83d-0c89-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=6468171)

Rep. Lofgren on bringing 'rule of law' to immigration courts
MSNBC's Jose Diaz-Balart Reports

Rep. Zoe Lofgren speaks on her motivation to create a bill to move immigration courts outside of the Dept. of Justice. "It's not independent, it's not fair, it's not orderly, and we want to bring the rule of law" to immigration courts, Rep. Lofgren states.

[Watch...](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41565565/329373521/-615448638?refcode=ZL_EM_EN_4MO_220208_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82OTYwNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzM2NmZjgzZC0wYzg5LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JISLLDNrKKY0FOvTevn9dvzJaVWSE6bUs92j6kh_Gy8=&emci=33314658-5c88-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=33cff83d-0c89-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=6468171)

name: Casey DeSantis
subject: What We're Up Against
body:
[****](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59495235:6cb5WfEbN:m:1:3253819041:DB7A603EAAAAF4E2DFC3F5CB41CD9D60:r)

Florida's incredible governor and my husband, Ron DeSantis, spends every waking hour protecting the Sunshine State from the Biden Administration's relentless attacks on our freedom.
Just this week, Joe Biden announced that each state will get federal funding to improve bridges and infrastructure, which is important to keep our families safe. **But in a move that many are calling spiteful, the administration is only giving Florida a fraction of the funds they 're giving blue states. **
[**HELP US CONTINUE THE FIGHT TO PROTECT FREEDOM IN FLORIDA - CHIP IN $20.22 NOW >>> **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59495235:6cb5WfEbN:m:1:3253819041:DB7A603EAAAAF4E2DFC3F5CB41CD9D60:r)
Governor DeSantis has been very vocal that this is just another example of the Biden Administration short-changing Florida because he will not conform to their expectations. Peter, that is what real leadership looks like: **_to lead and do what is right, despite the lockdown, and the radical Democrats' intimidation attempts. _**
Under Governor DeSantis' leadership, the state of Florida has flourished despite challenging circumstances. He has kept our kids in school, kept businesses open, and ensured that our personal freedoms are NOT infringed.
Looking back, had the governor lost the election, Florida would have fallen to the whims of the Democrats in 2018, our state would just be another California, New York, or Michigan.
We cannot let this happen in 2022, Peter. **_This is not the time to back down or sit on the sidelines._**
[**HELP KEEP FLORIDA FREE**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59495235:6cb5WfEbN:m:1:3253819041:DB7A603EAAAAF4E2DFC3F5CB41CD9D60:r)

Governor DeSantis will continue fighting for our liberties and what is right every day, so we must meet him halfway. **Help us ensure that he is re-elected -** **we need him now more than ever.**
**_Peter,_**[**can we count on you to chip in $50, $40, or $20.22 to help us continue the fight for freedom in Florida? **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59495235:6cb5WfEbN:m:1:3253819041:DB7A603EAAAAF4E2DFC3F5CB41CD9D60:r)[** **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59495235:6cb5WfEbN:m:1:3253819041:DB7A603EAAAAF4E2DFC3F5CB41CD9D60:r)

Casey DeSantis

**[We can't do it without you though. That's why I NEED you to renew your 2022 Membership before the extended February 8th, 11:59 PM deadline.](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zr43c8bd4iqo0f1op56f8keh6lqvk2o57h91jtp8_rp22sh2s8i66ob1cpgmaob0s5h2bs)**

Hi Friends,
If you have not registered yet to join our POWER & DIPLOMACY conversation tonight, there is still time. My Special Guest is Rep. Gregory Meeks, Chair of the House Foreign Affairs Committee. He will give us his real-time update and insights about the latest news on Ukraine.
As he works for a rigorous diplomatic resolution to the tensions on the Ukraine-Russia border, Chairman Meeks is also leading on House Democrats’ committed efforts to address supply chain issues and empower our workers to outcompete the world. I look forward to our conversation on the day’s news and on his insights about America’s leadership role on the world stage.

NANCY

name: Judicial Watch Tipsheet
subject: Pelosi Congress Claims Sovereign Immunity in Federal Court to Keep Secret January 6 Videos and Emails
body:
“The Pelosi Congress (and its police department) is telling a federal court it is immune from all transparency under law and is trying to hide every second of its January 6 videos and countless emails,” stated Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton.

---
| | | Because no one is above the law! | Feb 7, 2022
---|---|---
## Today's Top Stories
| | | | [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57844&L=26729&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcGVsb3NpLWNvbmdyZXNzLWNsYWltcy1pbW11bml0eS1pbi1jb3VydC8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj10aXBzaGVldCZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz) | **[Pelosi Congress Claims Sovereign Immunity in Federal Court to Keep Secret January 6 Videos and Emails](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57844&L=26729&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcGVsb3NpLWNvbmdyZXNzLWNsYWltcy1pbW11bml0eS1pbi1jb3VydC8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj10aXBzaGVldCZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz)** “The Pelosi Congress (and its police department) is telling a federal court it is immune from all transparency under law and is trying to hide every second of its January 6 videos and countless emails,” stated Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton. “The hypocrisy is rich, as this is the same Congress that is trying to jail witnesses who, citing privileges, object to providing documents to the Pelosi rump January 6 committee.” [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57844&L=26729&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcGVsb3NpLWNvbmdyZXNzLWNsYWltcy1pbW11bml0eS1pbi1jb3VydC8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj10aXBzaGVldCZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz)
---|---
| | | | [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57844&L=26739&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvbmVhcmx5LTItbWlsLXRvLXN0dWR5LWltcGFjdC1vZi1nZW9yZ2UtZmxveWRzLWRlYXRoLWNvdmlkLW9uLWJsYWNrLW1hdGVybmFsLWhlYWx0aC8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj10aXBzaGVldCZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz) | **[Nearly $2 Mil to Study Impact of George Floyd’s Death, COVID on Black Maternal Health](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57844&L=26739&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvbmVhcmx5LTItbWlsLXRvLXN0dWR5LWltcGFjdC1vZi1nZW9yZ2UtZmxveWRzLWRlYXRoLWNvdmlkLW9uLWJsYWNrLW1hdGVybmFsLWhlYWx0aC8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj10aXBzaGVldCZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz)** The nation’s medical research agency claims preterm birth “can reveal a lot about how the traumatic death of George Floyd and the stress of COVID-19 have played out in the lives of pregnant Black women.” So, the U.S. government is spending nearly $2 million to study the impact of “dual pandemics”—structural racism exposed Floyd’s death and COVID—on black maternal health. The research will be conducted by the same public university professor whose taxpayer-funded work has already determined preterm births are significantly higher among “Black birthing people” in “over-policed” neighborhoods. The academic’s name is Rachel Hardeman, a health and racial equity teacher at the University of Minnesota who studied under Communists at Cuba’s government-run Escuela Latinoamericana de Medicina in Havana. [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57844&L=26739&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvbmVhcmx5LTItbWlsLXRvLXN0dWR5LWltcGFjdC1vZi1nZW9yZ2UtZmxveWRzLWRlYXRoLWNvdmlkLW9uLWJsYWNrLW1hdGVybmFsLWhlYWx0aC8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj10aXBzaGVldCZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz)
---|---
| | | | [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57844&L=26731&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvdHJhbnNnZW5kZXItb2ZmZW5kZXItbWFudWFsLW9yZGVycy1wcmlzb25zLXRvLW9mZmVyLXNwZWNpYWwtc2VydmljZXMtYmFucy1taXMtZ2VuZGVyaW5nLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXRpcHNoZWV0JnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=) | **[Transgender Offender Manual Orders Prisons to Offer Special Services, Bans “Mis-Gendering”](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57844&L=26731&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvdHJhbnNnZW5kZXItb2ZmZW5kZXItbWFudWFsLW9yZGVycy1wcmlzb25zLXRvLW9mZmVyLXNwZWNpYWwtc2VydmljZXMtYmFucy1taXMtZ2VuZGVyaW5nLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXRpcHNoZWV0JnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=)** The Biden administration has issued a Transgender Offender Manual directing federal prisons to give special accommodations and taxpayer-funded services to certain convicts serving sentences in jails throughout the nation. The Department of Justice (DOJ) issued the new guidelines a few weeks ago to ensure that the Bureau of Prisons (BOP) “properly identifies, tracks, and provides services to the transgender population.” [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57844&L=26731&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvdHJhbnNnZW5kZXItb2ZmZW5kZXItbWFudWFsLW9yZGVycy1wcmlzb25zLXRvLW9mZmVyLXNwZWNpYWwtc2VydmljZXMtYmFucy1taXMtZ2VuZGVyaW5nLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXRpcHNoZWV0JnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=)
---|---
| | | | [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57844&L=26700&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvYW5vdGhlci1zZWNyZXQtcG9zdGFsLXNlcnZpY2UtcHJvZ3JhbS1zcGllcy1vbi1jaXRpemVucy1ieS1oYWNraW5nLWNlbGwtcGhvbmVzLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXRpcHNoZWV0JnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=) | **[Another Secret Postal Service Program Spies on Citizens by Hacking Cell Phones](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57844&L=26700&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvYW5vdGhlci1zZWNyZXQtcG9zdGFsLXNlcnZpY2UtcHJvZ3JhbS1zcGllcy1vbi1jaXRpemVucy1ieS1oYWNraW5nLWNlbGwtcGhvbmVzLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXRpcHNoZWV0JnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=)** Months after Judicial Watch sued the U.S. Postal Service (USPS) for information about a secret program that tracks and collects Americans’ social media posts, more of the agency’s controversial spy mechanisms are being exposed. The newly uncovered tools are sophisticated hacking devices that can breach cell phones and the USPS’s law enforcement arm, U.S. Postal Inspection Service (USPIS), has utilized them hundreds of times in the last few years, according to a news story that cites USPIS data buried in a lengthy agency report. The questionable surveillance schemes appear to indicate that the government is weaponizing the nation’s postal service to improperly spy on the citizens who fund it. [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57844&L=26700&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvYW5vdGhlci1zZWNyZXQtcG9zdGFsLXNlcnZpY2UtcHJvZ3JhbS1zcGllcy1vbi1jaXRpemVucy1ieS1oYWNraW5nLWNlbGwtcGhvbmVzLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXRpcHNoZWV0JnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=)
---|---
|
---
| |
---
### [GOP politicians say University of Pittsburgh fetal tissue probe a ‘whitewash’ and not nearly sufficient ](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57844&L=26740&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZ29wLXBvbGl0aWNpYW5zLXNheS11bml2ZXJzaXR5LW9mLXBpdHRzYnVyZ2gtZmV0YWwtdGlzc3VlLXByb2JlLWEtd2hpdGV3YXNoLWFuZC1ub3QtbmVhcmx5LXN1ZmZpY2llbnQvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249dGlwc2hlZXQmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==) Fox News Center for Medical Progress founder David Daleiden, along with watchdog group Judicial Watch, brought national attention to the university’s GUDMAP research, which identified the Pitt biospecimen core as the source of its tissue. Pitt itself has acknowledged that UPMC provides tissue for its biospecimen core and houses several of the tissue bank’s locations. [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57844&L=26740&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZ29wLXBvbGl0aWNpYW5zLXNheS11bml2ZXJzaXR5LW9mLXBpdHRzYnVyZ2gtZmV0YWwtdGlzc3VlLXByb2JlLWEtd2hpdGV3YXNoLWFuZC1ub3QtbmVhcmx5LXN1ZmZpY2llbnQvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249dGlwc2hlZXQmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==)
---
### [Judicial Watch Sues CIA Over Communications That Reportedly Targeted President Trump ](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57844&L=26730&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvanVkaWNpYWwtd2F0Y2gtc3Vlcy1jaWEtb3Zlci1jb21tdW5pY2F0aW9ucy10aGF0LXJlcG9ydGVkbHktdGFyZ2V0ZWQtcHJlc2lkZW50LXRydW1wLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXRpcHNoZWV0JnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=) CNS News The government watchdog group Judicial Watch has filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit against the Central Intelligence Agency (CIA) for communications between then-CIA Director Gina Haspel and Chairman of the Joint Chiefs of Staff General Mark Milley in 2020-21, which reportedly involved the targeting of President Donald Trump.

Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton in a statement said, “It ought to be disturbing to all Americans that the head of the CIA and the Chairman of the Joint Chiefs were reportedly conspiring against the President of the United States. clean_body: “The Pelosi Congress (and its police department) is telling a federal court it is immune from all transparency under law and is trying to hide every second of its January 6 videos and countless emails,” stated Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton. | | | Because no one is above the law! | Feb 7, 2022 ---|---|--- Today's Top Stories | | | | | “The Pelosi Congress (and its police department) is telling a federal court it is immune from all transparency under law and is trying to hide every second of its January 6 videos and countless emails,” stated Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton. “The hypocrisy is rich, as this is the same Congress that is trying to jail witnesses who, citing privileges, object to providing documents to the Pelosi rump January 6 committee.” ---|--- | | | | | The nation’s medical research agency claims preterm birth “can reveal a lot about how the traumatic death of George Floyd and the stress of COVID-19 have played out in the lives of pregnant Black women.” So, the U.S. government is spending nearly $2 million to study the impact of “dual pandemics”—structural racism exposed Floyd’s death and COVID—on black maternal health. The research will be conducted by the same public university professor whose taxpayer-funded work has already determined preterm births are significantly higher among “Black birthing people” in “over-policed” neighborhoods. The academic’s name is Rachel Hardeman, a health and racial equity teacher at the University of Minnesota who studied under Communists at Cuba’s government-run Escuela Latinoamericana de Medicina in Havana. ---|--- | | | | = | = The Biden administration has issued a Transgender Offender Manual directing federal prisons to give special accommodations and taxpayer-funded services to certain convicts serving sentences in jails throughout the nation. The Department of Justice (DOJ) issued the new guidelines a few weeks ago to ensure that the Bureau of Prisons (BOP) “properly identifies, tracks, and provides services to the transgender population.” = ---|--- | | | | = | = Months after Judicial Watch sued the U.S. Postal Service (USPS) for information about a secret program that tracks and collects Americans’ social media posts, more of the agency’s controversial spy mechanisms are being exposed. The newly uncovered tools are sophisticated hacking devices that can breach cell phones and the USPS’s law enforcement arm, U.S. Postal Inspection Service (USPIS), has utilized them hundreds of times in the last few years, according to a news story that cites USPIS data buried in a lengthy agency report. The questionable surveillance schemes appear to indicate that the government is weaponizing the nation’s postal service to improperly spy on the citizens who fund it. = ---|--- | | | == Fox News Center for Medical Progress founder David Daleiden, along with watchdog group Judicial Watch, brought national attention to the university’s GUDMAP research, which identified the Pitt biospecimen core as the source of its tissue. Pitt itself has acknowledged that UPMC provides tissue for its biospecimen core and houses several of the tissue bank’s locations. == = CNS News The government watchdog group Judicial Watch has filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit against the Central Intelligence Agency (CIA) for communications between then-CIA Director Gina Haspel and Chairman of the Joint Chiefs of Staff General Mark Milley in 2020-21, which reportedly involved the targeting of President Donald Trump. Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton in a statement said, “It ought to be disturbing to all Americans that the head of the CIA and the Chairman of the Joint Chiefs were reportedly conspiring against the President of the United States. = = The Daily Wire “NBC News faced backlash over a report that it published this week that sought to paint those who want transparency in what their children are taught as “conservative activists” who pose a threat to free speech. Tom Fitton, Judicial Watch: “Agenda piece by @NBCNews helpfully reminds parents that leftists illegally abusing kids with racist CRT propaganda fear transparency.” ” = = = = = == == | CLIPS = = | == | | = | | | Keep our investigators on the job uncovering the truth: | | | | | ---|---|--- == == == = Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800, Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 (C)2017-2022, All Rights Reserved == |

My Election Year membership campaign expires at midnight, but I'm still 513 members short of my goal. Marco Rubio and the GOP know that if we win here, Democrats are virtually guaranteed to keep control of the Senate. That's why they're pouring money into Florida to try and buy this seat – no matter how much it costs. Right now, Marco Rubio is more vulnerable than ever – but we need resources to compete with him. With time running out before tonight's deadline, I see that you still haven't activated your membership. Senate control is riding on what happens here, so I hope I can count on you to give right now: = Thanks, Val Demings | | = Val Demings here: I can’t thank you enough for fighting alongside me to flip Florida blue. Florida will determine whether Democrats keep our Senate majority – that’s why Republicans are pouring millions of dollars into this race to crush our movement and keep Florida red permanently. Our grassroots campaign is off to a great start, but in a race as close as this one, I need your help to surge ahead and defend the Senate. I’m relying on grassroots supporters like you, donating to emails like this, to help me defeat Marco Rubio and stop Mitch McConnell from flipping the Senate. Will you donate today to help me flip Florida blue? = If you’d like to purchase merchandise to show your support for this campaign, Thank you for your continued support. Together we’re going to protect voting rights, expand access to affordable health care and fully recover from this pandemic. = If you’re reading from your phone, to automatically sign up for my SMS team. By providing your mobile phone number you consent to receive recurring updates from Val Demings for U.S. Senate, including by automated text message. Txt HELP for help, STOP to end. clean_body: Control of the Senate majority will likely hinge on our Georgia election. Control of the Senate majority will likely hinge on our Georgia election. | $9.8 million is an incredible sum of money to raise in three short months. If we're going to pull off a win in November, we MUST close the gap financially. Friend, Our opponent just announced his 4th quarter fundraising report, and it was significantly more than what we raised. In fact, it was the most raised by any senate candidate in the whole country! While there was little doubt that national Democrats and special interests would pour money into our opponent's bank account last quarter, it was an eye-popping amount. Over 90% of the money came from outside Georgia! We were outraised the last two quarters, but we still have time to close the fundraising gap. Our opponent is the top fundraiser in the entire U.S. Senate, so any gift you make will help us chip away at his financial advantage and grow our media fund. Control of the Senate majority will likely hinge on our Georgia race, which is a dead heat according to recent polling. I'm not a politician, and I've never run for office before. While I know money certainly isn't everything in campaigns, it's still important for candidates who are running in statewide races like we are. This race is a TOSS-UP. Because of the cash advantage our opponent holds over us, he will be able to start reaching out to voters sooner than we can via TV ads, radio ads, social media ads, direct mail and billboards. We can't let our opponent get too much of a head start in advertising, so we've got to close the fundraising gap. Thank you, Herschel Walker Republican Candidate for Senate | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but ._

name: Greg Casar
subject: WATCH: Our new ad 📺
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greg Casar for Congress
body:
Did you see the big news, Peter?
We just launched our first TV ad in the race for Texas’s 35th Congressional District! It’s called “ A Bold Agenda for Working Families [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/greg-casar-for-congress-ad] ” and I couldn’t be more excited to share it with you first.
This ad will help us share my vision for good jobs, Medicare for All, reproductive rights, and better Texas with every voter across TX-35. But we need your help to spread it far and wide— can you chip in $35 to help us get our new ad out on the airwaves in TX-35? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/greg-casar-for-congress-ad]
Help us get our ad live! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/greg-casar-for-congress-ad] https://secure.actblue.com/donate/greg-casar-for-congress-ad [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/greg-casar-for-congress-ad]This ad is about how I spent my career fighting for working families—and about how I’ll fight for a bold, progressive agenda for those families in Congress. I’ll fight to expand Medicare to every Texan, work to fix our broken power grid, and tackle the climate crisis with the urgency it deserves. But I can’t do it without your help.
Peter, we have less than one week until early voting starts in Texas . That’s right, one week. More than ever, we need your help to reach as many voters as possible in this final stretch. Can you chip in $35 to help get our ad out on the airwaves in TX-35? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/greg-casar-for-congress-ad]
Together we can win this race and deliver a better Texas for everyone.
Thank you,
-Greg
Greg Casar
Democratic candidate for Texas’s 35th Congressional District

Austin, TX 78703

| | Good afternoon, Derek. I’m writing to you today to humbly ask if you can split a contribution with my campaign before our fundraising deadline ends at midnight tonight. This is a big one, and we can’t come up short.

If you understand the stakes of this election and are ready to chip in today, you can use this link:

[**Please split a contribution of $25 or more to my re-election campaign by clicking here.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41566468/329377292/1008178349?refcode=20220208_CGVA_Kelly&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYWM3OGQxMi0wZjg5LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IKOdw-8Nf3rXd-UWASkRqxH39uGrididXbXUg7iVdGc=) Otherwise, let me explain why this request is so important: This is going to be one of the closest Senate races of the year. CNN says it’s one of the most likely to flip. Corporate special interest groups are spending millions to beat us and Donald Trump is telling his supporters “taking back America starts with kicking Mark Kelly the hell out of the Senate.”

It will also be one of the most expensive races in the country. And because I’m not taking a dime of corporate PAC money, I need a ton of donations to push back against these attacks.

And all along the way, we have to hit a series of deadline goals to keep pace. Tonight is one of those deadlines, and we’re not at our goals just yet.

So, please:

I wanted to reach out to you today and give you an update on my campaign for Governor of Texas.
* Illegals are POURING across our border and the current Governor is complicit in allowing this invasion
* Vaccines are being mandated or Texans will lose their jobs
* Candidates for Governor are calling for the confiscation of our guns

clean_body: We are ahead in the polls and we must keep our momentum strong. | Fellow American, I wanted to reach out to you today and give you an update on my campaign for Governor of Texas. Illegals are POURING across our border and the current Governor is complicit in allowing this invasion Vaccines are being mandated or Texans will lose their jobs * Candidates for Governor are calling for the confiscation of our guns We have received an outpouring of support and thank you for helping us reach 15,000 donations to our campaign. But we cannot slow down - the current Governor is FAILING the people of Texas. We are ahead in the polls and we must keep our momentum strong. Even a few dollars goes a long way in helping us WIN THIS RACE. I need your help today, Fellow American, to protect the sovereignty of Texas. Steadfast and Loyal, Allen B. West Lieutenant Colonel (Ret) | | POL. ADV. PAID FOR BY ALLEN WEST CAMPAIGN The election laws in Texas allow for unlimited donation amounts as long as the funds are not from an incorporated entity. Make checks payable: Allen West Campaign PO Box 740846 Dallas, TX 75374 Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but ._

Hi friends, I am thrilled to announce my running mate and pick for Lieutenant Governor: **Former Hyattsville Mayor, Candace Hollingsworth!** **[Watch our announcement video->](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953x6juQfwWdvfk2nFLFznhxMuSFUoqNvBA9eCDPRi30glm85eTpFp_hEsJ9mThSEWxifXmDVuEuMKPsyX4c2deHvVKIcphYuX2GS_iGeDMpFCSF9yRyo3lGGXf6Upnx_a2y3bF0r39_CbFQw8Ku8KO6gwwV0t2z8HCM_QT3cq9I4wws91Q9rQ8Fzfcm19Wlnps9hrXcONikkYqXEzjQEnfZWnpcmPAhVcO8P4HGb83MJFmDHKt2CpkM-qjQqmWljWC2R5glJ3K_7l0FNtfqW7QFoaThYxbSwf158Gi_iW80acwrib1W9mjwJOPldvJ-kkX2m8_dLBgPsOrJ17jW-H7GH/3je/wS1APT_ESh2iovX_9gYwag/h1/MF45x3dR-hdiqU6jxTXK61rpBCj2SzYhhoi_SAz5AvQ)**

| [ ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953x6juQfwWdvfk2nFLFznhxMuSFUoqNvBA9eCDPRi30glm85eTpFp_hEsJ9mThSEWxiTJKM1xLQVTDw1m2RK-qI4ewz-kORSbGXCL0yrfIi9-PTpQtcLs2xichBuIzdwNgKFE8yrhwQNY9AN9FglZMZjPOGOjxAwl42LGmpsq7r5MKNAGdjfeBICh104i9Xb1oi1ve5Lz3Mpiz2NzfjxgCVEc0lo3ORmpaAPGdzUgWRgB9cbmPhj8QuwnuAod-xxMZOJP47Jod8_SwPDLyBpv4phdbMCNXIgH4AM3etgHDUJrdyPNrZLuirwNI1eogmlDsCAuy7Adq_pyHo-0yJvMnL1/3je/wS1APT_ESh2iovX_9gYwag/h2/Staqpn5V6U6B1os3i295GdbgADv7RWCULt6lxNClmsY)
---
**I chose Candace to be my partner in this race because when Hyattsville needed someone to be a leader, she stepped up and became that leader.** As the city's youngest and first Black mayor, Candace focused on tapping into the talents of the community and transformed Hyattsville into a city with a vibrant downtown area. Now, with so much left to rebuild after this pandemic -- from reducing crime to improving policing to closing the COVID learning gap and getting our children on track for success -- **it 's critical that our next administration has the knowledge and experience to get to work on day one. ** As the only team in this race with executive experience at the state and local levels, Candace and I know how to get things done in government and deliver real results for Marylanders. **Together, we will power our communities with world-class schools, family-sustaining jobs, and meaningful opportunities for our youth. ** Let's do this! Doug

| | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/41567845/329383611/1300596418?refcode=220208_FR_JessicaCisnerosEndo

Hi Peter,

We have exciting news – we’re adding **Jessica Cisneros (TX-28)** to our endorsement list and could not be more thrilled to have another progressive candidate leading the fight in Texas.

Jessica is the daughter of migrant farm workers. She knows personally the barriers that immigrants face and is ready to fight for her community on day one. We are proud to stand with her. [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/41567846/329383612/1829917838?refcode=220208_FR_JessicaCisnerosEndo

Now, we are moving full steam ahead to pick up TWO more progressive seats in Texas.

With Texas’ abortion bans becoming stricter and democrats chances of losing the House and Senate becoming more likely, it’s crucial that we elect strong, young, progressive, diverse leaders who can fight.

**But we’re down to the wire.**

Patriot,

In her newest book "**[Justified: The Story of America's Audit](https://for.az.kelliward.com/link.php?AGENCY=PMI&M=22208987&N=146783&L=78274&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9rZWxsaXdhcmQuY29tL2p1c3RpZmllZC1wcmVvcmRlcj91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09d2FyZCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249ZW1haWwmdXRtX3Rlcm09SnVzdGlmaWVkMw==)** , Dr. Kelli Ward explains the ins and outs of electoral politics while covering Arizona's audit. Do you know why the Electoral College casts votes on December 14? Let Dr. Ward explain:
> "There is precedent for our Republican electors to have met on December 14, even as the Democrat electors for Arizona were meeting elsewhere. Democrat electors pledged to John F. Kennedy convened in Hawaii in 1960 at the same time as Republican electors met, even though the governor had certified Richard Nixon as the winner. In the end, Hawaii’s electoral votes were awarded to President Kennedy, even though he did not win the state until 11 days after his electors cast their votes. The legitimacy and good sense of two sets of electors meeting on December 14, 2020 to cast competing votes for president and vice president, with the conflict to be sorted out later by the courts and Congress, has been pointed out by those on both sides of the political aisle, given that the results in Arizona remained in doubt on December 14, 2020, with legal arguments still to be decided. Just as the Democrat electors had met in Hawaii in 1960 while awaiting a final resolution of that state’s vote, so, too, the Republican electors agreed to meet on December 14, 2020, as we all awaited a final resolution of Arizona’s eleven electoral votes. It was now officially a contested election."
**[Order Today](https://for.az.kelliward.com/link.php?AGENCY=PMI&M=22208987&N=146783&L=78274&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9rZWxsaXdhcmQuY29tL2p1c3RpZmllZC1wcmVvcmRlcj91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09d2FyZCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249ZW1haWwmdXRtX3Rlcm09SnVzdGlmaWVkMw==)**
This is the perfect book for university bound student or the civically minded patriot because you get the history and the facts from the people who were there.

Take advantage our hassle-free checkout and order your $25 signed copy of "**[Justified: The Story of America's Audit](https://for.az.kelliward.com/link.php?AGENCY=PMI&M=22208987&N=146783&L=78274&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9rZWxsaXdhcmQuY29tL2p1c3RpZmllZC1wcmVvcmRlcj91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09d2FyZCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249ZW1haWwmdXRtX3Rlcm09SnVzdGlmaWVkMw==),**" and for an extra $5, personalize your copy with a special inscription. The patriots and political junkies in your life will love it, **[order today](https://for.az.kelliward.com/link.php?AGENCY=PMI&M=22208987&N=146783&L=78274&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9rZWxsaXdhcmQuY29tL2p1c3RpZmllZC1wcmVvcmRlcj91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09d2FyZCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249ZW1haWwmdXRtX3Rlcm09SnVzdGlmaWVkMw==)!**

name: Tony Vargas
subject: this is personal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tony Vargas for Congress
body:
I want to tell you why your support means so much to me.

|
---

| | [**_I’m about to get personal with you, tell you where I came from, and explain why every single donation I receive means so much to me. I would love if you’d read the whole thing. But if you’re short on time, could you chip in $10 before logging off? >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41568437/329387187/1129282168?refcode=20220208_em_fr_b1_tony_30&amount=10&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MTY1MzcwMS0xOTg5LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2dCEQ7PsmVTUy2y0-CqCHPUcyoID0jt-okm-KYtm9gs=) Growing up wasn’t easy for me and my family. My parents immigrated here from Peru. My dad sold hot dogs and drove a taxi to make ends meet. My brothers and I were raised in a one bedroom apartment. But we never gave up. Thanks to their hard work, my father’s union, and community support, we went from living in poverty to a life in the middle class. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41568438/329387188/1129282168?refcode=20220208_em_fr_b1_tony_30&amount=14&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MTY1MzcwMS0xOTg5LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2dCEQ7PsmVTUy2y0-CqCHPUcyoID0jt-okm-KYtm9gs=)
_Tony’s High School Graduation_ [**_My family’s story shouldn’t be out of reach for anyone. That’s why I’m asking: Will you chip in $10 right now so I can fight for everyday families in Congress? I need $1,100 before midnight to keep this campaign running. I don’t have special interests — just grassroots donors like you and me — so your support is something I never take for granted. >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41568439/329387195/1129282168?refcode=20220208_em_fr_b1_tony_30&amount=10&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MTY1MzcwMS0xOTg5LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2dCEQ7PsmVTUy2y0-CqCHPUcyoID0jt-okm-KYtm9gs=) This is personal for me. My Republican opponent, Congressman Don Bacon, has consistently let down middle class families. He’s voted time and time again against hardworking folks. He voted against lifesaving Covid relief. He voted against lowering the cost of prescription drugs. He voted against cutting taxes for working families. subject: Less than 6 months
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sara Walsh for Congress
body:
People understand I am the most conservative candidate in the race and that I will go to Washington and Defend the American Dream. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/a93fb29d3c54/less-than-6-months?e=4df934edcc)
---
| |
---
| | Friends,

It’s hard to believe, but the August primary is _less than 6 months_ away.

I am so proud of what we’ve been able to accomplish in a short time. A recent survey of primary voters showed me as one of just two candidates in the race with double-digit support. Now, don’t get me wrong: I don’t usually believe the polls, but it’s encouraging to see our hard work is paying off.

People understand I am the most conservative candidate in the race and that I will go to Washington and Defend the American Dream.

I am more confident than ever that I can win this race, **but it is critical that our campaign have the resources we need to take our message to _all_ Republican primary voters.**

I’m humbly asking for your continued support as we enter this critical stage of our campaign.

All contributions, large and small, are graciously welcomed. [**_You can donate $100, $50, $25, or even $5 online here_**](https://saraformissouri.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=84aa3adf8d6ab062aee220759&id=f3d097c2ae&e=4df934edcc).

Through continued prayer and hard work, let’s win this!

God Bless,
Sara Walsh

name: Bob Healey
subject: I have a message for Governor Murphy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bob Healey for Congress |
body:
Let me know if you agree with me on this, friend [](http://links.donatetohealey.com/u/click?_t=b85a497f2e8f41748b694630e904c604&_m=eabca968c18c49c59d47690e460f4ae4&_e=20Qdct1PI6XXuyyZAMorkKMVSR1FPFsoWR3Xr9x7b6cExGrsnod5lygWhXlGtRLl2I3yhRhMSGarYmY2I8mgA0_wKZYTn9aQIoTxmyDXYecjyV6LxDQCaEcFIAho2dp0dhJRql9WHvd8--eS8E1fGKbMNc4Xn2dAGCUBoiiAlj7xn7i0jvLwhZhncv9vmZ8cJ52D9_ZlhSB_ny56bYVAhrjKM3-pJa9GN-BP_cBi9HKQRbv_vOdQ-cTcLBSEA9cWhqZDRrgBdYDQ3Ccl9CEs_85ADJR4TSU67cOl28qiJljSAfPXspTYE3raDda1Z6vBq7ejZq_BIzhwVJGorn-rLRJbYDOOmBUMzFcd7ogWWd-Jnz-fN0KMt7z_9fAoW6uy4wGLAPc3x244UZvelpF1fY2iIKDQo-QVfaQK-40WdL4v0ONcE0gKpZYKBC7ICb29) Friend, Governor Phil Murphy just announced that he will not be removing his restrictive school mask mandate until the middle of March. **I have one question for Governor Murphy: why not NOW?**
_Waiting an extra month on this is just absurd. name: Aadland For Congress
subject: Healthcare reform that actually works
body:
Free market solutions essential to reducing cost
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00194rXDBdUNtvBlQEG8K3X_3jemZC6iU1p3MWqEf6jIMdui9IdBkCzcfMkbtvFaCPC6-sPrDvfqFaKfbeEy_5kQS6Pg4Ad8_MCphi0x7pftg4rMSyOE7mxCSHrQW1vr_EpsmqyE79WfrtPZIJ8AM5nTTnAqQH2wXvY&c=IkgAaOkudxL1ECEjvgb5hQ5WzwCZ-8fywRHmxyFN4auQVNCIMPoxdw==&ch=Jod4xh3CHnCMAN6p6XAvOz6Ts9GIprbknvCfAE5S0wwmZqBrEz5ttg==)
---
|
---
| Healthcare reform that actually works
---
Decisions made at the federal level have lasting impact on us here at home in Colorado. Take for example the Affordable Care Act--that is not affordable.
The ACA, otherwise known as Obamacare, was passed in March 2010. Prior to its passage, House Speaker Nancy Pelosi said, "We have to pass the bill, so that you can find out what is in it."
Colorado soon learned what was in it for them--higher premiums and less service. Anytime government gets involve with subsidies you can guarantee there will be higher costs and more waste. That's exactly what we've seen in almost a decade in Colorado.
Before Obamacare, Colorado offered subsidized healthcare that included preferred provider organization (PPO) health plans. These plans allow a user to access care from providers outside a health network. Following the passage of Obamacare, those plans went away, and the only care provided is by health maintenance organizations--or HMOs. These plans limit the user to a set list of providers, thereby reducing competition in the system. Fewer choices mean higher costs.
With Obamacare came a more complex system of subsidies and administrative overhead, masking the true cost of healthcare. And while Democrats will tout that the ACA insured more Coloradans, premiums increased as well, as much as doubling for certain users.
Additionally, the impact was even greater in rural areas, with the cost of healthcare growing to more than 40% of what it is in the Denver area, compared to a less than 10% gap prior to Obamacare. And the rising costs have forced some insurance providers to leave the marketplace.
The only solution to reducing cost and increasing quality is by reintroducing free market solutions to the equation. Competition reduces cost and increases efficiency. At some point, the government will no longer be able to throw money at the problem and will attempt to reduce cost by cutting quality.
Our medical services are the envy of the world. We must examine the waste in our healthcare system, introduce policies that foster competition, offer services that cross state lines, and enact tort reform.
My commitment to you is that I will pursue change to this nationally mandated health care system and fight for small business owners who have been unequivocally and horrifically been impacted by the ACA.
Join our cause with whatever donation you can make to help send me to Washington. Together we can change policy on a national level that will benefit us here a home.

name: Andy Beshear
subject: Thanks for having my back
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ANDY BESHEAR FOR GOVERNOR
body:
I wanted to take a moment to express my gratitude for this grassroots team. Last week, we faced our first end-of-month fundraising deadline of 2022 where we set an ambitious goal to start the year strong. Peter,

I wanted to take a moment to express my gratitude for this grassroots team. Last week, we faced our first end-of-month fundraising deadline of 2022 where we set an ambitious goal to start the year strong.

**This team once again had my back and with your help, we reached our end-of-month fundraising goal!**

I can't thank you enough, Peter. The 2023 race for governor here in Kentucky will be one of the most important in the whole country, and Republicans are ready to do whatever it takes to win. Your support in reaching our end-of-month goal helps us start this new year off strong and ensure we're prepared for whatever comes our way.

We still have a tough fight ahead of us, but I know that if we keep working together, we can continue making progress for Kentucky.

Thank you,

Andy | | **Andy is fighting to make the Bluegrass State the best place it can be for generations to come, and he needs you on board. Chip in today to become a founding donor of Andy's re-election campaign.** [DONATE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beshear-q1-2022?refcode=em22_220203_eomty_fnd_gq_act___ab_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220203_eomty_fnd_gq_act___ab_ettx&utm_medium=email)

name: Karen Bass
subject: My Public Safety Plan
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Karen Bass for Mayor 2022 (ID # 1441328)
body:
Friend —

At the height of the crack cocaine and gang violence epidemic in Los Angeles, I was treating victims of violent crime in the trauma unit at LAC/USC County Emergency Room. I realized that applying pressure to a patient’s wound might save one life, but it wouldn’t stop our city from bleeding.

That has put me on a lifelong mission to save lives in our city. In 1990, I founded Community Coalition, an intergenerational African American and Latino South LA-based organization that brings together neighbors, students, faith leaders, law enforcement, educators, and non-profit organizations to prevent crime and violence by addressing poverty, substance abuse, and the gutting of supportive services.

**Above all, I firmly believe that the Mayor’s most important responsibility is to keep Angelenos safe.**

But people don’t feel safe today. Whether you’ve had your car broken into, your backpack stolen, your property damaged — or you’ve seen news coverage of home robberies or violent assaults — more and more Angelenos I speak with tell me crime has touched them personally, and they feel scared. That’s not right. All Angelenos deserve to feel safe in their neighborhoods.

**[I know that can only happen by throwing out the old, failed approach of the status quo – which is why today I’m releasing my community safety plan starting with a focus on strengthening existing crime-fighting capabilities while investing in actual crime prevention.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41568939/329390625/-146685763?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS85NDYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMzlmZGIxZC0xYTg5LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vOAXXuWaiLfMyTTvPS0rQztE_CQApfzTmDET5t4yL7k=&emci=a7458b3f-f188-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=039fdb1d-1a89-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=2429742) **

We have to allow our officers to actually focus on fighting crime by using response teams that include mental health, homeless outreach, and other specialists who can respond to people in distress.

When someone commits a crime, they must be held fully accountable. After they serve their time, they need access to resources to fully rehabilitate and successfully re-enter society: employment opportunities, education, and housing.

We’ve tried to arrest our way out of a crime crisis before. It didn’t work. We must build a new crime prevention strategy – a plan that’s rooted in stopping crime at its source, not partisan talking points.

That’s why my community safety plan will be tailored to the unique needs of communities in Los Angeles.

Public safety means different things to different neighborhoods: some communities need increased visibility from police patrols, while other neighborhoods need proven model programs that build trust and cooperation between community members and law enforcement. It’s time to tailor crime response to the needs of individual communities.

Our police officers know as well as anyone: law enforcement is only one piece of the puzzle. Breaking cycles of crime must be the goal. This work of ending the vicious cycle of violence requires prevention, intervention, mental health services, substance abuse treatment, and police reform.

It’s time to go beyond talking points and tired debates. Los Angeles needs a Mayor who will take decisive action to keep our communities safe, using every tool at our disposal. As your Mayor, that is exactly what I will do.

This plan is just the beginning. **[You can read my full plan here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41568940/329390626/-146685763?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS85NDYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMzlmZGIxZC0xYTg5LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vOAXXuWaiLfMyTTvPS0rQztE_CQApfzTmDET5t4yL7k=&emci=a7458b3f-f188-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=039fdb1d-1a89-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=2429742)**
[READ MY PLAN](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41568941/329390627/-146685763?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS85NDYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMzlmZGIxZC0xYTg5LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vOAXXuWaiLfMyTTvPS0rQztE_CQApfzTmDET5t4yL7k=&emci=a7458b3f-f188-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=039fdb1d-1a89-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=2429742)

[ENDORSE MY PLAN](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41568942/329390628/1117607232?ms=em22_220208_pblc_adv_gq_act_sfy_kb_ettx&refcode=em22_220208_pblc_adv_gq_act_sfy_kb_ettx&source=em22_220208_pblc_adv_gq_act_sfy_kb_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220208_pblc_adv_gq_act_sfy_kb_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=TcTX2zvue0qJz5vr0vu0Cg3%2BzdHeCenoJ9q9OL4vl2LB8sB1pRhu2uJ4k7qcOUUcw2l6ml%2BT61DZJ%2B2YJ2rxj2bdyJ5S%2ByVk%2FuKM9LQ4zLUOO8hvasqVnYgXQ3DKnu%2F3nI7Z%2FnIueTF7fWSdn9LRiw%3D%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS85NDYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMzlmZGIxZC0xYTg5LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vOAXXuWaiLfMyTTvPS0rQztE_CQApfzTmDET5t4yL7k=&emci=a7458b3f-f188-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=039fdb1d-1a89-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=2429742)

clean_body: Friend — At the height of the crack cocaine and gang violence epidemic in Los Angeles, I was treating victims of violent crime in the trauma unit at LAC/USC County Emergency Room. I realized that applying pressure to a patient’s wound might save one life, but it wouldn’t stop our city from bleeding. That has put me on a lifelong mission to save lives in our city. In 1990, I founded Community Coalition, an intergenerational African American and Latino South LA-based organization that brings together neighbors, students, faith leaders, law enforcement, educators, and non-profit organizations to prevent crime and violence by addressing poverty, substance abuse, and the gutting of supportive services. Above all, I firmly believe that the Mayor’s most important responsibility is to keep Angelenos safe. But people don’t feel safe today. Whether you’ve had your car broken into, your backpack stolen, your property damaged — or you’ve seen news coverage of home robberies or violent assaults — more and more Angelenos I speak with tell me crime has touched them personally, and they feel scared. That’s not right. All Angelenos deserve to feel safe in their neighborhoods. We have to allow our officers to actually focus on fighting crime by using response teams that include mental health, homeless outreach, and other specialists who can respond to people in distress. When someone commits a crime, they must be held fully accountable. After they serve their time, they need access to resources to fully rehabilitate and successfully re-enter society: employment opportunities, education, and housing. We’ve tried to arrest our way out of a crime crisis before. It didn’t work. We must build a new crime prevention strategy – a plan that’s rooted in stopping crime at its source, not partisan talking points. That’s why my community safety plan will be tailored to the unique needs of communities in Los Angeles. Public safety means different things to different neighborhoods: some communities need increased visibility from police patrols, while other neighborhoods need proven model programs that build trust and cooperation between community members and law enforcement. It’s time to tailor crime response to the needs of individual communities. Our police officers know as well as anyone: law enforcement is only one piece of the puzzle. Breaking cycles of crime must be the goal. This work of ending the vicious cycle of violence requires prevention, intervention, mental health services, substance abuse treatment, and police reform. **Paxton's Patriots Daily Update February 8, 2022**

**Paxton's Patriots Suggested Social Media Post With Clip to Share: **

**Post:** There is no doubt the Biden administration is helping to fund relocations and costs for illegal immigrants. The American people need to know they're being betrayed by this president. Ken Paxton will work tirelessly to secure our border.

**Link: [https://www.newsmax.com/politics/texas-attorneygeneral-kenpaxton-openborders/2022/02/06/id/1055693/](http://links.kenpaxtontx.com/u/click?_t=943205272de64e8b898beb2ebfd45b1b&_m=a4ea6e2b0a0b4b708c44cada426904f9&_e=uGyFnPuyHdH7ZAh_WCTM9PE5GQ3RvWHUm68bSIOvqqhjbKiO0gYwrmC0BhlKtL4xeiJiCKLFD4wBHPbqHUur6g7u16CDVc2clZG0mx9vNuX-OLw5huH1X5WcS2wSdr3bdOCI72_lyUmbpqtPjrfk0WVA0IaxinwRor6_C8FQwTubt6FNZWfo2J01jt4_cwTJAP30Z0uVwENsoZej1OWazepKzgUPepXmMN9gAJkGVpM0YFJ-Jfdfk_gBdZsw7rdz9E8o86KoiSzTere1dXgx_u3zCTBrCDE9jSBUSA3Jpjxe0hljk2ivwgE0a89QyjZoocMZPR8_jDGzzXfzUVbtsbB5pOIZXyZW2_gk-ykO-rA%3D)**

**Theme of the Day: Reckless Endangerment**

As the Biden administration pushes their lawless agenda that has resulted in dire consequences for Texas, Ken Paxton is committed to holding the admin accountable, defending the Lone Star State from burdensome mandates, and championing the conservative values Texans hold dear. Here’s a recap of Ken Paxton’s efforts to defend Texas values and what’s driving the news you need to know: ~ Joe Biden's administration is reportedly seeking to give grants to programs that hand out crack pipes to drug addicts to "prevent infections" and to advance "racial equity." This is truly reckless. Joe Biden should be focused on keeping dangerous drugs off of our streets, not this nonsense. Ken Paxton won't stand for this senseless endangerment here in Texas.

~ Joe Biden's border crisis has led to the highest number of drug-overdose deaths ever – eclipsing 100,000 for the first time. This is simply unacceptable. People are dying every single day from Biden’s open border policies. Ken Paxton will continue his efforts to hold Joe Biden and his administration for their radical and reckless refusal to enforce our immigration law.

~ Across the country, liberal politicians are now ending the mask mandates for children in schools. Ken Paxton opposed mandates in schools from the very beginning and stands ready to defend Texans should these mandates pop up again in Texas.

We encourage you to [share these messages](http://links.kenpaxtontx.com/u/click?_t=943205272de64e8b898beb2ebfd45b1b&_m=a4ea6e2b0a0b4b708c44cada426904f9&_e=uGyFnPuyHdH7ZAh_WCTM9LdKenv4na8EGJJLggnwmUJkAzyUH7H5xciPyfjz57tPRZmeLG7qFPdGCVX0l5YTaRXqYc0jXWV1Lg4CrcnbgqVchMr4U8jlvWAPbwS4XdJ_J3LUt_ryA2kgjmnaKS86Z7nC5gC97PjudadM4jBF_5VV1JUvXJuicYcZnT3KL6AF-M3Ud7R2KscrUjeZNVPkM3wqzLLeodRP8xFVe6n-3D6OlXj0lB8SX7Qp3xUf_rBlesBWzXx9Olog3pWD_u60tg%3D%3D) with your friends and followers on social media. Attorney General Paxton wakes up every day to fight for Texas and our core values, and sharing his efforts with your network will help ensure he can continue his fight on your behalf. Please encourage your friends and fellow patriots to [join our efforts](http://links.kenpaxtontx.com/u/click?_t=943205272de64e8b898beb2ebfd45b1b&_m=a4ea6e2b0a0b4b708c44cada426904f9&_e=uGyFnPuyHdH7ZAh_WCTM9LdKenv4na8EGJJLggnwmUJkAzyUH7H5xciPyfjz57tPbbjDE1lD_8N1z6SByr7IzAsG77iYLYvaL0ApLioWm-r8tOZNI_4sErR4W2PY2TxuPITZoZCwqwzTAWGTKBTIeyrHKr0H4VJ_-_d8-zR-dfIylr5s9Lfc47HfOiC2iJEN2BxkQA_A5237x7jn9tfIdqStpJGxqSEMGsMBr8yU5b39IlK6wWTioaPo7NzqL_cragECS6QjvQXM4IWWgk8TvA%3D%3D) and Paxton’s Patriots to receive these daily updates [by clicking here.](http://links.kenpaxtontx.com/u/click?_t=943205272de64e8b898beb2ebfd45b1b&_m=a4ea6e2b0a0b4b708c44cada426904f9&_e=uGyFnPuyHdH7ZAh_WCTM9LdKenv4na8EGJJLggnwmUJkAzyUH7H5xciPyfjz57tPeVUzB0IhN4CTC1UynOrOTZ_SSyun8tjIaWgRh0N5Oh6uoriG6ElMNBpyXNGtS4bwG70bbEv7PSAqUhQVBsLWb-xNN8cpe2cILdSOOUQ8sw03xJFNe3O9vrCEgbdiFc4vTDdPaGb_fUpMpUimP7sZzvFQRvJ_TbHg5TpwgxFwuR7JN8Q96lll5VzI85LVx_ef3SO5RjO4lVduSenD3kviYw%3D%3D)

clean_body: Paxton's Patriots Daily Update February 8, 2022 | Paxton's Patriots Daily Update February 8, 2022 Paxton's Patriots Suggested Social Media Post With Clip to Share: Post: There is no doubt the Biden administration is helping to fund relocations and costs for illegal immigrants. The American people need to know they're being betrayed by this president. Ken Paxton will work tirelessly to secure our border. Link: Theme of the Day: Reckless Endangerment As the Biden administration pushes their lawless agenda that has resulted in dire consequences for Texas, Ken Paxton is committed to holding the admin accountable, defending the Lone Star State from burdensome mandates, and championing the conservative values Texans hold dear. Here’s a recap of Ken Paxton’s efforts to defend Texas values and what’s driving the news you need to know: ~ Joe Biden's administration is reportedly seeking to give grants to programs that hand out crack pipes to drug addicts to "prevent infections" and to advance "racial equity." This is truly reckless. Joe Biden should be focused on keeping dangerous drugs off of our streets, not this nonsense. Ken Paxton won't stand for this senseless endangerment here in Texas. ~ Joe Biden's border crisis has led to the highest number of drug-overdose deaths ever – eclipsing 100,000 for the first time. This is simply unacceptable. People are dying every single day from Biden’s open border policies. Ken Paxton will continue his efforts to hold Joe Biden and his administration for their radical and reckless refusal to enforce our immigration law. ~ Across the country, liberal politicians are now ending the mask mandates for children in schools. Ken Paxton opposed mandates in schools from the very beginning and stands ready to defend Texans should these mandates pop up again in Texas. We encourage you to with your friends and followers on social media. Attorney General Paxton wakes up every day to fight for Texas and our core values, and sharing his efforts with your network will help ensure he can continue his fight on your behalf. Please encourage your friends and fellow patriots to and Paxton’s Patriots to receive these daily updates | | Pol. Adv. Paid for by the Ken Paxton Campaign Copyright © 2021 Ken Paxton Campaign.

name: Team Greitens
subject: Podcast: Governor Greitens is the “Total Package”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greitens for U
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| PODCAST: GOVERNOR GREITENS IS THE "TOTAL PACKAGE"
---
| St. Louis, MO - Former Missouri governor and Navy SEAL Eric Greitens recently joined the [Steak for Breakfast podcast](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Ig2HbEzfZvexv0zBm102Dm8zL_BTGL98STDxVqzRLZzpUpL91I4uSoayUw57rt29YIMqf_Pe9I68KCqQycxfP1dAAHs_DaDo-9B-k_n0YJjIgm1nIF99_t5EJy6SIVp2nKEoYXISUqJxPyZyhXRVUCOAV99-SK7WRwowmKmEUGlFgBQ9G9UkmaChBXGUeV0H&c=BdbW_6Ur4bMG8cdBqrlW9z6t12NtW1fLFgve69svlAtuQUQB0C1-qA==&ch=M_iei3ikDf4TjpsYtxJUVXXz5XZn-U0-mBJJIszLrJK8NZQ8A3VaSg==) to discuss his vision for this country and why he is running for the U.S. Senate. After the interview, the hosts concluded that Governor Greitens is the "total package."
Listen to the entire [Steak for Breakfast podcast here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Ig2HbEzfZvexv0zBm102Dm8zL_BTGL98STDxVqzRLZzpUpL91I4uSoayUw57rt29YIMqf_Pe9I68KCqQycxfP1dAAHs_DaDo-9B-k_n0YJjIgm1nIF99_t5EJy6SIVp2nKEoYXISUqJxPyZyhXRVUCOAV99-SK7WRwowmKmEUGlFgBQ9G9UkmaChBXGUeV0H&c=BdbW_6Ur4bMG8cdBqrlW9z6t12NtW1fLFgve69svlAtuQUQB0C1-qA==&ch=M_iei3ikDf4TjpsYtxJUVXXz5XZn-U0-mBJJIszLrJK8NZQ8A3VaSg==). Below are a few excerpts:
Governor Greitens on why he is running for U.S. Senate:
"The country is in crisis. It is certainly the biggest crisis it's ever been in my life. As you guys know, I was honored to serve as a Navy SEAL in places like Iraq and Afghanistan. I was in SEAL team training when September 11th happened. We all felt that was a tremendous, tremendous threat to the country. When you look today at what's happening with Joe Biden's open borders, with inflation, the military disaster in Afghanistan, the defund the police movement, Critical Race Theory at home, COVID tyranny. All of these things over and over and over again. It lets everyone know there is a real crisis and I think it's incumbent on all of us--not just people running for office--for everybody to say what are you going to do. I've been saying to people, if you're on the sidelines, you're on the wrong side. We all have to find a way to get involved. Our country is counting on us. Our kids and our grandkids are going to depend on what we do at this moment, and we have got to save the republic."

Why establishment RINO's are hurting the conservative movement:
"What's happened is the people are standing up. People are recognizing that the threat to the country is not only from the left--you see all of their madness, you see all of their craziness with the defund the police movement, with Critical Race Theory, with open borders--the problem in the country has often been the cowardice and the corruption of the Republican establishment. Time and time again, we find that RINO's actually join forces with leftists against the people. You can see this with Joe Biden's Green New Deal, trillion dollar plus infrastructure bill. Nineteen Republican senators joined with them to make that happen and that was wrong. What they should have done and could have done when President Trump was in office was to actually fund a border wall. That makes sense from an infrastructure perspective. But what you see time and time again, they oppose President Trump, they opposed his America First policies, and yet these RINO's are willing to cooperate with the left. It's one of the reasons why I was the first candidate in the country who said when I'm elected and I win this seat in the U.S. Senate, I'm voting for new leadership in the Senate. I'm voting against Mitch McConnell. We need to have real America First leadership. Frankly, every candidate who is running for the Senate needs to be saying the same thing. Make it very clear that we are going to stand with the people not with business as usual."
Governor Greitens also discussed the unmitigated disaster of the border crisis, Biden's disastrous foreign policy, and the left's tyrannical vaccine mandates. [Click here to listen to the entire interview.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Ig2HbEzfZvexv0zBm102Dm8zL_BTGL98STDxVqzRLZzpUpL91I4uSoayUw57rt29YIMqf_Pe9I68KCqQycxfP1dAAHs_DaDo-9B-k_n0YJjIgm1nIF99_t5EJy6SIVp2nKEoYXISUqJxPyZyhXRVUCOAV99-SK7WRwowmKmEUGlFgBQ9G9UkmaChBXGUeV0H&c=BdbW_6Ur4bMG8cdBqrlW9z6t12NtW1fLFgve69svlAtuQUQB0C1-qA==&ch=M_iei3ikDf4TjpsYtxJUVXXz5XZn-U0-mBJJIszLrJK8NZQ8A3VaSg==)

subject: You only have until 11:59 PM to continue your support streak Your continued membership streak is at risk. Renew before it’s too late >>>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
For the last 2 years, you have consistently stood by House Republicans’ side. You’ve supported the Conservative fight furiou
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zpo8hid8k3norbr68bvdhqnkl1dljal5phrmecrg_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37d1m65qbfctjmkrncst66uqrf91ieoob9crl6uie5sj2udgj4o9hcerrccri6cpn1ohmmhpmechk6ppj6sb7m6om6pbimlon1d30s4oe0ttnq9o74oj6e2p6cs74mdhmfchkcoo79ddgcup36phh62p6co70mlhm1o5l64oracdle8gq48bi4bh28or1c5j6ao31cphm49fg)

| |
---
| | | **ATTN: Your Republican Membership has EXPIRED**
For the last **2 years** , you have consistently stood by House Republicans' side. You've supported the Conservative fight furiously and consistently through every battle we've seen, **but we have bad news for you. **

**It pains me to have to tell you that for the first time ever, you 've failed to renew your Republican Membership and have lost your support streak.**

There's good news though. I spoke with leadership about this special circumstance, and they have allowed us to extend our Membership renewal period to **[11:59 PM TONIGHT.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7jcsjt2ahvcs97ubvrho0bbjq5kabunpofolrs8_rp22sh2s8i66ob1cpim0ob6cdh2bs "11:59 PM TONIGHT.")**

**[Are you going to renew your 2022 Membership and become a sustaining Republican Member for 2 consecutive years, or have we lost your support to the Left and you are going to let your streak fade away?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zam5kv3dtplrgdj69is5vckh99b31j8o5ogu2j40_rp22sh2s8i66ob1cpim0ob6cdh2bs "Are you going to renew your 2022 Membership and become a sustain Republican Member for 2 consecutive years, or have we lost your support to the Left and you are going to let your streak fade away?")**

---
| | | [RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zup8uk3t6rirlqn0hvea8jvnfnsng1r9hn9jif80_rp22sh2s8i66ob1cpim0ob6cdh2bs "RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP")
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2znj128gdl9upbas6n3qeihlf61509gtbsaiek6g8_rp22sh2s8i66ob1cpim0ob6cdh2bs)
---

We're approaching the biggest battle of our lives. The 2022 Midterm Elections will be the toughest election we've seen yet, and we need our strongest grassroots supporters on our side.

**The Democrats raised over $130 MILLION last year alone.** We're already behind, but with your help, we can close the gap, and take back the Conservative Majority in Congress.

You only have until **[11:59 PM](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zlrvioct7uu3nmldog3cv9m3ju19p0aqrfesflgo_rp22sh2s8i66ob1cpim0ob6cdh2bs "11:59 PM")** to let us know if you plan to stand against the Left and their radical socialist agenda for a 3rd year in a row. **[Renew before it's too late >>>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zkjm8iel9v23jok5am24mfcm53vl1buu23v2a6g8_rp22sh2s8i66ob1cpim0ob6cdh2bs)**

Americans across the country are counting on you. Don't let them down.

Thank you,

Mark, National Republican Membership Office

---
| |
* * *

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zshl8jb0q5q9vvjnbvmgngormn6vggg3a3mtaeb0_rp22sh2s8i66ob1cpim0ob6cdh2bs "Red Wave Image Link")

Pelosi's raising MILLIONS and spending MILLIONS MORE attacking freedom-loving patriots across the nation. We need each and every patriot who sees this to join the fight. If we fall even a dollar short, we will lose the House to Pelosi FOREVER.

**[Can we count on you to step up?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zg0t97tn899i7kgb6rsggb42sjfbsd3g7b093jl0_rp22sh2s8i66ob1cpim0ob6cdh2bs "Fellow Conservative, can we count on you to step up?")**
---
| | | [DONATE](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zun4g8cant7olbamqqvimtl7tltm6cbsvpmejt88_rp22sh2s8i66ob1cpim0ob6cdh2bs "Donate Button in Footer")
---

Thank you for your continued support and thank you for being a dedicated member of our team.

---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zaijsvlqs24ja2ckptgjdsu4vmne09od2d79q7d0_rp22sh2s8i66ob1cpim0ob6cdh2bs)

Yadira believes in this community because she’s lived here almost her entire life.
The whole interconnected web of neighborhoods that stretch from Thornton up to Greeley is more than just a place for Yadira: It’s home. It’s where her immigrant parents achieved their dream of providing a better life for their kids than they ever could’ve imagined for themselves.
But today, people here are struggling, and Yadira has seen firsthand what years of neglect has cost her community. She sees it in the kids who come to her clinic suffering from asthma worsened by wildfires, in the parents who work multiple jobs to put food on the table, in the workers who have no defense against the greed of giant corporations that drive their pay down and force them to work under awful conditions.
**The people of this community deserve so much more. This race to elect Dr. Caraveo to Congress is about them.**
[**So, if you can, chip in $8 at the link below so we can win CO-08 and send Dr. Caraveo to fight for our families in Washington.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41557222/329334141/355891186?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220208eightbucks_C4Cweb_allop_xx_l2&amount=8&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MzBiMGRmYy1mMzg4LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zPelhFj_bTuOoEftH_bXd2neJeZ-vdrMey0r9LLFvLQ=)

Phil Arballo is a Latino, a Central Valley native, a father, and a husband. And he's running for Congress in California.
