name: Tyler Harper for Georgia
subject: Tyler Harper Raises Nearly $1 million for Agriculture Commissioner Campaign
body:
---
| | | | | | | |
---
|
---
| | |
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE TUESDAY, FEBRUARY 8, 2022
---
| TYLER HARPER RAISES NEARLY $1 MILLION IN CAMPAIGN FOR AGRICULTURE COMMISSIONER
---
| OCILLA - Today, the Tyler Harper for Agriculture Commissioner campaign announced that it raised $951,341 since entering the race in June of 2021. Tyler's campaign ended the [reporting period](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001NjRqNViCvLbm17OCkyPjRwwzrZ7Oc9uayIa-nS9_JybIA07dOd9KlblMIVwtdQK8LnWutxw-6iA_d5Emt3M5vrkMG-z2JFqtUxOZc0CiqNjxy2ykdk7c2u2mBmd4UeKbAVsQvaFmqCnsYmMTpeClxYIYru9fVk2Lu1kTIIV16VGRXtOtnWPv_0455ACEJUhFtc63eCiFVtgA9bopSyZSxyrG-L5iKxN3hDyFpvXFEzE8B65YvvDWMHV2y1lljaTOxXnYGzhT0gcPSgpIX5lnyK0LLWxx_PkNgQOUb62iJjIjZX8ZhWjYGPHP_Ss918YFmjnDOjVEg-IomIfq4PSkkI7uyxcdLTH0JqsdK1-uXKvtMmfAKRYSNLx3kmcM9hY9EAgs9ORriy6c51jO9_1m0Mf0BHcDSXPLQRJfQ7l2tjk=&c=jnfMtY5PBWnYQNvdOsVs2uupGNUK5A2nnXX36_Gfqcw9NMGl7e-OLw==&ch=KnBKmsHsN89QObwZEKsDe-dgEBcoN8pGVPoEKFSHTbq6EDMXWG6KJw==) with more than $824,000 cash on hand. With no announced Republican opposition, the clear lead in fundraising, and grassroots support and endorsements from across the state, Tyler Harper is in a strong position to become Georgia's next Commissioner of Agriculture.
---
| "I am humbled and grateful for the financial support our campaign has received from grassroots supporters, farmers, and producers across our great state," said Tyler Harper. "From Camden County to Catoosa County, we've been traveling the state, meeting with hardworking Georgians, and sharing our positive vision to fight for our farmers, producers, and consumers and advance our state's number one industry. I look forward to continuing to meeting with as many folks as possible, building momentum in our campaign, and delivering a big win for Georgia families as our state's next Agriculture Commissioner."
---
|
---
| | |
---
|
About Tyler Harper
As a 7th generation farmer and small businessman who still uses his grandfather's tractor in the fields tending the same land that his family has had for over 100 years, Tyler Harper has a deep, personal appreciation for Georgia's agricultural industry - and the millions of local growers it supports. Since 2013, he has worked to defend Georgia's largest sector as a State Senator - where he currently serves in leadership on the Natural Resources, Public Safety, and Agriculture Committees. Additionally, Tyler currently serves as the Agriculture & Rural Development Vice-Chair of the Southern Legislative Conference. Over the years, he has championed our farms and farmers, worked to make them more competitive at home and abroad, and help cultivate the next generation of Georgia agriculture. As your next Agriculture Commissioner, Tyler will ensure our food supplies are kept safe, making sure that our families are fed. He will always put Georgia agriculture first and fight the overreach of Washington, D.C.
In addition to his work to protect agribusiness, Tyler Harper has also been a champion for conservative values. He supports President Trump's America First policies. He worked with Secretary Sonny Perdue to deliver results for Georgia. Tyler strongly supports secure borders, fully funding our law enforcement, strengthening election integrity, the sanctity of life, and our God-given 2nd Amendment rights. For his efforts, Tyler has earned an "A+" rating from the NRA, has been rated 100% pro-business by NFIB, and was deemed a "Defender of Liberty" by the American Conservative Union.
Tyler Harper lives in Ocilla and is a lifelong resident of South Georgia. He graduated from the University of Georgia with a bachelor's degree in Agricultural Engineering and holds an associate's degree from Abraham Baldwin Agricultural College. He is an active member in his local community and has helped lead organizations across the state - from his local rotary club, to the Georgia Young Farmers Association, to the UGA College of Agriculture and Environmental Sciences. When he is not serving the state at the Gold Dome or working on the family farm, Tyler can be found enjoying the outdoors - or at Satilla Baptist Church, where he plays in the band every Sunday.
---
| | |
---
| Visit www.tylerharperga.com to stay up to date with the campaign, sign up to volunteer, and donate. Follow along on Tyler's campaign for Agriculture Commissioner on [Facebook](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001NjRqNViCvLbm17OCkyPjRwwzrZ7Oc9uayIa-nS9_JybIA07dOd9Klb2yNdT5zPmVCsaTrljq789CsKofpD3dLmnwEw-YK8DKzNjd_jtJdUsEWkpvAQZVT8xr-_wBXCCCkn06D_j9zcTTf2znAvTlIq5N89gCfBMem-VwrfkZ6us=&c=jnfMtY5PBWnYQNvdOsVs2uupGNUK5A2nnXX36_Gfqcw9NMGl7e-OLw==&ch=KnBKmsHsN89QObwZEKsDe-dgEBcoN8pGVPoEKFSHTbq6EDMXWG6KJw==), [Twitter](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001NjRqNViCvLbm17OCkyPjRwwzrZ7Oc9uayIa-nS9_JybIA07dOd9Klb2yNdT5zPmVvlAy4oa1udwf4K6ZsHJzdANrdY7Xqpf66ZV6SeXDL-279ZL6KagZ2SUKixZtfpWKPvn7RqpZ4BWb1aCd1ec1m8BOgwCUWO40&c=jnfMtY5PBWnYQNvdOsVs2uupGNUK5A2nnXX36_Gfqcw9NMGl7e-OLw==&ch=KnBKmsHsN89QObwZEKsDe-dgEBcoN8pGVPoEKFSHTbq6EDMXWG6KJw==), and [Instagram](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001NjRqNViCvLbm17OCkyPjRwwzrZ7Oc9uayIa-nS9_JybIA07dOd9Klb2yNdT5zPmV-vTJ_HUZRsa_N2xvd9a263jZO7wVdZbOG5Q0VPb932JlAZeZmKAKWG_nVvzqZmHzP59_507ESYIAiW5fN9vPKkRi69dqCA1V&c=jnfMtY5PBWnYQNvdOsVs2uupGNUK5A2nnXX36_Gfqcw9NMGl7e-OLw==&ch=KnBKmsHsN89QObwZEKsDe-dgEBcoN8pGVPoEKFSHTbq6EDMXWG6KJw==).

clean_body: | | | | Friend, If you’ve been looking for a way to fight back against the relentless march of socialism... ...if you’ve been looking for a way to challenge those who want big government and their constant spin and lies ... ...and if you’ve been looking for a way to reclaim your individual liberty from the woke mob that seeks to destroy American ideals , look no further! Marc is on a mission to restore freedom and dignity for the people of Oregon. The recent abuses of power wielded by top-ranking politicians and unelected bureaucratic agency leaders have pushed Oregon into a declining and poorly-run state that many choose to flee. This is a tough race and Marc continues to stand firm and do what’s right—even in the face of adversity—to fight against agenda-driven policies and politics as usual. If you stand for help us reach our fundraising goal. We can’t succeed without you! | | | | | Together we will finally restore freedom and dignity for all people of Oregon! Marc Thielman for Governor | JOIN US | | | | ELEGRAM PAID FOR BY THE MARC FOR OREGON COMMITTEE Marc For Oregon P.O. Box 95, Bend, 97709

name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: “Inappropriate”
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GREENE FOR CONGRESS INC
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59497888:JSNqffEuN:m:1:3298722022:642A6F5EC522323FABBC39C23931675E:r "Tweet") Peter: When President Trump spoke about pardoning some J6 defendants, it was a reasoned response to the over-prosecution, and frankly persecution, of non-violent protestors caught up in the events of that day. It makes sense to people like you and me, but not to RINO Lindsey Graham, who had the audacity to call Trump's words **" inappropriate."** Let me tell you what's "inappropriate," Sen. Graham - RINOs like you and Liz Cheney kowtowing to Pelosi and the liberal' witch hunt against defenders of our freedoms! **[Help me fight back against the RINO's assault on J6 protestors and save our Republic with your generous donation of $25 or $50 today!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59497888:JSNqffEuN:m:1:3298722022:642A6F5EC522323FABBC39C23931675E:r "Help
me fight back against the RINO’s assault on J6 protestors and save our Republic with your generous donation of $25 or $50 today!")** You know what, let's talk about what else is inappropriate. [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59497888:JSNqffEuN:m:1:3298722022:642A6F5EC522323FABBC39C23931675E:r "Video")Not knowing exactly what information Pelosi had about J6 and why she didn't call in extra security even though she was warned of potential violence? **That 's inappropriate.** J6 defendants being treated worse than the BLM/Antifa members who literally burned down cities and attacked police officers? **That 's inappropriate.** "Hands off my body" is okay when murdering an innocent child in the womb, but verboten when it comes to unproven vaccines? **That 's inappropriate.** **[This is what I'm fighting against in the Swamp... Hypocrites in my own party doing the dirty work of Biden and Pelosi. Help me fight back against these unjust attacks by chipping in $50, $100, $250, or whatever you can afford today.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59497888:JSNqffEuN:m:1:3298722022:642A6F5EC522323FABBC39C23931675E:r "This is what I’m fighting against in the Swamp...
Hypocrites in my own party doing the dirty work of Biden and Pelosi. Help me fight back against these unjust attacks by chipping in $50, $100, $250,
or whatever you can afford today.")** [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59497888:JSNqffEuN:m:1:3298722022:642A6F5EC522323FABBC39C23931675E:r "RINO")I'm being attacked on all fronts for simply following President Trump's example and pushing for equal treatment under the law for the non-violent J6 protestors. **Talk about "inappropriate!"** But I'm undeterred. I refuse to let RINOs like Lindsey Graham or Liz Cheney be the arbiter of what's inappropriate. The Bible and the Constitution are the two things that guide me on what is appropriate or not. It's what's guided me in life, in Congress, and it scares the living daylights out of turncoats like Lindsey and Liz. That's why the Deep State establishment and leftist media are doing everything they can to stop me. They made my district more blue. They've even got a fellow RINO to challenge me in the GOP primary. **That 's why my team has set a fundraising goal of $42,781.53 that I need to raise by midnight tonight** to defend my seat from the RINOs determined to silence people like me who speak the truth! **[I need you to dig deep and help me fight for the heart and soul of our country. Whether it's $25, the federal maximum donation of $2,900, or any amount in between, I need your support today.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59497888:JSNqffEuN:m:1:3298722022:642A6F5EC522323FABBC39C23931675E:r "I need you to dig deep and help me fight for the heart and soul
of our country. Whether it’s $25, the federal maximum donation of $2,900, or any amount in between, I need your support today.")** It's time to stop the inappropriate RINOs from doing the dirty work for the Left, and with your help, we can show them that America First is never inappropriate! **[Donate today.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59497888:JSNqffEuN:m:1:3298722022:642A6F5EC522323FABBC39C23931675E:r "Donate today.")** Thank you. God Bless America. [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59497888:JSNqffEuN:m:1:3298722022:642A6F5EC522323FABBC39C23931675E:r "Marjorie Taylor Greene")
Marjorie Taylor Greene
Congresswoman (R-GA)

name: Jeremy Hunt
subject: This is IRRESPONSIBLE
body:
Peter, Our national debt now tops **$30 trillion.** Democrats have taken their socialist spending too far - it’s time for responsible leadership who won’t bury the next generation in our debt. Growing up in Georgia, my father taught me that _nothing_ is given away for free. Financial responsibility, grit, and common sense are all necessary to make it in America - so why won’t our politicians follow these principles when running the country? I’m sick of Democrats spending beyond their means, and I know you are too. **That’s why I put together a petition to STOP socialist spending and FINALLY address our national debt, and I need every patriot to sign it.** [**Please sign our “Stop the Debt” petition TODAY and tell our politicians to stop spending beyond their means!**](http://links.huntforgeorgia.com/u/click?_t=af56c613b6e04613b0408d69d59cb1ec&_m=01a8f480f7de4cdcbdf57977fd24ab42&_e=Vcpu4DZIjARVF_nuejCtGfIFYo7Sks9RUY3ps7sjGhc6fEnnYaozgbvoEZiZ_C7fWGUVPfVLNDgD-T6YFkAYwI58V-8jzTc8UBHpMfH5VbXaaU-AHcXVRgsgTrtvcu5o1rEstDUNE3XH4Zuiu1YRlS4GANvx6yhFXMZyoKida2S-ALp0oD-OYC1DQ1lKHN75SP5HWmXWt3ROVSB4_NldIjLetIQQNQfQ5jIfNBThkjZ4b6twwwWa2GRpoiEUIfLHxkelqaPetYvEVs8O_3bv0To3RhYVmWraVnJhnIrfAp2K7XTCAeTxVAcGYpbn1rgFc452gPmk4AfMrLMIlZwBvxsBW9oy7hjej-pFTIxY0LHzgiedE8IZ3tzO6F77EDl1_NHG46hUqscdvPXpPZ30jQ%3D%3D) [**SIGN THE PETITION**](http://links.huntforgeorgia.com/u/click?_t=af56c613b6e04613b0408d69d59cb1ec&_m=01a8f480f7de4cdcbdf57977fd24ab42&_e=Vcpu4DZIjARVF_nuejCtGfIFYo7Sks9RUY3ps7sjGhc6fEnnYaozgbvoEZiZ_C7fWGUVPfVLNDgD-T6YFkAYwI58V-8jzTc8UBHpMfH5VbXaaU-AHcXVRgsgTrtvcu5o1rEstDUNE3XH4Zuiu1YRlS4GANvx6yhFXMZyoKida2S-ALp0oD-OYC1DQ1lKHN75-JUxQnI_NHzU7O9EkucaZRLgq9aHqSKl-MMBWAeEnbtT04QyJcCj81vQ202J8spBtF2-Lzfwe9dOeWtv6bChW2oaFaTNVFRVI2tmodbLVAPEZih003c0Be2DWXupNyHlgcNfZGPCEwNQB35aEwSW5UfF_WcSaADcaAK1vSh3LqHgo-sI4AOTLgzcW_5xuM2DqDrIacOL9k9hWVcQEkv-JA%3D%3D) Thank you, Jeremy Hunt Paid for by Jeremy for Georgia Contributions to this committee are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. Folks, I have an important favor to ask you:

**[If you can, I need you to pitch in to my campaign to help defeat Governor DeSantis. And if you’ll give me just a minute, I’ll explain why your donation right now is so important.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41570943/329400246/414784906?refcode=20220208_f_2_ND&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZWUzNThlMS0yNDg5LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wmr6dJIzGWa-OdIuRcDGkMQN9R9r7gmP97QEjYOUO4E=)**

The scary truth is that **I’m worried about Florida’s future** if we allow Governor DeSantis another term. If we don’t defeat him now, he’s going to continue playing politics with our health, our voting rights, our reproductive freedoms, and more.

The good news is **Governor DeSantis is vulnerable** : Recent polls show his approval ratings dropping, and even better, they show me within the margin of error or flat-out beating him.

But we can’t start getting complacent. Governor DeSantis has **an army of extreme right-wing billionaires** ready to spend and do whatever it takes to secure his re-election. That’s why I’m counting on grassroots supporters like you to help fight back.

**So team, please don’t wait. Pitch in now to help us keep building our momentum so we can defeat Governor DeSantis and finally get to work on building a Florida for all:**

body:
Frank LaRose is the Joe Rogan of election integrity
We can’t let the curtain close on January just yet!
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41560327/329349697/37056448?refcode=logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTM5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NTcyNjc4My1mYjg4LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RxZiefped2Tn7KOVWUFPnUZsBHdy6AWMSuZa4rsCMO8=)
---
Listen Team, Frank LaRose is the Joe Rogan of election integrity and I am sick of it. While Joe Rogan defends himself on spreading dangerous misinformation about COVID, LaRose is doing the same about our nation’s elections. They both hide behind the same tired excuses of “just asking questions” and that “there are bad people on both sides.” This is just disgusting; even nonpartisan groups are calling it out as dangerous. So, here is the plan:
* Keep calling him out
* Organize our hearts out in Cuyahoga, Lucas, Athens, Franklin and (my hometown) Allen counties
* **Win!**

Here’s how you can help:
* Take a second to hit the forward button, shoot this out to all the chain emails you’ve been getting, and get your network involved.
* Join our team of grassroots activists by replying to this email with your interest.
* You knew this one was coming... [DONATE! Seriously, can you chip in $25 for us to order pizza for the office (we have to get veggie, meat lover’s and Hawaiian)?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41560328/329349698/37056448?refcode=text&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTM5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NTcyNjc4My1mYjg4LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RxZiefped2Tn7KOVWUFPnUZsBHdy6AWMSuZa4rsCMO8=)

**[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41560329/329349699/37056448?refcode=button&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTM5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NTcyNjc4My1mYjg4LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RxZiefped2Tn7KOVWUFPnUZsBHdy6AWMSuZa4rsCMO8=)** Thank you for being there for me, Chelsea | | | Democrat Chelsea Clark is a small business owner, a city councilwoman, a sixth-generation farmer, and a single mom. She's running to be Ohio's Secretary of State because the constitutional right to vote is under attack. Chelsea will fight to make sure that we all have access to vote, that all votes are counted, and that our elections are safe and secure.

**[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41560330/329349700/-182240488?refcode=EM_FR_220131EOM_EOM_TC_NK_6_NG_N_BioBox&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTM5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NTcyNjc4My1mYjg4LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RxZiefped2Tn7KOVWUFPnUZsBHdy6AWMSuZa4rsCMO8=)** Paid for by Chelsea Clark For Ohio 30 Garfield Place, Suite 900, Cincinnati, OH 45202

You knew this one was coming... = = Thank you for being there for me, Chelsea | | | Democrat Chelsea Clark is a small business owner, a city councilwoman, a sixth-generation farmer, and a single mom. She's running to be Ohio's Secretary of State because the constitutional right to vote is under attack. Chelsea will fight to make sure that we all have access to vote, that all votes are counted, and that our elections are safe and secure. = Paid for by Chelsea Clark For Ohio 30 Garfield Place, Suite 900, Cincinnati, OH 45202 www.chelseaforohio.com to receive fewer emails. name: Clay Aiken
subject: I WISH I could find the old computer files…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Clay Aiken for North Carolina
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/94965/images/Clay%20Logo%20Light.png]
Let me set the stage...
*
I
was
in
8th
grade
at
Leesville
Middle
School
in
Wake
County
*
Bill
Clinton
was
running
for
President
*
Jim
Hunt
was
running
for
his
third
term
as
Governor
I didn’t know what it meant to be a member of Congress at the time, but... I mean... I did know that Terry Sanford and David Price were also running for office that year. Little did I know that those two public servants would become my political idols...
Team, have you ever heard the phrase “you need to see it to dream it?” Well that describes my first encounter with Congressman Price. Fun fact... he was the first politician I ever met. Frankly, meeting him opened my eyes. I saw a public servant who cared about showing up. It didn’t take long for me to pick up the phone myself and ask Congressman Price to come speak to my middle school class.
That class visit changed my life. I was inspired. I’m sure if my mom found our old IBM PS1 computers, you would find 13 year old Clay’s Print Shop designed congressional campaign posters.
I’m honored to pick up the baton from David Price and hopefully inspire others with our campaign. Today, I’m asking you to get involved. Find and use your voice on our campaign.
Give To Team Clay’s Election Fund [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ca_email?refcode=02082022_CongressmanPrice_1&amount=25]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ca_email?refcode=02082022_CongressmanPrice_1&amount=25]
Sign Up To Volunteer With Team Clay [https://secure.ngpvan.com/QVt_jPUTUUeJqAp-98v6og2]
sign up [https://secure.ngpvan.com/QVt_jPUTUUeJqAp-98v6og2]
It’s a real honor to run for office in the place where I first became interested in politics and where I first found my voice. I am ready to show up for our community the way that David Price taught me to all those years ago. Will you join me? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ca_email?refcode=02082022_CongressmanPrice_1&amount=25]
Clay
Clay is running for Congress in the North Carolina 6th. He was born, raised, and is currently raising his son in the Triangle. He's running to use his voice to speak up and stop the loudest voices on the far ends of the political spectrum from sucking up all the oxygen in our political discourse.
Donate now to join the chorus and help send Clay to Congress. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ca_email?refcode=footer&amount=25]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ca_email?refcode=footer&amount=25]

Fellow Conservative,

Democrats just went public with their online fundraising data for the second half of 2021, and the numbers we're seeing across the board are astonishing.

**Democrats are proving once again, as they did in 2020, that they're going to give us Republicans a run for our money - quite literally - in this year's midterm elections.**

If you've been following our Senate race in Georgia, then you already know polling shows our race is a dead heat. You may also know our Democrat opponent, Senator Raphael Warnock, is the #1 fundraiser in the entire country. But what we're now learning is that he raised over $11 million from an astounding 410,276 donors ONLINE in the last six months.

**Fellow Conservative, that's a lot of money from a lot of donors.** In fact, he's building a massive online network of Democrat donors on the scale of a presidential campaign - not a normal Senate campaign.

That's why we're reaching out to you today with a simple request: **[will you join our grassroots army of conservative PATRIOTS who will propel us to victory in Georgia and flip the Senate in favor of Republicans?](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=21bb7dd1beb04f748a3a17805057a953&_e=GtFZLlYZxQyU6p48bA4PUyBuJ7jp38hGd4XCOSZjlE_vjGhl2UXu09OvIxTgqCKU9ik_iwfRrryWo3odUvPP37yBBA9Qdb7qhaijzsjmKhET1s43q2iO4n4-ZxOlwuJ5hugzEydyx_V6Yv29hVgxMzYUeRYsyI1PxLGLHicRdODDFrzpHMBcIQhUYoIdLNnyTUVaFwgXunZGVGVt5Ib1ekbcnHsaSqvww0sFnecQ1FQ0IdjzQS-Y1c-jE38Ofbrss3dkGykTyXJN2SgPmub3PdWJoifg63LTNN4BIUjsjiER9PET47mhyCLpOvaWd3ouy9G83T9apGDhFbQZNSFDd1dTs-nkr-IuF1yGUzn45NhbDswrb5p4WCYRpaR_9wPQzJdLpgVune7nJr7z3-JgFWLIEB-2Tr6hwks_gOzihJC_sa4iMqHKw41DLaAHX6Qu0rQw6PTcT8r0VkIZMVG2Lg1Cr9-jU8wcJ1jD9KworMo%3D)**

**This month, we're setting a goal of recruiting 10,000 new donors so we can begin closing the financial lead that our opponent holds over our campaign at the moment.**

**THERE IS NO SUGARCOATING THE FACTS. Our opponent is raising A LOT OF MONEY.**

Before we ever thought about entering the race, Senator Warnock was raising millions of dollars from hundreds of thousands of Democrat donors around the country. Thanks for your consideration,

Herschel Walker
Republican Candidate for Senate

name: Michael, NRCC Communications Director
subject: RE: Please don’t let your membership expire!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Dan Crenshaw asked me to reach out to you personally to extend an exclusive membership deadline till February 15th for you.
& nbsp; &nb; sp;
Not interested? [Unsubscribe Here](https://trk.cp20.com/form?3genw--fgxr-4qqlpo3&sl=2d&t=5&ac=gh7s)

| | Want to FIRE Pelosi? **Text FIRE to 21818** to help House Republicans take back the House for the American People.
---
| | | Hello Patriot,

I am reaching out with an URGENT NOTICE. **You failed to renew your 2022 Membership and it has LAPSED. **
---
| | | [RENEW NOW](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3genw-1x918-4qqlpo0/ "Generic Button")
---
Dan Crenshaw was upset to not see your name on our 2022 Membership list. He asked me to reach out to you personally to **extend an exclusive membership deadline till 11:59 PM TONIGHT for you. **

**[Will you answer Dan Crenshaw's plea and renew your 2022 Membership?](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3genw-1x919-4qqlpo1/ "Will you answer Dan Crenshaw's plea and renew your 2022 Membership? ")**

As Crenshaw said, renewing your membership is one of the most important things you can do to help House Republicans win back the Majority in 2022.

I don't know about you, but I am fed up with Speaker Pelosi and her Radical Left Minions. They are destroying this country with their COVID Mandates, free speech bans, and open borders. We must hold Pelosi accountable and get her FIRED in 2022.

**[We can't do it without you though. That's why I NEED you to renew your 2022 Membership before the extended February 7th, 11:59 PM deadline.](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3genw-1x91a-4qqlpo1/ "We can't do it without you though. That's why I NEED you to renew your 2022 Membership before the extended February 7th, 11:59 PM deadline. ")**

You are _crucial_ in this fight.

Don't let Dan Crenshaw or the rest of the House Republicans down.

---
| | | [RENEW NOW](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3genw-1x91b-4qqlpo2/ "Generic Button")
---

Thank you,

Michael
NCCC Communications Director

\--------- Forwarded Message ---------
From: Dan Crenshaw
Subject: Please don’t let your membership expire!

It’s Dan Crenshaw. I’m reaching out to let you know that your current 2022 Membership status is listed as _EXPIRED_.

---
| | | [RENEW NOW](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3genw-1x91c-4qqlpo3/ "Generic Button")
---

Let me tell you why renewing your 2022 Membership is so important:
1.Beating Nancy Pelosi’s House Democrats is going to be impossible without YOU on our side.
2. This is the most important election of our lifetimes – it will truly decide whether or not America chooses the failed socialism of the Left or the freedom and prosperity of conservatism.
3\. Your 2022 Membership is _essential_ to showing Pelosi that our grassroots donors are more powerful than her evil dark money cronies.

---
| [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3genw-1x91d-4qqlpo4/)
---

Because we have yet to hear from you, your membership lapsed. **But I have good news: we have extended our deadline until midnight on February 7th.**

---
| | | [RENEW NOW](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3genw-1x91e-4qqlpo5/ "Generic Button")
---

I can only extend this offer to you for a limited time – but it’s critical you renew your 2022 Membership before the deadline. If we fail to make our mark, the Liberal Media, pollsters, and pundits will say it’s indicative of the electoral outcome and everything will snowball.

**[Please, I’m humbly asking: renew today>>>](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3genw-1x91f-4qqlpo6/ "Please, %%=v\(@sFirstName\)=%%. I’m humbly asking: renew today >>>")**

Sincerely,

Dan Crenshaw

---
| | | [RENEW NOW](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3genw-1x91g-4qqlpo7/ "Generic Button")
---
| |
* * *

[](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3genw-1x91h-4qqlpo8/ "Red Wave Image Link")

Pelosi’s raising MILLIONS and spending MILLIONS MORE attacking freedom-loving patriots across the nation. We need each and every patriot who sees this to join the fight. If we fall even a dollar short, we will lose the House to Pelosi FOREVER.

**[Can we count on you to step up?](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3genw-1x91i-4qqlpo9/ "Can we count on you to step up?")**
---

---

Thank you for your continued support and thank you for being a dedicated member of our team.

name: Giffords
subject: Anything we can say to convince you to contribute $3 to win a big legislative fight in Maryland?
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
What if we told you the gun lobby was fighting us tooth and nail from getting this done?
#

Friends —
Is there anything we can say to convince you to make a $3 contribution to Giffords today?
What if we told you we were in the middle of a big legislative fight in Maryland, working to defeat a bill that would allow anyone to legally go online and buy a do-it-yourself gun kit — no background check required?
What if we told you the gun lobby was fighting us tooth and nail from getting it done?
Now, we know not everyone getting this email lives in Maryland. But maybe you know someone who does. And even if you don't, hopefully the idea of saving a life of someone you don’t know is enough to motivate you to contribute today.
Because the truth is, we will never win this fight in Maryland to defeat a bill that would allow anyone to legally go online and buy a do-it-yourself gun kit — no background check required — unless everyone plays a part. It all adds up. So we’re asking:
[**Can you please make a $3 contribution to Giffords today to help us defeat a bill that would allow anyone to legally go online and buy a do-it-yourself gun kit — no background check required in Maryland? It all adds up when we’re all chipping in. That’s how we win. That’s how we save lives.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-feb22?refcode=em220208-1-15&t=1&refcode2=1537_3935704_LXrW__&akid=1537%2E3935704%2ELXrW__)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_

| **[Donate $100](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-feb22?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em220208-1-15&t=23&refcode2=1537_3935704_LXrW__&akid=1537%2E3935704%2ELXrW__)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-feb22?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=em220208-1-15&t=24&refcode2=1537_3935704_LXrW__&akid=1537%2E3935704%2ELXrW__)**

****

name: Mark Kelly
subject: my decision
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
I have about 15 minutes of free time in my schedule today. I know that doesn’t sound like an extraordinary amount of time
#

[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-feb22?refcode=em220208-1-7&t=1&refcode2=2082_6688874_gxt2Yr&akid=2082%2E6688874%2Egxt2Yr)

Friends —
I have about 15 minutes of free time in my schedule today. I know that doesn’t sound like a lot of time, but with a schedule like mine I can assure you it’s a gift.
And while I know our campaign sends a lot of emails your way, I want to take a few of those minutes to tell you about my decision to run for Senate in the first place, and why your support is so important in our success.
The truth is, when Gabby and I first started talking about running, we weren’t sure what to expect. We knew that Arizona needed new leadership in the Senate — someone who would always put the people of our state first, who was willing to work across the aisle to deliver real results, and who would prioritize building bridges between parties — not burning them down.
We also knew we had some friends who would help us out. But when you’re talking about such a big campaign, we’d need support from a lot of people we hadn’t met yet as well. Especially since I was making the decision to reject corporate PAC money.
You know the rest... we won in 2020 in large part because we ran the biggest grassroots campaign Arizona has ever seen.
But now we have a new mission: Re-election.
And right now, the polls are really tight. If we’re going to win again, it’s going to take a similar level of support from people like you.
So please:
[**Can you make a $3 contribution to my re-election campaign for U.S. Senate in Arizona? The amount you give isn’t as important as the number of donations we receive. Because it all adds up when we’re all chipping in.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-feb22?refcode=em220208-1-7&t=2&refcode2=2082_6688874_gxt2Yr&akid=2082%2E6688874%2Egxt2Yr)

clean_body: I have about 15 minutes of free time in my schedule today. I know that doesn’t sound like an extraordinary amount of time Friends — I have about 15 minutes of free time in my schedule today. I know that doesn’t sound like a lot of time, but with a schedule like mine I can assure you it’s a gift. And while I know our campaign sends a lot of emails your way, I want to take a few of those minutes to tell you about my decision to run for Senate in the first place, and why your support is so important in our success. The truth is, when Gabby and I first started talking about running, we weren’t sure what to expect. We knew that Arizona needed new leadership in the Senate — someone who would always put the people of our state first, who was willing to work across the aisle to deliver real results, and who would prioritize building bridges between parties — not burning them down. We also knew we had some friends who would help us out. But when you’re talking about such a big campaign, we’d need support from a lot of people we hadn’t met yet as well. Especially since I was making the decision to reject corporate PAC money. You know the rest... we won in 2020 in large part because we ran the biggest grassroots campaign Arizona has ever seen. But now we have a new mission: Re-election. And right now, the polls are really tight. If we’re going to win again, it’s going to take a similar level of support from people like you. So please: If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly: | | ** | | | | | | | Thank you again. For everything. Mark Kelly ** Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate

name: Sheriff Joe Lombardo
subject: They’re laughing off the crime crisis
body:
Take it from a Sheriff - there’s nothing funny about rising crime rates that leave innocent Americans at risk.
---
| | | | | | |
---
[ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001FWCwDEtOztXikfEwK1N85lsOGApzvB1ivfbz7DKYtkBiv2QbbTVeHyTTeiox1GIe7gitHHmZAF_ODOFmhBDJK7QSbE58IdutNllgrz_3gZgZbtkh0xrgAAn1MNivUZIYKbGts1_nBA_8FEA8o71t_ITqemiCVeRay44ePTYEbRvfyMiprCD_lJ2XnNKUcKVwa2nRh_0trUJTHqu9FprE0SSPcF79hSg4orkKpnhjdpw=&c=jZYmD054kFABbWQwQWMMb1cSisedax4ZemNuFU-20H8VnVhRUiWB3g==&ch=jkRuwdBDPHl2XMBKH9Z9yGlnibfMo8FWLE9snOscCjgMENURuqm3EA==)

|

| Peter,
Take it from a Sheriff - there's nothing funny about rising crime rates that leave innocent Americans at risk.
But apparently, no one told that to the Biden Administration...
Even with a recent spike in crime - including multiple cities across the country seeing record homicides - they're hoping to dismiss these concerns, with Biden's Press Secretary even calling them an "alternate universe."
[Keep NV Safe from Rising Crime! ->](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001FWCwDEtOztXikfEwK1N85lsOGApzvB1ivfbz7DKYtkBiv2QbbTVeHyTTeiox1GIe7gitHHmZAF_ODOFmhBDJK7QSbE58IdutNllgrz_3gZgZbtkh0xrgAAn1MNivUZIYKbGts1_nBA_8FEA8o71t_ITqemiCVeRay44ePTYEbRvfyMiprCD_lJ2XnNKUcKVwa2nRh_0trUJTHqu9FprE0SSPcF79hSg4orkKpnhjdpw=&c=jZYmD054kFABbWQwQWMMb1cSisedax4ZemNuFU-20H8VnVhRUiWB3g==&ch=jkRuwdBDPHl2XMBKH9Z9yGlnibfMo8FWLE9snOscCjgMENURuqm3EA==)
Take a look:
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001FWCwDEtOztXikfEwK1N85lsOGApzvB1ivfbz7DKYtkBiv2QbbTVeHyTTeiox1GIemFF2LcYVYyIML8664IQt0A9C9K_EXZNpEGY7WiqrZ8Z6j6sWYzgu5NwNnKamR2ZlzcO-SP3mqMNL9vKJ2mNs5dlI0elIwwTfNOdCI9AkEZaTG3gI4vwDAniJHL3xOMyTRmnmm2seFKD7IJmFfopKfEtAZ9JLtPVSL_4szq2RNhvoHo0ZQj10W2u9hC8J3VnUf6luP5xUWbEc3VC1St2EUg==&c=jZYmD054kFABbWQwQWMMb1cSisedax4ZemNuFU-20H8VnVhRUiWB3g==&ch=jkRuwdBDPHl2XMBKH9Z9yGlnibfMo8FWLE9snOscCjgMENURuqm3EA==)
---
| As someone who's served in law enforcement for over 30 years, I know just how detrimental it can be when politicians don't take public safety seriously.
And it's exactly why I'm running for Governor against Steve Sisolak this year - he's also shown this indifference to crime, with upside down policies that make the rights of criminals more important than ours.
We can't afford to have this mentality... If we do, law-abiding Nevadans will continue to be put at risk!
You deserve better than leaders who laugh off rising crime - in fact, you deserve a leader who will keep you safe from it.
---

name: Doug White
subject: There’s something I need to talk to you about –
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DOUG WHITE FOR CONGRESS
body:
| |
---
Friends,

First, I want to thank you for your support over the last few months. Unlike my opponents who are backed by special interests and wealthy corporate donors, I rely on people like you to run this campaign. I am extremely grateful that you have decided to engage in this fight.

**Together, we are laying the foundation for a better future for all our families by rejecting ultra-rich politicians like Dan Newhouse, who have repeatedly failed to represent our interests in Congress.**

There’s no better example of this than when Newhouse voted against the historic infrastructure bill – which would create jobs, lower child poverty rates, make critical investments in infrastructure like broadband and take the first steps towards a clean energy future.

I talked about these priorities in a recent Zoom. I received strong feedback. Many in the district share my disappointment at Newhouse’s failure to confront or even acknowledge the urgent challenges we face in WA-04.

The reality is that our economy is struggling. Families are in distress. The threat climate change poses to our community and the livelihood of farmers across the region is dire.

Rural communities like ours can no longer be ignored.

As we scale up our campaign in the next few weeks, I’d like to keep in closer contact so that I know where you stand on these issues. Will you share what your top priorities are now so that I can ensure they are addressed? [TAKE THE SURVEY](https://secure.ngpvan.com/T4zJbpQc6EixLCabu852EA2)
**Please take this opportunity to weigh in with your priorities so that I can bring the leadership WA-04 needs and deserves now. I can’t do this without you.**

I’ll be in touch,

Doug

| PAID FOR BY DOUG WHITE FOR CONGRESS
---

clean_body: | | Friends, First, I want to thank you for your support over the last few months. Unlike my opponents who are backed by special interests and wealthy corporate donors, I rely on people like you to run this campaign. I am extremely grateful that you have decided to engage in this fight. Together, we are laying the foundation for a better future for all our families by rejecting ultra-rich politicians like Dan Newhouse, who have repeatedly failed to represent our interests in Congress. There’s no better example of this than when Newhouse voted against the historic infrastructure bill – which would create jobs, lower child poverty rates, make critical investments in infrastructure like broadband and take the first steps towards a clean energy future. I talked about these priorities in a recent Zoom. I received strong feedback. Many in the district share my disappointment at Newhouse’s failure to confront or even acknowledge the urgent challenges we face in WA-04. The reality is that our economy is struggling. Families are in distress. The threat climate change poses to our community and the livelihood of farmers across the region is dire. Rural communities like ours can no longer be ignored. As we scale up our campaign in the next few weeks, I’d like to keep in closer contact so that I know where you stand on these issues. Will you share what your top priorities are now so that I can ensure they are addressed? Please take this opportunity to weigh in with your priorities so that I can bring the leadership WA-04 needs and deserves now. I can’t do this without you. I’ll be in touch, Doug | PAID FOR BY DOUG WHITE FOR CONGRESS PO Box 9674, Yakima, WA 98909 Doug White is running to represent Washington’s 4th Congressional District in Congress. To support his campaign, = or =. Email is the best way for our grassroots movement to stay in touch, but if you need to, you can unsubscribe here: . name: Alessandra Biaggi
subject: Please let me explain
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alessandra Biaggi for Congress
body:
When I first started talking about running for State Senate against a longtime, powerful incumbent, people said I wouldn’t have a chance.
#
Friend —
In just a moment, I am going to ask you to become one of the first contributors to my campaign for Congress. Please give me a chance to explain why this request is so important.
When I first started talking about running for State Senate against a longtime, powerful incumbent, people said I wouldn’t have a chance.
But I looked at the leadership around the state, and I wasn’t able to see the type of leader I wanted, or that our communities deserved.
I am so proud of the work we have done in the State Senate, including codifying legal abortion as well as passing significant tenant protections and landmark climate legislation.
But now, I want to take our fight to Congress — because there just aren’t enough representatives who prioritize the needs and the concerns of working people of ALL backgrounds and from ALL communities. We don’t just need to elect Democrats — we need to elect good Democrats.
That’s why I am running.
But this time, we aren’t going to be able to take corporate special interests who would love to beat someone like me by surprise.
That is why this Founding Donor drive is so important. It’s not even just about how much money we raise, but how many donations we receive toward our goal.
So please:
[**Can I count on you to make a $3 contribution to my campaign for Congress? It’s not about how much money we raise, but how many people are contributing to our campaign.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biaggi-launch-feb/?refcode=em220208-1-15&refcode2=449_59515_l-fd1j&akid=449%2E59515%2El-fd1j)
**[CONTRIBUTE $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biaggi-launch-feb/?refcode=em220208-1-15&refcode2=449_59515_l-fd1j&akid=449%2E59515%2El-fd1j)**
Thank you again for everything. It’s been an amazing twenty-four hours since we launched. Let’s keep it going.
Alessandra

Paid For By Alessandra Biaggi for Congress
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.alessandrabiaggi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1&akid=449%2E59515%2El-fd1j).

name: Dr. Martin
subject: The WHY behind people’s decisions to run for office
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Jason Martin for Tennessee
body:
| Hey Peter — this situation that my team wrote to you about yesterday got me thinking about the _why_ behind people’s decisions to run for office. For me, the answer is easy: I got into this race because I’ve dedicated my entire life to improving the lives and livelihoods of everyday people — and running for Governor is an extension of that. I want to improve the lives of ALL Tennesseans in whatever way I can. For Bill Lee and the GOP, the _why_ seems to always come down to power for power’s sake. **Their attempt to silence the voices of hundreds of thousands of Tennesseans shows that they will do whatever it takes to perpetuate a broken status quo that keeps them propped up while doing absolutely nothing for working people.** [**With 9 months to go, we’ve got to keep pushing so that we can put an end to the corruption and self-dealing in Tennessee politics. Will you chip in a few dollars today to keep our campaign going strong?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41561556/329355512/1963061330?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220208gerryman2_dm_op_xx_pt_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYzFjM2EzMi0wMDg5LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=c_sdjVNIhvf8H5LQ4FD7GEdTHsJCKySOv4mWWc2xhMg=) | [Donate ➞](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41561558/329355514/1963061330?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220208gerryman2_dm_op_xx_btn&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYzFjM2EzMi0wMDg5LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=c_sdjVNIhvf8H5LQ4FD7GEdTHsJCKySOv4mWWc2xhMg=)

Hey Peter.
Last month, the GOP supermajority in Tennessee’s General Assembly made their most breathtaking power grab yet — and Governor Bill Lee just enabled them. (Again.)
The plan that GOP party bosses crafted behind closed doors — that Bill Lee just signed into law — illegally consolidates power in our state. It cracks and packs Black, brown, and minority voters into gerrymandered districts, silencing the voices of hundreds of thousands of Tennesseans.
We need a Governor who will do the right thing and always put people before partisan power grabs, because **“we the people” means we get to decide who is elected — not politicians deciding who their voters are.**

clean_body: | Hey Peter — this situation that my team wrote to you about yesterday got me thinking about the why behind people’s decisions to run for office. For me, the answer is easy: I got into this race because I’ve dedicated my entire life to improving the lives and livelihoods of everyday people — and running for Governor is an extension of that. I want to improve the lives of ALL Tennesseans in whatever way I can. For Bill Lee and the GOP, the why seems to always come down to power for power’s sake. Their attempt to silence the voices of hundreds of thousands of Tennesseans shows that they will do whatever it takes to perpetuate a broken status quo that keeps them propped up while doing absolutely nothing for working people. = | = Thank you so much for your support. Dr. Jason Martin \--------Forwarded message-------- From: Martin for Tennessee Date: January 7, 2022 Subject: The Tennessee GOP’s most breathtaking power grab yet = Hey Peter. Last month, the GOP supermajority in Tennessee’s General Assembly made their most breathtaking power grab yet — and Governor Bill Lee just enabled them. (Again.) The plan that GOP party bosses crafted behind closed doors — that Bill Lee just signed into law — illegally consolidates power in our state. It cracks and packs Black, brown, and minority voters into gerrymandered districts, silencing the voices of hundreds of thousands of Tennesseans. We need a Governor who will do the right thing and always put people before partisan power grabs, because “we the people” means we get to decide who is elected — not politicians deciding who their voters are. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Dr. Martin hasn’t spent his career in back rooms making shady, unethical deals like this one with out-of-touch lawmakers desperately clinging to power in whatever way they can. And as someone who comes from far outside the political establishment, he’s exactly what we need right now to restore decency and honest representation to our politics. Team Martin | Dr. Jason Martin is running for Governor because now more than ever Tennessee needs a leader who will start working to meet all of our needs. As an ICU physician, Dr. Martin has seen firsthand the devastating consequences of lies, corruption, and divisiveness in Nashville. This campaign — by and for ALL Tennesseans — is the antidote. = | = | Paid for by Dr. Jason Martin for Tennessee Dr. Jason Martin for Tennessee 1831 12th Avenue S #175 Nashville, TN 37203 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41571614/329403806/1254848285?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNWJlNmE1Mi0yYTg5LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=73AN4PZcAU7cqbYhPeUCW7r-LUUmgSIX-tL0e7vUG7c=&emci=7b809987-1189-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=a5be6a52-2a89-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=23594672) | |
---
Peter, Marjorie Taylor Greene is now inciting a civil war within the GOP.

Over the last few months Marge has been threatening a National Divorce, threatening Republican sitouts, and now she is trying to destroy her own party. **When is enough enough?**

Marjorie stated that, “no one likes to watch people fighting, and we're supposed to support one another - respect and obey Reagan's "11th commandment." But If we are truly going to stop the assault on our freedoms and stop what's happening to our country, where America is just being able to be sold out to the rest of the world, we have to lean into this civil war in the GOP.”

The hypocrisy is almost unbelievable. **She claims that we should stop fighting and support one another, yet she actively censured two members of her own party and is now calling for more infighting to take place?**

There is one thing Marjorie Taylor Greene is good at: **spreading hateful rhetoric that divides our nation and her own party.** I wish we had a representative that put their efforts into fighting for our constituents instead of being a bully.

When I’m elected, _I will stand up for Northwest Georgia_. Regardless of divisive rhetoric, shifting times, and partisanship my constituents will come first. **[We will bring change to GA-14, and that starts with unseating Marjorie Taylor Greene.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41571615/329403807/-804235033?refcode=em0208&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNWJlNmE1Mi0yYTg5LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=73AN4PZcAU7cqbYhPeUCW7r-LUUmgSIX-tL0e7vUG7c=)** **[Rush $14 today if you’re with us.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41571616/329403808/-804235033?refcode=em0208&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNWJlNmE1Mi0yYTg5LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=73AN4PZcAU7cqbYhPeUCW7r-LUUmgSIX-tL0e7vUG7c=) **

Thanks for your support,
Holly McCormack.

clean_body: | | Peter, Marjorie Taylor Greene is now inciting a civil war within the GOP. Over the last few months Marge has been threatening a National Divorce, threatening Republican sitouts, and now she is trying to destroy her own party. When is enough enough? Marjorie stated that, “no one likes to watch people fighting, and we're supposed to support one another - respect and obey Reagan's "11th commandment." But If we are truly going to stop the assault on our freedoms and stop what's happening to our country, where America is just being able to be sold out to the rest of the world, we have to lean into this civil war in the GOP.” The hypocrisy is almost unbelievable. She claims that we should stop fighting and support one another, yet she actively censured two members of her own party and is now calling for more infighting to take place? There is one thing Marjorie Taylor Greene is good at: spreading hateful rhetoric that divides our nation and her own party. I wish we had a representative that put their efforts into fighting for our constituents instead of being a bully. When I’m elected, I will stand up for Northwest Georgia. Regardless of divisive rhetoric, shifting times, and partisanship my constituents will come first. = = Thanks for your support, Holly McCormack. | = | | | | | ---|---|---|--- Paid for by Holly for Congress Holly McCormack for Congress 862 Lafayette St PO Box 1035 Ringgold, GA 30736 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

# Statements by Donald J. Trump, 45th President of the United States of America
Donald J. Trump February 8th, 2022 If AT&T/DirecTV cancels OAN, I hope that everyone will boycott and cancel DirecTV. It is a very popular channel, far more popular than most would understand, and they are being treated horribly by the Radical Left lunatics running the networks. Instead of being allowed to grow, their voice is being shuttered. Don't let it happen, cancel DirecTV. If you feel infringed by what this Communist movement is doing, cancel DirecTV! | [View Post](http://email.conservativesunited.co/c/eJxdkM1ugzAQhJ_G3EB4MTE9cGibRmoOTXqI2hsy_glOjSFgh-bta1LSQ6WVLc-3Hu2sKKnImMCRLiGFUGmBaUrSIiFKklrglaopUZBzRFLe2VEOF-b0RY7eaidFwruoKQvCH2oKXOW8IArjgtXAck6IyhkuOI5M2TjXjyh7RLAJNU1TIjrLjDi5wbd9sGmDbOU0Lldcw-mbO-_HC84hR9nGu7ZqpdC-RdlatkwbBKtZHDs_cBlEy03F2t5odV0QD0-mjzbAe7xYyXrwbLhWhWsq3wvm5L27s05a9-sUf6jDV7Y9vEw84MoaLQL4JzZahFDr7f7x9W1vo6EU_aSN0eOKhn0d5yHnaNEyVYnoEwK4_QK4bQPg812d6PmYneOdkDHZpXZm8BxOd-3lX-PikSzRAdH1D1v1jus)

Donald J. Trump February 7th, 2022

| | | We’re disgusted – the RNC just referred to the January 6th Capitol riots as “legitimate political discourse” and voted to censure Reps. Liz Cheney and Adam Kinzinger, members of the January 6th Committee. The violent insurrection at the Capitol was a direct attack on our democracy. We may disagree with Liz Cheney on 90% of issues, but Cheney and the January 6th Committee are committed to uncovering the truth and getting to the bottom of what happened that fateful day. But pro-Trump Republicans are terrified of what the January 6th Committee will uncover. They’ll do anything to derail and discredit this investigation. We can’t let this investigation be shut down – it’s too important. We need to show Liz Cheney and the rest of the January 6th Committee that we have their backs. [Sign your name: Stand with Rep. Liz Cheney and the January 6th Committee >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta7d9073c-1277-4f8e-b606-213e4a124293/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

body:
Another liberal politician showing hypocrisy regarding 'masking up.' | [](http://links.amandamakkiforcongress.com/u/click?_t=8965a0767ffa477684a41cb5767552cd&_m=7270ca9d1f3440ceaf937fadefbb8560&_e=aDWSAnn6_uUNgUrWBX8tmSMezeXI_l8exhT2tTxzQ_WXe-I0XxJ7Y2EXGFUI3XEHQ6d995NY1tBqSXQDq6HZJC2l3NgvNcZiUl2-s-7qok9S3rJNyqVjMirZnR9yU63WN1YD-ootPX6Rt3ZzMg23DDHQaqm3PXLbW_O5T-irAA1qmBHOI8T57Y2XCZ4ibbrRXK88I9oWhoVTw8lEc2GRxi97YYW3YmYKTV7-1SJGWqsD6ck3UoVX2RQRon9B8PDgjqVewqaFOZxWFvTasw6jMecx4o3sn0u34fPDTYIfsHn5bpQ0M0NF5PoxU6tCh8fw5eGm_95VB0JQULxEpRnaoLbefPbz1pAmqlnRaC8as9033CXNxmcl72ZqZIdoelGiQ8202Sxe8HhvqCzOOLc9DAQSdfRCK-Yj1r7-Y5UeFAE%3D)
---
Peter -

I'm sure you saw this last weekend—another liberal politician showing hypocrisy regarding _'masking up.'_

[ ](http://links.amandamakkiforcongress.com/u/click?_t=8965a0767ffa477684a41cb5767552cd&_m=7270ca9d1f3440ceaf937fadefbb8560&_e=aDWSAnn6_uUNgUrWBX8tmSMezeXI_l8exhT2tTxzQ_WXe-I0XxJ7Y2EXGFUI3XEHQ6d995NY1tBqSXQDq6HZJC2l3NgvNcZiUl2-s-7qok9S3rJNyqVjMirZnR9yU63WN1YD-ootPX6Rt3ZzMg23DDHQaqm3PXLbW_O5T-irAA1qmBHOI8T57Y2XCZ4ibbrRXK88I9oWhoVTw8lEc2GRxs7V7C39aZ8UKkmIp0_CMWFrp-AiioSs5qCNEp1AcPLPTlrzp1XvW6XSrBcWsmsgo0wpJxKaFF5B9Pv8Om-XMrmhNiD9e-TiEUziUb1wBuRN8eKhQ00xFcl66-OV-fhnq5FFJZ1aEWc2telZ9W8dcZnxqYlwO75wCcyealmWUk1ul33EsPuHh5rrOazE11YlCaZEp8ykCI6VcRUUyTcX9J8%3D)

Stacey Abrams was sitting in front of a room of masked children maskless. Her reasoning for not wearing a mask? **She didn't think the children could hear her if she spoke while wearing a mask.**

**Liberals like her are the reason kids have to listen to their teachers through masks and miss out on valuable emotional and educational development.**

The Left is doing reprehensible and irreversible damage to our nation's children. Conservatives know this, and red states like Florida have taken steps to protect our children from the negligence of the Left.

This November, Republicans have the opportunity to take back the House. We can right the wrongs that the Biden Administration has done over the last 14 months and block their efforts until we can elect a Republican President. [**But we need to make sure that the right Republicans get there.**](http://links.amandamakkiforcongress.com/u/click?_t=8965a0767ffa477684a41cb5767552cd&_m=7270ca9d1f3440ceaf937fadefbb8560&_e=aDWSAnn6_uUNgUrWBX8tmSMezeXI_l8exhT2tTxzQ_WXe-I0XxJ7Y2EXGFUI3XEHQ6d995NY1tBqSXQDq6HZJC2l3NgvNcZiUl2-s-7qok9S3rJNyqVjMirZnR9yU63WN1YD-ootPX6Rt3ZzMg23DDHQaqm3PXLbW_O5T-irAA1qmBHOI8T57Y2XCZ4ibbrRXK88I9oWhoVTw8lEc2GRxnpjbAHJkxZZ4m9PYGI1kpZCIf2PhTHWJgf39Z37cjyGsgV9Kaj4X8HLvgDj1tw0j7YMqsLefme8QTnxSfw4yQaODJufJlaj-wqJXriXdtLr2emjLwsGq2IA19FQ06O7WaM8IF8TYUmnsUVTXnWkNL2W98muLGYSTkP5uofnXjsYwo_WWUbemhCyFQcWBPWH_qdAsVtmbJCWTvbgmbZ6c5c%3D)

clean_body: Another liberal politician showing hypocrisy regarding 'masking up.' | Peter - I'm sure you saw this last weekend—another liberal politician showing hypocrisy regarding 'masking up.' Stacey Abrams was sitting in front of a room of masked children maskless. Her reasoning for not wearing a mask? She didn't think the children could hear her if she spoke while wearing a mask. Liberals like her are the reason kids have to listen to their teachers through masks and miss out on valuable emotional and educational development. The Left is doing reprehensible and irreversible damage to our nation's children. Conservatives know this, and red states like Florida have taken steps to protect our children from the negligence of the Left. This November, Republicans have the opportunity to take back the House. We can right the wrongs that the Biden Administration has done over the last 14 months and block their efforts until we can elect a Republican President. For the sake of our children, can you help me take down my RINO opponents and ensure that a true Conservative like me is elected to Florida's 13th Congressional District? | | | ---|---|--- No child should be forced to cover their face for 8 hours a day, and Republicans need to make sure that mask mandates are blocked coast-to-coast. We need strong conservatives in the House to make that happen, not RINOs with questionable allegiances. Sincerely, Amanda Makki Republican for Florida's 13th Congressional District | Amanda Makki is an America First candidate for Congress in Florida's 13th District. Friend --
With the recent finance reports coming out last week, there were some shocking revelations we needed to tell you.... **It turns out Billionaires from California, New York, and Illinois are bankrolling the Democrats in Wisconsin.** While the Republican Party of Wisconsin relies on grassroots activists like you for support, millionaire liberals that **_include George Soros_** are pumping millions of dollars to Democrats in Wisconsin to push their far-left agendas. **Take a look below to see the some of the shocking statistics:**
* Almost 70% of dollars raised by Wisconsin Democrats came from 7 individuals with an average donation of over $500k.
* 6 of the 7 individuals are from CA, IL, and NY.

* There was 2X more money coming from CA, IL, and NY than from WI.

* **George Soros and IL Governor J.B Pritzker each contributed hundreds of thousands** of dollars to Democrats in Wisconsin.

##### ** Statistics based on donations from individuals to the Democratic Party of Wisconsin on their ‘21 state finance reports
[**Far-Left billionaires are trying to buy our offices.****Are you willing to chip in to help us compete with the Democrats who are backed by millionaire liberals?**](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYo--3UqFRYFg8Lsn0cgAtTvheTZIBulG9nsDqgd8dcDVzM25x9HOkSirVmFdTe74INIfpQwjEh7eadW_w7ESZv4&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=millionaire_libs_1&n=2) The Republican Party of Wisconsin uses these funds to fight for election integrity, provide support to candidates across the state, and prepare to win big in 2022! | Peter,

When I first launched this campaign for Congress, I never could have imagined the journey that would unfold. I’m grateful for every moment of it. **And I’m especially grateful that you’re along for the ride with me!**

New York just enacted new congressional maps. Our district lines have changed, and the field in which we’re competing has changed. But one thing has remained crystal clear, from the first day of this campaign until now: Upstate New Yorkers are ready for change.

We’re ready to give every working family a fair shot at the Middle Class. And we’re ready for a representative who will fight for us instead of selling us out to corporate PACs and special interests.

**That’s why I’m reaching out today, Peter. This is my first request of you since we announced we are continuing our campaign in New York’s new 22nd Congressional District.**

_**[Will you chip in $5 to become an NY-22 Founding Donor in this next step of our journey? subject: Meet Shuwaski Young: Candidate for Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shuwaski Young for Congress Shuwaski Young for Congress
body:
Friend, **My name is Shuwaski Young, and I am a Democrat running for Mississippi’s Third Congressional District** to replace Michael Guest and build a brighter future for all of us, strengthening this community we call home. Mississippi has a proud history of leaders who created the community we find around us. Today, we need a representative in Washington who will deliver results for each of us, rather than focusing on partisan bickering. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41572426/329407484/508494021?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTI3MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZGI2NDBiNC0yZDg5LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Wv1phxT4d-d7HsaVZvGZHONPPYUaH9FA4xLJKxk_q88=&emci=a0c2117d-0c89-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=3db640b4-2d89-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=15376731) I have a broad base of support that includes people of all races, genders, socio-economic levels, sexual preferences and political orientation. It is time we unite as one people to build our future together. **We are in times that call upon all of us to speak truth to power,****this is unfettered systematic racism**. clean_body: Friend, My name is Shuwaski Young, and I am a Democrat running for Mississippi’s Third Congressional District to replace Michael Guest and build a brighter future for all of us, strengthening this community we call home. Mississippi has a proud history of leaders who created the community we find around us. Today, we need a representative in Washington who will deliver results for each of us, rather than focusing on partisan bickering. I have a broad base of support that includes people of all races, genders, socio-economic levels, sexual preferences and political orientation. It is time we unite as one people to build our future together. We are in times that call upon all of us to speak truth to power,this is unfettered systematic racism. You can stay up to date with our campaign by checking out our , , , and . =. = In order to bring big changes to Mississippi, we are going to need a strong backing of friends and supporters. I look forward to continuing to push forward and going on to flip this seat from red to blue! Sincerely, Shuwaski Young Paid for by Shuwaski Young for Congress Shuwaski Young for Congress PO Box 151 Jackson, MS 39205-0151 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

subject: I filed it
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
body:
Decertify AZ |
---
| | [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=f4ad98232c&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| | Dear ,
The last few days have been a whirlwind, but I wanted to take a few minute here to give you a crucial update on what I am doing in the Arizona Legislature.

**After tremendous work, research, and collaboration with key figures like Senator Wendy Rogers, I have introduced legislation to the House to decertify three 2020 county elections: Maricopa, Pima, and Yuma.**

Everything involved in these elections in these counties scream fraud and that they are irredeemably compromised.

The following form the grounds for this groundbreaking and historic legislation:
* Article I, section II of the US Constitution provides the power to make ultimate decisions over electors to the State Legislature.
* The Supreme Court has supported this, stating that “whatever provisions may be made by statute, or by the state constitution, to choose electors by the people, there is no doubt of the right of the legislature to resume the power at any time.”
* There is a common law principle that anything arising out of fraud is void ab initio, and can be rescinded. This has been applied to remove a sitting elected official (Marks v. Stinson).
* The margin of error, exceeds the margin of victory, undermining the integrity of the election in these key counties – making it impossible to declare a winner.

**And this is blowing up, right now.**

_The President, Donald J. Trump, has immediately issued his support:_
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=83d73d39fd&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| Big news in Arizona, indeed!

**Thank you, President Trump, for your support in this key effort.**

While there is no doubt that this legislation is absolutely critical and necessary, this will require a significant amount of resources to get the word out and make sure that this legislation passes.

[_And I am humbly and sincerely asking your support, joining me, Senator Wendy Rogers, Senator Sonny Borrelli, and other America First Patriots, in pushing the first domino down in repealing the long chain of fraudulent outcomes of the 2020 election._

_Please donate today to help us Decertify the 2020 election!_](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=adbfcee62b&e=44b8c466b0)
---
|
---
| HCR 2033 will go down as historic – a bill which enables and empowers the people to take back control of elections from the shadow elite, those who have robbed, stolen, and cheated the election from the beginning.

**And this needs to pass! The country has backslid to worse than Obama-era times under the mis-administration of Joe Biden. And at the root of all of this? **

_That which is irredeemably compromised and endemically broken. The 2020 election._

**I ask you once again – _stand with me, Representatives Barton, Biasiucci, Burges, Carter, Chaplik, Diz, Fillmore, Martinez, Nguyen, Parker, and Senators Borrelli, Rogers, and Townsend._**

[_This started with the grassroots and will end with the grassroots. I need your support today to get this through!_](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=b1503abd06&e=44b8c466b0)

_[Can you help out with a donation of $25, $50, $100, $250 or more?](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=86999f63cf&e=44b8c466b0)_

[Thank you for your support!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=6514e77e29&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=fd94964bb5&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| Mark Finchem

Arizona House of Representatives – District 11
Republican for Arizona Secretary of State
Conservative
Election Integrity Patriot

P.S. [Please contribute today.](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=76fcdfdf3b&e=44b8c466b0)

PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE

Mark Finchem for Secretary of State15508 W Bell Rd.STE 101-423Surprise, AZ 85374

body:
The Senate race in Georgia will most likely be the most expensive race in the country this year, so we can’t do this without you on board. The Senate race in Georgia will most likely be the most expensive race in the country this year, so we can't do this without you on board. |
[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=93bec06e2c334fcd9a97046c3ec84666&_e=vqDfMRgwOlVyWZ6bO5W9qiyKVCQcZqG_93-nlwTth1goGep-f_005OkbCIIJfggtzBzVwwuaH-SdaOKfrH-NRtEu1-tUdI0yH1JUkAvO5C4dhkBWHjQwG8orludZCetA9siufXz0Kx96KuKlHti2taWtsm8SXZRSZUVt6S3Ux1xhlDEc2ooYDGD6YOgYnGMJ9uHBE6Nvt6J3YOphpMvHmLo0YHdimJ-tPEVQJmDnJPL4dVKd1u2TF1oXJTwUTjm3o-J4YZmAX8c1S9k6upzLZuhxPZWpcTw7CzRTohX5Vwfrt4OL5uZ15PPzFLLgJMl0XU8gf3RUM_xXB8kFseTm-D55SEkBo4TRtdP7byc2RFYZD-CxwMK_ZH1fIEk-Fj_6YBYluuFqGWFzfoRtjiD7PjDsibfYnu-Lg4ZQfItWVfIi4L6kTeYcxHJtLAgqLXdFmdv-VR20p1dByLvMStrpa1CJAXqCLx1SMtbqLgjPtRA%3D)

---
Peter,

Democrats just went public with their online fundraising data for the second half of 2021, and the numbers we're seeing across the board are astonishing.

**Democrats are proving once again, as they did in 2020, that they're going to give us Republicans a run for our money - quite literally - in this year's midterm elections.**

If you've been following our Senate race in Georgia, then you already know polling shows our race is a dead heat. You may also know our Democrat opponent, Senator Raphael Warnock, is the #1 fundraiser in the entire country. But what we're now learning is that he raised over $11 million from an astounding 410,276 donors ONLINE in the last six months.

**Peter, that's a lot of money from a lot of donors.** In fact, he's building a massive online network of Democrat donors on the scale of a presidential campaign - not a normal Senate campaign.

That's why we're reaching out to you today with a simple request: **[will you join our grassroots army of conservative PATRIOTS who will propel us to victory in Georgia and flip the Senate in favor of Republicans?](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=93bec06e2c334fcd9a97046c3ec84666&_e=vqDfMRgwOlVyWZ6bO5W9qiyKVCQcZqG_93-nlwTth1goGep-f_005OkbCIIJfggtzBzVwwuaH-SdaOKfrH-NRtEu1-tUdI0yH1JUkAvO5C4dhkBWHjQwG8orludZCetA9siufXz0Kx96KuKlHti2taWtsm8SXZRSZUVt6S3Ux1xhlDEc2ooYDGD6YOgYnGMJ9uHBE6Nvt6J3YOphpMvHmLo0YHdimJ-tPEVQJmDnJPL4dVKd1u2TF1oXJTwUTjm3vMhilVtGpsEpdtzRHtSEQHVoidatIjh8iIpagQDZGKVax2-H0XIqbwfxymo2W_SaLQ6adMlWLmjc_PXBxd--DmvPJsUA2n-RAaZyJFN1JsOhZcit8wxx_9XFP1EB93Vq3iciLZm3JJAch0-oBcVJNdJXCoBqsWEZIvuK2gXiE2TJIT0HdRxoa-z2N4JcOdiWJSlwT2NEE0Xo2GKZWnup3dERFyi5BdcLDl-wQH0EuwU%3D)**

**This month, we're setting a goal of recruiting 10,000 new donors so we can begin closing the financial lead that our opponent holds over our campaign at the moment.**

Democrats are proving once again, as they did in 2020, that they're going to give us Republicans a run for our money - quite literally - in this year's midterm elections. If you've been following our Senate race in Georgia, then you already know polling shows our race is a dead heat. You may also know our Democrat opponent, Senator Raphael Warnock, is the #1 fundraiser in the entire country. But what we're now learning is that he raised over $11 million from an astounding 410,276 donors ONLINE in the last six months. Peter, that's a lot of money from a lot of donors. In fact, he's building a massive online network of Democrat donors on the scale of a presidential campaign - not a normal Senate campaign. That's why we're reaching out to you today with a simple request: This month, we're setting a goal of recruiting 10,000 new donors so we can begin closing the financial lead that our opponent holds over our campaign at the moment. Totally okay – **[I set aside one copy of his signed book just for you, Fellow Conservative!](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3gf7g-1x9cc-4qqlpo3/ "I set aside one copy of his signed book just for you, Fellow Conservative!")**

We’re running low on stock with very few copies left. I’m afraid if you don’t claim yours by midnight tonight, you might not get a copy! Fellow Conservative, I’d hate to see that happen.

Please, make sure you claim your limited-edition SIGNED copy of Jim Jordan’s must-read book, _Do What You Said You Would Do._

Thanks again,
Sue

From: **Jim Jordan**
Date: January 23rd, 2022
Subject: FWD: FWD: Do What You Said You Would Do

Hey, it’s Sue.

Jim Jordan emailed you TWICE, and we still haven’t heard from you. Did you not see his email? If you missed it, that’s okay! I’ve gone ahead and forwarded his previous correspondence to you.

**[If you want your own SIGNED copy of his latest book, make sure you reserve yours NOW>>>](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3gf7g-1x9cd-4qqlpo4/ "If you want your own SIGNED copy of his latest book, make sure you reserve yours NOW>>>")**

---

Thanks,
Sue

From: **Jim Jordan**
Date: January 22, 2022
Subject: FWD: Do What You Said You Would Do

*****URGENT MESSAGE FROM CONGRESSMAN JIM JORDAN*****
Fellow Conservative, this is really important. My team reached out to let me know that we’re in LOW SUPPLY of signed books. **[If you want your own signed copy of _Do What You Said You Would Do_ , you need to act NOW!](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3gf7g-1x9cf-4qqlpo6/ "If you want your own signed copy of Do What You Said You Would Do, you need to act NOW!")**

If you wait even FIVE minutes, we could be totally sold out. Please, don’t wait any longer. Make sure to reserve your copy IMMEDIATELY!

Thank you,

Jim Jordan

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: **Jim Jordan**
Date: January 21, 2022
Subject: Do What You Said You Would Do

Fellow Conservative, I signed a very limited number of copies of my new book, _Do What You Said You Would Do._

As an elite Conservative Patriot, I know you need to have one – so I set one aside for you until midnight tonight._As I said, there are an extremely limited number of signed copies and this is your only chance to grab one._

---
| | | [REQUEST YOUR SIGNED COPY](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3gf7g-1x9ch-4qqlpo8/ "REQUEST YOUR SIGNED COPY")
---
| [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3gf7g-1x9ci-4qqlpo9/)
---

**This book is an essential must-read for any America First patriot who wants to understand Donald J. Trump’s successful four years as president.**

President Trump showed us how to win. He said he was going to cut taxes, he did. He said he was going to reduce regulations, he did. Do what you told them you were going to do. That’s the model that works.

**[By ordering your copy now you will be receiving a great read and supporting critical efforts to take back our Conservative House Majority.](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3gf7g-1x9cj-4qqlpo0/ "By ordering your copy now you will be receiving a great read and supporting critical efforts to take back our Conservative House Majority. ")**

Pelosi’s targeting conservatives across America and she has more money than she knows what to do with. Pelosi will do everything in her power to make sure we FAIL, including dragging conservatives in ALL 50 states through the mud.

Taking back the House is the key to saving America. Without the House, our country will be lost forever to Nancy Pelosi and the Radical Left.

**[So please don't pass up this opportunity to ensure Pelosi fails in her quest to retain the speaker's gavel AND get your hands on this LIMITED EDITION signed copy of my book! The copies I’ve signed won’t last long, so order yours immediately.](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3gf7g-1x9ck-4qqlpo1/ "So please don't pass up this opportunity to ensure Pelosi fails in her quest to retain the speaker's gavel AND get your hands on this LIMITED EDITION signed copy of my book! The copies I’ve signed won’t last long, so order yours immediately.")**

I stand with House Conservatives who fight for freedom in the swamp and do what they said they would do.

**[Do you?](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3gf7g-1x9cl-4qqlpo2/ "Do you?")**

Thank you,

Jim Jordan

---
| |
* * *

[](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3gf7g-1x9cm-4qqlpo3/ "Red Wave Image Link")

Pelosi’s raising MILLIONS and spending MILLIONS MORE attacking freedom-loving patriots across the nation. We need each and every patriot who sees this to join the fight. If we fall even a dollar short, we will lose the House to Pelosi FOREVER.

**[Can we count on you to step up?](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3gf7g-1x9cn-4qqlpo4/ "Can we count on you to step up?")**

Thank you, Jim Jordan | | "Red Wave Image Link" Pelosi’s raising MILLIONS and spending MILLIONS MORE attacking freedom-loving patriots across the nation. We need each and every patriot who sees this to join the fight. If we fall even a dollar short, we will lose the House to Pelosi FOREVER. "Can we count on you to step up?" | | | "Donate Button in Footer" Thank you for your continued support and thank you for being a dedicated member of our team. | | Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
