name: Blake Masters for Senate
subject: Masters: The Rundown 2/8
body:
Update from the Masters campaign trail
---
| | | | | | Blake Masters for Senate | February 8, 2022
---
|
---
| The Rundown
---
| Welcome to The Rundown! Here's your monthly updates from Blake Masters' campaign & a roundup of our national media coverage.
Counting down: We're exactly nine months out from the General Election.
---
| | | [Visit our Website](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001XybJWPUfVNS-N4hWmdSsuVAllNWGCR9OTDGs5jbKU1WjCcRzhYg84iHlwv6n_CHaYgBF6N0i_gizn-ja3CvkEg88FK1Olau4HqqCmkaUifrgahdKjNidV4mKE7-2vy6qmyIrYa8vfPzPCYMTWddeEw==&c=OvVF5sV-2q5_mvr1ers24ZzVzy_ifTBzfK4eVUr_B2NtuP-yivyiZg==&ch=7HnClShOUoFh_3wFgEu4DcRXFvmI20TJoE461Mw70PLowlgROF69DA==)
---
| | |
---
| From the Trail
---
Blake has continued to speak at dozens of rallies, clubs, and private living room meet-and-greets across Arizona. Blake is on a roll; he's out-fundraising all of his primary opponents and he secured two major endorsements this past month (scroll down to see!).
Blake also knocked it out of the park at a debate with primary opponents Gen. Mick McGuire, Justin Olson, and Jim Lamon last weekend. The event was hosted by the Center for Arizona Policy and moderated by CAP President Cathi Herrod and radio host Hugh Hewitt. To watch the [full debate click here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001XybJWPUfVNS-N4hWmdSsuVAllNWGCR9OTDGs5jbKU1WjCcRzhYg84s0S2pN4laZjcrChu7TkUjEAnxqhMibLIrOLeZfkRYb3rNWmm06tRO2F6IOJrauVAkYgzZWa2MUlPc7SRfKjE9hx560OW4v-vAvI2dN7Iq9XA7pLA-zPcp81ZFJo1lb7fxp_r6362wkUGxcLJae1e7_DJgetgo6A1ntseWlTxiXO1GHmgdybP1CEWOrBifcTemWQ6Wn7NPe5&c=OvVF5sV-2q5_mvr1ers24ZzVzy_ifTBzfK4eVUr_B2NtuP-yivyiZg==&ch=7HnClShOUoFh_3wFgEu4DcRXFvmI20TJoE461Mw70PLowlgROF69DA==)!
---
| | |
---
Blake poses with supporters at a meet and greet in Cornville, AZ.
---
---
Blake joined John Bachman for an interview before the Trump rally in Florence, AZ.
---
| | |
---
Blake speaking to a group of supporters at a meet and greet in Sedona, AZ.
---
---
Blake spoke to a packed crowd at a meeting of the Palo Verde Republican Women's Club in Scottsdale, AZ.
---
| | |
---
| New Video: Psychopaths are running the country
Blake released a new video attacking the Democrat leaders who are destroying the country.

---
[ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001XybJWPUfVNS-N4hWmdSsuVAllNWGCR9OTDGs5jbKU1WjCcRzhYg84u3QK9wNvjFvdbYngnRnvWGD_mdLfekPBx-jnNeArz6HTCnbiJrzIVs6ZmMBBxsV0mVKbH5sdStUnScuKhX2CKZ9oc68VVSA9YSXy19GYuHeFT6EpQbcA3bthxoWvgVXNg==&c=OvVF5sV-2q5_mvr1ers24ZzVzy_ifTBzfK4eVUr_B2NtuP-yivyiZg==&ch=7HnClShOUoFh_3wFgEu4DcRXFvmI20TJoE461Mw70PLowlgROF69DA==)
---
| Endorsements
Blake received two major endorsements this past month.
The Club for Growth PAC endorsed Blake, a powerful sign that those following the race closely believe Masters is the strongest candidate in the Republican primary field. Last cycle, Club-endorsed candidates won more than 80% of their races. Club for Growth PAC President David McIntosh said the following: "Blake Masters is the candidate who can beat liberal Democrat Senator Mark Kelly and send Chuck Schumer and the Democrats into the Minority. Masters will be a champion for economic freedom in the Senate and Club for Growth PAC looks forward to helping him win the primary and then the general this November."
---
---
Congressman Madison Cawthorn (R-NC) has endorsed Blake Masters in the Arizona 2022 U.S. Senate race. Cawthorn is the youngest member of Congress. Congressman Cawthorn released the following statement: "Blake Masters is the America First warrior we need in Washington. He will not back down from defending our southern border, fighting for election integrity, and championing President Trump's MAGA agenda in the United States Senate. The days of America last politicians are over; Arizonans are ready for true leadership representing their interests in Washington. I'm proud to endorse Blake Masters for Senate. Send him to Washington so we can both fight the radical left and restore American greatness!"
---
|
---
| Major Media
Blake appeared on One America News' [The Real Story with Natalie Harp](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001XybJWPUfVNS-N4hWmdSsuVAllNWGCR9OTDGs5jbKU1WjCcRzhYg84s0S2pN4laZjtPg31YC6npgp365-1iSoWFQE7heaV8xSNjJxhQyF62lZvxafgFGwQeym44HNEdJjSu3cIm6foN-zQc3HiMTbmgXjYsPfR_nRoBgD1ZfWO0TqE6Pyy_awbNnQJLWn4AX6hQxfi-uY8Zr1Ty6bfGn4BPYbQcyabfq_QyEvlGRn4Q_uOGu9_p7qUw==&c=OvVF5sV-2q5_mvr1ers24ZzVzy_ifTBzfK4eVUr_B2NtuP-yivyiZg==&ch=7HnClShOUoFh_3wFgEu4DcRXFvmI20TJoE461Mw70PLowlgROF69DA==) to discuss his recent video slamming prominent Democrats as psychopaths and human trafficking along our border.
Blake joined John Bachman on Newsmax TV before the Trump rally in Florence, AZ.
Blake joined [The Rita Crosby Show](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001XybJWPUfVNS-N4hWmdSsuVAllNWGCR9OTDGs5jbKU1WjCcRzhYg84s0S2pN4laZj5mfMewWCafoLe-_Xo4KYOdWCDkQlNCDnO76Hhg0Mn1Frd85LU8oGjRPM8fG8BVUloHDH-r-X8Vwva6BWp24DvU9Pf6EmYN9OQJuF5Qj8PdR8FKPQta5KaA==&c=OvVF5sV-2q5_mvr1ers24ZzVzy_ifTBzfK4eVUr_B2NtuP-yivyiZg==&ch=7HnClShOUoFh_3wFgEu4DcRXFvmI20TJoE461Mw70PLowlgROF69DA==) to discuss President Trump's first rally of 2022, President Biden's sagging poll numbers, and his campaign for Senate.
Blake appeared on [The Conservative Circus w/ James T. Harris](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001XybJWPUfVNS-N4hWmdSsuVAllNWGCR9OTDGs5jbKU1WjCcRzhYg84s0S2pN4laZj2DFxVYxNIN4XhGJsWgOAqLpgO-jK4_-9QWqjKl-nEQ6pUONbGO8rV7BzrB46Lr_U7DIju7Cf4pirmuGtCF9-AM2P_5JHAAwaVOXYKWeB0nXz_CMr4qOC0YQQ4f0AgqVasC4lCg55B7LT6B1jkkoBKCkKlpm1EyMBIl31N_LEgp_OYT92rVrEx1b6O9nreKirfneX26TvxrKFKJ_oNLDh5ZUBiIhevqDS&c=OvVF5sV-2q5_mvr1ers24ZzVzy_ifTBzfK4eVUr_B2NtuP-yivyiZg==&ch=7HnClShOUoFh_3wFgEu4DcRXFvmI20TJoE461Mw70PLowlgROF69DA==) to discuss the Club for Growth's endorsement and how he will work for Arizonans.
Blake joined [The Clay Travis and Buck Sexton Show](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001XybJWPUfVNS-N4hWmdSsuVAllNWGCR9OTDGs5jbKU1WjCcRzhYg84s0S2pN4laZjEw7wpEJcu-P6MGJL9zz9sAe37V64u_CowERDq0kFYN5_PgCS8b6rVXzfh1EYG0Uwo3LpPk8Ah_Kt_LwxIVHXladwagLl359_ZYEAXpQ-5ZwSnnaB0j3axVVllO2mwOT7-YiL8nzF2m46ZcXfnyVZnmtx1iI5UrXI3whJOtF0NCYncrb0MwjUxhhaOsaYeyrjMCygTdYdsf_BEB9dBI-IMDu1Rph4CebpKYnbO1SL0LTlvyUqHAzO0WI10j-WE1mDlSam76SCKcBtxf5dav7J6P33OoeVDBtX&c=OvVF5sV-2q5_mvr1ers24ZzVzy_ifTBzfK4eVUr_B2NtuP-yivyiZg==&ch=7HnClShOUoFh_3wFgEu4DcRXFvmI20TJoE461Mw70PLowlgROF69DA==) to discuss the state of his race, Biden's economy, the border crisis, and vaccine mandates.
On [Tucker Carlson Tonight](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001XybJWPUfVNS-N4hWmdSsuVAllNWGCR9OTDGs5jbKU1WjCcRzhYg84s0S2pN4laZjgCoO9xBtlE4_GM9f1E03FCXq2Xlo8-uI44OrkliYGwqO0-Kt541iIkfjpzCBpgtOUkRJ5EgWSPEjWFIx3e9g7zdEK0p0_piVLXWczaZTy5Kwy2pq9li7C7tHJCbuyOzieVQRDCH-Lb9nGMNCd4CVrypY5EFZXQAzkGu14JhyerhCpSz43gP7vo0EGNWFGzWvPm58mkzpyNE61FroSVI6GeBWNRHnq2gQ&c=OvVF5sV-2q5_mvr1ers24ZzVzy_ifTBzfK4eVUr_B2NtuP-yivyiZg==&ch=7HnClShOUoFh_3wFgEu4DcRXFvmI20TJoE461Mw70PLowlgROF69DA==), Blake talked about the rise in crime in our cities and the bad actors who created and benefit from our broken system.
Recent Headlines
The Washington Examiner's David M. Drucker [interviewed](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001XybJWPUfVNS-N4hWmdSsuVAllNWGCR9OTDGs5jbKU1WjCcRzhYg84s0S2pN4laZjhCRnSmEf15JvVbHGM6AhTCKWrKbEK6w7SWCJN5LrvK6Wv9pEjmOM45h39QSZgIfzYwk8Crru_SJ928MAfOchHEg9po1pebBzvNlJxZ7OZZ_b5x4-M4y9PmsL7BN6JQDbGFgyVDmS3FzajyvjHxf2K6brGiuuJVsrn83vyWrq_jjffEV_VTFD6yfnR7Yn6XYIieQDcJT5aflTY30V5I5eWw==&c=OvVF5sV-2q5_mvr1ers24ZzVzy_ifTBzfK4eVUr_B2NtuP-yivyiZg==&ch=7HnClShOUoFh_3wFgEu4DcRXFvmI20TJoE461Mw70PLowlgROF69DA==) Blake for a profile.
In Newsmax, Kenny Cody wrote a compelling [op-ed](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001XybJWPUfVNS-N4hWmdSsuVAllNWGCR9OTDGs5jbKU1WjCcRzhYg84s0S2pN4laZjY4d6omsKwEDsEjGFrL2bUyk6hmbtiEklgANUp6LlbnKeQ5x08E6fGM2yg9KXNBbe0NUc8o5DxMmEvZRZXK6G1FBUAM4lADYfHzG54sM44DnSx4jdkv9WK9xe0mHwaU3pSSxO6cE7yYUQlDr-1diOLK-BOS57rhDUmF1XpZ8wSwTFXWK5ovCz6Q==&c=OvVF5sV-2q5_mvr1ers24ZzVzy_ifTBzfK4eVUr_B2NtuP-yivyiZg==&ch=7HnClShOUoFh_3wFgEu4DcRXFvmI20TJoE461Mw70PLowlgROF69DA==) about how Blake winning the Arizona race would boost the America First movement.
In RealClearPolitics, Tim Hains [reported](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001XybJWPUfVNS-N4hWmdSsuVAllNWGCR9OTDGs5jbKU1WjCcRzhYg84s0S2pN4laZjNY_7iRA279hmi2kXSRLanJIq7fO-hxDYqjpq4a9dToTjfX5oPe1qrab3LWRX5TI9tkYPTh5fJjeUhFPtX4wohl1v5QOUB8KuTwJDJFkKdUh4DOMTvzRGopXd5kgZAGHZ8lxOIMouWjTzeLzNmpbwS29hSiDpiRiJGvQ8FvgCQ-Z9M3Zpp2tMc2cSQh5w0CODFBcol_QMi2myXBjy72D3i6n5lszFw3DsXaoE5P8mJxF6Xe8CFZHaJw==&c=OvVF5sV-2q5_mvr1ers24ZzVzy_ifTBzfK4eVUr_B2NtuP-yivyiZg==&ch=7HnClShOUoFh_3wFgEu4DcRXFvmI20TJoE461Mw70PLowlgROF69DA==) on a speech where Blake slammed CRT as "anti-white racism."
---

| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001XybJWPUfVNS-N4hWmdSsuVAllNWGCR9OTDGs5jbKU1WjCcRzhYg84iHlwv6n_CHakC4chtS76mRoaGiGEWZu9PIJAC6leLren7O0iFG6nRfyP2quETGHUe3xHagq2uGGBdhuhtaA2o2LG5i6G4RQFVrf3M08EWjNV5pFIS3T-Rs=&c=OvVF5sV-2q5_mvr1ers24ZzVzy_ifTBzfK4eVUr_B2NtuP-yivyiZg==&ch=7HnClShOUoFh_3wFgEu4DcRXFvmI20TJoE461Mw70PLowlgROF69DA==) [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001XybJWPUfVNS-N4hWmdSsuVAllNWGCR9OTDGs5jbKU1WjCcRzhYg84iHlwv6n_CHaek7Ig1H6JEacFob4aF01Dh3voPBBrPEoxYoTCo8fZQic-7DTe9IjIeWeTLsP2bGrTjwDLQMXR0LTmS-PqwsE7w==&c=OvVF5sV-2q5_mvr1ers24ZzVzy_ifTBzfK4eVUr_B2NtuP-yivyiZg==&ch=7HnClShOUoFh_3wFgEu4DcRXFvmI20TJoE461Mw70PLowlgROF69DA==) [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001XybJWPUfVNS-N4hWmdSsuVAllNWGCR9OTDGs5jbKU1WjCcRzhYg84iHlwv6n_CHagLjqSyZTNgoeGO1vafXkZsZQaj8OpE49APGhUBfl0JaZRSt8N43P8OH9qeWszLywqhJ1Sr7Cv7kWbte4PU__WGNBr7FcqE73&c=OvVF5sV-2q5_mvr1ers24ZzVzy_ifTBzfK4eVUr_B2NtuP-yivyiZg==&ch=7HnClShOUoFh_3wFgEu4DcRXFvmI20TJoE461Mw70PLowlgROF69DA==)

That's how much money corporate PACs and special interest groups gave to Zinke's campaign last quarter. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41563551/329364764/1820125544?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODQ0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MzNhNWI1Zi0wNTg5LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=q11uT-i2Mni0HJdhmsLldx-I5jNQb0gFMXcabcVVxxU=) Friend, Thanks to your help, our campaign reported raising **$301,000** in the most recent fundraising quarter. That’s huge, and the best part is that we relied on individual donors to reach that number. We didn't take a cent from corporate PACs.

**Unfortunately, we got word that Ryan Zinke out-fundraised us. He brought in $566,000 in the same period.** But here’s the deal: the extra money Zinke raised came from PACs and special interests groups -- nearly $160,000 was attributed to these groups.

These entities benefited from Zinke's actions while he was handing out public lands as Trump's Secretary of the Interior. Now, they're hoping to send him back to Washington to do their bidding.

[**We need help to pick up the pace so we can close the gap against Zinke's special interest donors. Will you chip in $3 right now? clean_body: That's how much money corporate PACs and special interest groups gave to Zinke's campaign last quarter. | = Friend, Thanks to your help, our campaign reported raising $301,000 in the most recent fundraising quarter. That’s huge, and the best part is that we relied on individual donors to reach that number. We didn't take a cent from corporate PACs. Unfortunately, we got word that Ryan Zinke out-fundraised us. He brought in $566,000 in the same period. But here’s the deal: the extra money Zinke raised came from PACs and special interests groups -- nearly $160,000 was attributed to these groups. These entities benefited from Zinke's actions while he was handing out public lands as Trump's Secretary of the Interior. Now, they're hoping to send him back to Washington to do their bidding. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = If you follow the money, it's clear where Zinke's interests lie -- and it's not with Montana families and small businesses. Zinke had his chance to serve a higher office, and he blew it. He was forced to resign in shame for alleged corruption and ethics violations. name: Juliana Stratton
subject: Volunteering
disclaimer_text: Paid for by JB for Governor
body:
Our campaign needs dedicated volunteers helping us reach out to voters to let them know what is at stake.
|
---
Friend — Nine months from today, Illinoisans will decide whether to give JB and me the honor of serving another four years as Governor and Lt. Governor. Every single day until then, our campaign needs dedicated volunteers helping us reach out to voters to let them know what is at stake in this election.

We need to build up a grassroots firewall right now, not only to support our agenda but to defeat the other side's unprecedented threats to our most fundamental rights. **I know you appreciate the importance of what I'm saying, so I am asking you:**
**[Will you sign up as a future campaign volunteer?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41572815/329409188/-1387621887?utm_source=email&utm_campaign=20220208_js_volunteer_recruitment&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTQyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMWRhYmFiOC0yZjg5LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Mn1N0cVidDCJTf-oHOInKanh8mf86jCMHwBoJ5sXYFU=&emci=e0dabab8-2f89-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=e1dabab8-2f89-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=13891383)**
| | | [Yes](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41572816/329409189/-1387621887?utm_source=email&utm_campaign=20220208_js_volunteer_recruitment&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTQyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMWRhYmFiOC0yZjg5LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Mn1N0cVidDCJTf-oHOInKanh8mf86jCMHwBoJ5sXYFU=&emci=e0dabab8-2f89-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=e1dabab8-2f89-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=13891383)
---
| [No](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41572817/329409190/-974760404?utm_source=email&utm_campaign=20220208_js_volunteer_recruitment&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTQyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMWRhYmFiOC0yZjg5LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Mn1N0cVidDCJTf-oHOInKanh8mf86jCMHwBoJ5sXYFU=&emci=e0dabab8-2f89-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=e1dabab8-2f89-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=13891383)
---

Here's how I see it:

**Since taking office, JB and I have taken on big challenges and delivered even bigger results for working families.**

We've raised the minimum wage for all Illinoisans. We've treated health care as a right for the many and not a privilege for the few. We're getting our fiscal house in order while creating and supporting half a million jobs through the biggest infrastructure program in state history.

I am proud of our record and excited about the future — but so much progress will disappear if we lose this next election! **[So will you please click here to register to volunteer with us?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41572818/329409191/-1387621887?utm_source=email&utm_campaign=20220208_js_volunteer_recruitment&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTQyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMWRhYmFiOC0yZjg5LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Mn1N0cVidDCJTf-oHOInKanh8mf86jCMHwBoJ5sXYFU=&emci=e0dabab8-2f89-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=e1dabab8-2f89-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=13891383)**

You alone really can make a difference!

I can't thank you enough,

Juliana
| | Paid for by JB for Governor

Chicago, IL 60690
United States

**Here 's why renewing your membership for 2022 is so important:**
1. You will be providing conservative candidates across the country the resources they need to go on offense and bring the fight to Democrats.

3. You will be a critical piece of our House Republican team as we work to take back the House and fire Nancy Pelosi for good.

November's election will be the most important election of my lifetime. With America in chaos under Joe Biden's failed leadership, it's up to Republicans in Congress to put America first and fight for the solutions to the problems that affect everyday Americans like you and me.

It's simple: _We need patriots like you to step up and help us save America._ **[Your support today will ensure that we have the resources needed to wage this fight and to take back the House, so please make sure you renew your 2022 Membership NOW>>>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z5qp57ggsbk8vrg577m1ta3ng807jgpb854vvo6o_rp22sh2s8i66ob1cpim9ob0c3h2bs)**

| | Peter, Momentum continues to build on Team Levin, and we couldn’t be more excited to share the news with you. Since we last reached out to share that Andy secured the endorsement from **SEIU** , one of the largest labor unions in the country, more national and local unions have stepped up. Our candidate is one who has dedicated his life to fighting for the rights of workers everywhere, and we are thrilled that so many organizations are with him. After receiving the **UNITE HERE Local 24** endorsement right after our campaign launched, the national **UNITE HERE** union threw their support behind Andy last week. They know he will fight for a recovery where no one gets left behind. Andy’s passion for helping working families and empowering the middle class hasn’t gone unnoticed. **Communications Workers of America (CWA)** , the largest communications and media union in America, endorsed Andy. CWA represents hundreds of thousands of workers in the United States and overseas. **Retail, Wholesale and Department Store Union (RWDSU), a United Food and Commercial Workers International Union affiliate** , also endorsed Andy’s reelection campaign. Andy led a congressional delegation to stand in solidarity with workers seeking to organize with RWDSU, exposing Amazon’s union-busting tactics in Alabama last year. A few days after RWDSU, Andy secured an endorsement from **UFCW Local 951** , representing over 30,000 food and commercial employees across Michigan. The local cited Andy’s work with their chapter over three decades, as well as his efforts to organize new UFCW members in Saginaw and Flint. These unions from across industries join our growing list of endorsers — one that includes Senator Elizabeth Warren, along with dozens of local elected officials and activists from across the new Eleventh District. And we’re not slowing down, Peter — this momentum will only build from here. Andy is committed to supporting and empowering workers on the ground across the state of Michigan — he made a stop at the Starbucks in Clinton Township this weekend to show his support as they are organizing a union. If we’re going to send Andy back to Congress to fight for our progressive agenda and worker-first policies, we need support from this team of grassroots donors to help us get there. [_**If you can, please donate to help us send a progressive labor champion back to Congress. Our most common contribution is $10.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41563676/329365390/882283677?refcode=em_20220204_f_t_union&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTM3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZjU4OTdmNy0wNTg5LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yr_IxTRrMdLmS1dXeD-Si8Um6MlSln7as4QfiJRAweo=) Let’s go! Team Levin

name: OBAMACARE ALERT (via DCCC)
subject: RE: President Obama’s legacy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc
body:
| | | **_BREAKING REPORT:_
President Biden EXPANDS Obamacare to cover a RECORD-BREAKING 14.5 MILLION Americans**

[**This is AMAZING! A brand-new report just revealed that a RECORD-BREAKING number of Americans are receiving quality, affordable health care thanks to President Biden 's American Rescue Plan and his expansion of Obamacare. We're so proud of President Biden for building on President Obama's INCREDIBLE legacy -- but we know the Republicans are waiting in the wings to DESTROY our progress and take back power. That's why we're rushing to you with an urgent request: Will you chip in $3 before midnight to defend our House Majority and prevent a total GOP takeover?**](https://links.e.dccc.)
| [MAJORITY DEFENDER CONTRIBUTION: **PENDING**
NAME: dpwillis67@gmail.com

_Suggested Support: $3_](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/j~)

---

We're absolutely thrilled!!

**FIRST:**

President Obama reminded us just how much of our progress -- and his AMAZING legacy -- was at stake if the Republicans took back power:

[](https://links.e.dccc.)

**THEN:**

The American people RESPONDED -- and voted for a **DEMOCRATIC** President, a **DEMOCRATIC** House, and a **DEMOCRATIC** Senate.

**AND NOW:**

President Biden and our Congressional Majorities are making HISTORIC progress to build on President Obama's legacy -- **including an UNPRECEDENTED expansion of quality, affordable health care for MILLIONS of Americans!**

But even with this INCREDIBLE news, our work is not done.

As we write this, Republicans are plotting to DESTROY our Democratic Trifecta.

**And the last time they held power, they tried to repeal President Obama 's Affordable Care Act 70 TIMES** \-- so under no circumstances can we afford to let them take back power now.

**[That's why we're PLEADING with you to help defend our House Majority and hand anti-health care Republicans a STUNNING rebuke. Will you chip in $3 RIGHT NOW to elect more strong, pro-Obamacare Democrats all across the country?](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/XX_)**

However, if you'd just like to receive fewer emails, you can click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=46367831&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjE4MDkzMzEyMQS2&l=13780807&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com).

We're working hard to make sure we protect our Democratic Majority -- and to put an end to Republicans' obstruction for good. President Biden can't do it all. We need all hands on deck if we're going to fight back against Republicans and expand our historic Majority. Our success relies on grassroots supporters like you. 99% of our contributions come from grassroots donations, with an average gift of $19. If you'd like to unsubscribe from DCCC emails, click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=46367831&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjE4MDkzMzEyMQS2&l=13780807&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com). If you'd like to make an online donation, click [here](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dcccactblue?amount=25). Thanks for your support of Democrats!

Contributions or gifts to the DCCC are not tax deductible.

FIRST: President Obama reminded us just how much of our progress -- and his AMAZING legacy -- was at stake if the Republicans took back power: THEN: The American people RESPONDED -- and voted for a DEMOCRATIC President, a DEMOCRATIC House, and a DEMOCRATIC Senate. AND NOW: President Biden and our Congressional Majorities are making HISTORIC progress to build on President Obama's legacy -- including an UNPRECEDENTED expansion of quality, affordable health care for MILLIONS of Americans! But even with this INCREDIBLE news, our work is not done. As we write this, Republicans are plotting to DESTROY our Democratic Trifecta. And the last time they held power, they tried to repeal President Obama 's Affordable Care Act 70 TIMES \-- so under no circumstances can we afford to let them take back power now. | If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | Thank you, DCCC | Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | | www.dccc.org | Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

name: John Fetterman
subject: It’s our anniversary, Derek
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
It’s impossible to sum it all up, but I’m going to try.
#
Derek,
One year ago today, we launched our campaign for the United States Senate.
I’m *so* proud of everything we’ve accomplished since then. 💛 It’s impossible to sum it all up, but I’m going to highlight a few of my favorite things from the past year.
Before we dive in, remember this: _Every single thing_ we’ve achieved together has been powered by grassroots donors. **[So in honor of the one year we’ve spent fighting together to flip Pennsylvania’s open U.S. Senate seat, I hope you’ll make a donation of any size to keep us going strong, Derek.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/42928?refcode=ema20220208-4509&t=1&akid=4509%2E434096%2E9LFTTw)**
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/42928?refcode=em20220208-4509&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=4509%2E434096%2E9LFTTw)**
OK, here comes my highlight reel. You ready, Derek?
**1\. Showing up for organized labor**
This fall, workers from all across PA — and the country — stood up, went on strike, and demanded to be treated better in their workplace.
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/42928?refcode=ema20220208-4509&t=21&akid=4509%2E434096%2E9LFTTw) | [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/42928?refcode=ema20220208-4509&t=22&akid=4509%2E434096%2E9LFTTw)
---|---
_On the picket line with BCTGM Local 374G in Lancaster and Ironworkers Local 851 in Erie_
From cereal workers at the Kellogg’s factory in Lancaster demanding living wages, to Erie Strayer Ironworkers demanding safe working conditions, we saw that the Union Way of Life is still the backbone of our country.
Workers will *always* have my support, and I’m proud to have stood alongside them.
**2\. Showing up for local Dems in ruby red PA counties**
On Zoom and in-person, 2021 was filled with weekend road trips across the Commonwealth to visit some of our most passionate PA Democrats, some deep in the heart of Republican counties.
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/42928?refcode=ema20220208-4509&t=23&akid=4509%2E434096%2E9LFTTw) | [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/42928?refcode=ema20220208-4509&t=24&akid=4509%2E434096%2E9LFTTw)
---|---
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/42928?refcode=ema20220208-4509&t=25&akid=4509%2E434096%2E9LFTTw)
_Mercer + Somerset County Dem Picnics + the Pennsylvania Cannabis Festival, Summer 2021_
Meeting yinz + youse all across our Commonwealth is why I’m running for U.S. Senate to begin with. Turning Pennsylvania blue in 2022 is a 67 County race, and we’ve *always* been the 67 County campaign.
I hope that we’ll soon be back in-person + having these picnics again. You know I’ll be there.
**3\. Grassroots donations from 88% of PA zip codes**
What I may be most proud of is grassroots support from folks like you. Our campaign has received more than 170,000 donations in total + contributions from more than 88% of PA’s zip codes. Gisele and I have been overwhelmed with gratitude.
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/42928?refcode=ema20220208-4509&t=26&akid=4509%2E434096%2E9LFTTw)
_That ☝️ is what 88% of PA zip codes looks like_
**Since we launched, I’ve said that we’re running a true 67 County campaign, because that’s what it takes to win.** You can’t buy PA with millions of dollars in self-funded money or corporate donations, or just by picking up voters in Southwest and Southeast PA.
You win PA with votes from everywhere, urban + rural. **And with your help, that’s what we’re going to do.**
**[Derek, it would mean the world to me if you celebrated this one-year milestone by making a donation to keep our momentum going and flip PA blue.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/42928?refcode=ema20220208-4509&t=27&akid=4509%2E434096%2E9LFTTw)**
Because we’ve still got a lot of work ahead of us. But wow, am I grateful, and beyond proud of this movement.
Thank you, THANK YOU, thank you, 🙏
John
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania
**[Contribute Now](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/42928?refcode=em20220208-4509&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=28&akid=4509%2E434096%2E9LFTTw)**

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20220208-4509-footer&t=29&refcode2=4509_434096_9LFTTw&akid=4509%2E434096%2E9LFTTw)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=30&akid=4509%2E434096%2E9LFTTw)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=31&akid=4509%2E434096%2E9LFTTw)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

name: Josh Harder
subject: My thoughts on Liz Cheney and Adam Kinzinger
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Harder for Congress
body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/tsa1oRtvi_s5FWfOHM_dRmBm4UVWMRk1sEd3Ox2N1iw=/OHB30NV7Lj1jKHyuH71AZidM63_CQM7EFaOXLUfS0hA=?refcode=E13901-20220203-TrumpAdmittal-header-Trump-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=19) | Peter, This week the GOP censured my colleagues Liz Cheney and Adam Kinzinger. Liz, Adam and I disagree on a lot, but I've been incredibly impressed by their dedication (and bravery) to stand up against Donald Trump and the extremist forces within the Republican Party. Liz and Adam see what we can all see: Trump and extremists like Marjorie Taylor Green aren't just problems for Republicans, they are nuclear bombs for our democracy at large. I take the rise of extremism and conspiracy theories like QAnon very seriously. I ran against a conspiracy theorist last cycle and saw firsthand how it damages trust in our political system, not just for that campaign cycle, but _for years_ afterwards. **Words matter and the RNC calling January 6th "legitimate political discourse" is abhorrent.** That's why I'm fighting so hard to keep this seat out of extremist hands. We are 1 of the 5 seats the GOP needs to win to take control of the House. [**Will you please rush in a donation right now to protect this seat and keep the House blue?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/tsa1oRtvi_s5FWfOHM_dRmBm4UVWMRk1sEd3Ox2N1iw=/OHB30NV7Lj1jKHyuH71AZidM63_CQM7EFaOXLUfS0hA=?refcode=E13961-20220208-CheneyKinzinger-SL-GOP-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=19) _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | **[$9](https://act.myngp.com/el/tsa1oRtvi_s5FWfOHM_dRmBm4UVWMRk1sEd3Ox2N1iw=/OHB30NV7Lj1jKHyuH71AZidM63_CQM7EFaOXLUfS0hA=?express_lane=true&refcode=E13961-20220208-CheneyKinzinger-EL-GOP-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=9)**

Before voting this November, everyone should ask themselves, do they really believe Kevin McCarthy is going to do anything besides kowtow to Donald Trump and try to set him up for 2024? Are we going to get _anything_ done while McCarthy is busy shutting down the January 6th Committee and impeaching Biden for... I don't know, whatever they might come up with? We need to beat them this year to show that we're united against their hate and division.
[**I represent one of the 5 seats Donald Trump and the GOP are targeting in this election and they 've already spent millions of dollars on attack ads against me. Will you please rush in a donation right now to help me fight back to save our democracy?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/tsa1oRtvi_s5FWfOHM_dRmBm4UVWMRk1sEd3Ox2N1iw=/OHB30NV7Lj1jKHyuH71AZidM63_CQM7EFaOXLUfS0hA=?refcode=E13961-20220208-CheneyKinzinger-SL-GOP-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=19)

clean_body: | | Peter, This week the GOP censured my colleagues Liz Cheney and Adam Kinzinger. Liz, Adam and I disagree on a lot, but I've been incredibly impressed by their dedication (and bravery) to stand up against Donald Trump and the extremist forces within the Republican Party. Liz and Adam see what we can all see: Trump and extremists like Marjorie Taylor Green aren't just problems for Republicans, they are nuclear bombs for our democracy at large. I take the rise of extremism and conspiracy theories like QAnon very seriously. I ran against a conspiracy theorist last cycle and saw firsthand how it damages trust in our political system, not just for that campaign cycle, but for years afterwards. Words matter and the RNC calling January 6th "legitimate political discourse" is abhorrent. That's why I'm fighting so hard to keep this seat out of extremist hands. We are 1 of the 5 seats the GOP needs to win to take control of the House. If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | Before voting this November, everyone should ask themselves, do they really believe Kevin McCarthy is going to do anything besides kowtow to Donald Trump and try to set him up for 2024? Are we going to get anything done while McCarthy is busy shutting down the January 6th Committee and impeaching Biden for... I don't know, whatever they might come up with? We need to beat them this year to show that we're united against their hate and division. We can do this. \- Josh * = =

name: Derek Schmidt
subject: What I Saw at the Southern Border

body:
Late last month, I visited the southern border to see for myself what the situation is like on the ground right now. What I saw was extremely......... Friend, Late last month, I visited the southern border to see for myself what the situation is like on the ground right now. What I saw was extremely troubling. [](http://links.schmidtforkansas.com/u/click?_t=4eb8bd5dcca54a0b993a2eb1eb42ba73&_m=9f93ce5a325a40a680dab05b3cb21bfe&_e=197mjCJKQ70cLwihdY6R50Z6NRM0nghieZi6RxnOp8wb0fyQsXhOygnIrBGPiYa6N5r51Y6qDuOTWPNwfnua5A-Y5SzqYnKG1MKDDBC5Emo-MdttMFM1RgRr0NgQT8Gias22oVng9xce2-LDeCKc7zYfDkXsYdHh-GQqI1ymREK1DwdwN48D8FvGuKh47LnlIvSHIqhwwgEImFx69kmpdpEKHXElS18r11ARlI--EeucVr445UdNZUrUTr0nzt1qNt_Ty28EgEjBGIAihVQBj7q2QxeSZAsbslwVBvn0EX-_dxXKmQf25JuPj6Gft0nT6UC6YBOTV-8d0aByOSTk0Hq-xwr3eSXIfxJVyHV6a0j7X5imfKxjaIuiR46c8H7_3jH0LIu40efZ63J5CUGtawbHNRN87ZNSmb9xe75gvGs0GFL4bZmervUabrFwdGr2Pn3mOIJWOZFUPlBoTYR3FFtRpjMUrIMV0AoODjGQoO4AGRkbVvm6p54eeI-Dw0he) After joining my colleagues at a two-day border summit in Texas hosted by Governor Greg Abbott and Attorney General Ken Paxton, I am disappointed yet not at all surprised by what I saw. The Biden administration has abandoned the fundamental idea that the U.S. must secure the border and control who comes in and out of our country. I saw that firsthand in South Texas. As a result, every state is now a border state. That includes Kansas. [**ADD YOUR NAME**](http://links.schmidtforkansas.com/u/click?_t=4eb8bd5dcca54a0b993a2eb1eb42ba73&_m=9f93ce5a325a40a680dab05b3cb21bfe&_e=197mjCJKQ70cLwihdY6R50Z6NRM0nghieZi6RxnOp8wb0fyQsXhOygnIrBGPiYa6N5r51Y6qDuOTWPNwfnua5A-Y5SzqYnKG1MKDDBC5Emo-MdttMFM1RgRr0NgQT8Gias22oVng9xce2-LDeCKc7zYfDkXsYdHh-GQqI1ymREK1DwdwN48D8FvGuKh47LnlIvSHIqhwwgEImFx69kmpdpEKHXElS18r11ARlI--EeucVr445UdNZUrUTr0nzt1qNt_Ty28EgEjBGIAihVQBj7q2QxeSZAsbslwVBvn0EX9sngzcSD1p2VG0NCetXZSTfNczb-hrRdaJRcRpaGeH1AHNjy7zVZgDDlYQuvxr5ThXw-9K8wE1MO_tWUoY61rgpVHcCbPNbDiavDPxEaVQUQsl7P9pZnP4uiPO8t1X1dMwTECELv4bRUDRmLUjaJRs5_r6iCpIQqPFxJ9y9aj8VsbzeRSVsCUSXX_ORRkS7VSG7D54ZkAxW59AvggHV_zK) [**Add Your Name Now to Stand for Border Security >>>**](http://links.schmidtforkansas.com/u/click?_t=4eb8bd5dcca54a0b993a2eb1eb42ba73&_m=9f93ce5a325a40a680dab05b3cb21bfe&_e=197mjCJKQ70cLwihdY6R50Z6NRM0nghieZi6RxnOp8wb0fyQsXhOygnIrBGPiYa6N5r51Y6qDuOTWPNwfnua5A-Y5SzqYnKG1MKDDBC5Emo-MdttMFM1RgRr0NgQT8Gias22oVng9xce2-LDeCKc7zYfDkXsYdHh-GQqI1ymREK1DwdwN48D8FvGuKh47LnlIvSHIqhwwgEImFx69kmpdpEKHXElS18r11ARlI--EeucVr445UdNZUrUTr0nzt1qNt_Ty28EgEjBGIAihVQBj7q2QxeSZAsbslwVBvn0EX9npWzgOXWOcjPXLeAS62gYV7yV3W94bKhkWOVWTMAD-wXFnz0ztbjGOnLfMmUN1e61vz4rY7rdABGl9JeDzxVTlyA2ssLL1q57Q6AQd8EY0EgIjrQx7LvWhaJoEpa5YxfCU0nYGbYXUVXuzjAzsrYWNJrwkL9NV-RJP3Z1sDf4rel94gioAHtCxdnzNz0JHOz_485ERMpViSQ4R1HX5jJ0) As attorney general, I’ve seen the results firsthand here in Kansas. We’ve prosecuted individuals who’ve come to this country for the purpose of running drugs, participating in criminal enterprises, who’ve committed murder and terrible offenses on children. They hide among the mass of migrants to enter our country. If the federal government would just help us instead of wholly abandoning its responsibility to enforce access and egress at the border, these crimes would be preventable because these particular offenders wouldn't be here. Thankfully, Texas has stepped up and is trying to stand in the gap that’s been left by the federal government’s withdrawal. Texas has asked for our help and, in my view, Kansas should be helping them. I’ve called on Governor Kelly to send resources to help prevent crime coming across the border from making its way to our communities in Kansas. She has dismissed the idea as “political games.” **We must keep our Kansas communities safe. If you support helping Texas protect us by filling the gap created by Joe Biden’s abdication of the federal government's duty to secure the border, add your name now. [https://schmidtforkansas.com/stand-with-derek/](http://links.schmidtforkansas.com/u/click?_t=4eb8bd5dcca54a0b993a2eb1eb42ba73&_m=9f93ce5a325a40a680dab05b3cb21bfe&_e=197mjCJKQ70cLwihdY6R50Z6NRM0nghieZi6RxnOp8wb0fyQsXhOygnIrBGPiYa6N5r51Y6qDuOTWPNwfnua5A-Y5SzqYnKG1MKDDBC5Emo-MdttMFM1RgRr0NgQT8Gias22oVng9xce2-LDeCKc7zYfDkXsYdHh-GQqI1ymREK1DwdwN48D8FvGuKh47LnlIvSHIqhwwgEImFx69kmpdpEKHXElS18r11ARlI--EeucVr445UdNZUrUTr0nzt1qNt_Ty28EgEjBGIAihVQBj7q2QxeSZAsbslwVBvn0EX8jdgGokpwhUeXHBp18gh30E5xT_3gjiRm8znxafJOvKk_OX9q8LefNo95P1NjBLUhXrmpinxHm3h9eVbgcWuf5-qk4HGLyyz_ZNju1rnxNOXxSsyCezgsBoxUockNZiLlnXBFRDOsquPU9gymxM753UGFJu1_CKkEP9s5uxP_zR5VfjwWwLv1s_h5pu8N8SaNuqZgqNfQUg2s81nxZ1Izr "http://links.schmidtforkansas.com/u/click?_t=4eb8bd5dcca54a0b993a2eb1eb42ba73&_m=zJWPDDQmGS6uolkejTGuEuGrNpzGcJSG&_e=SzUF6U2gyn9pHYKhhOrM0ewMcsZohnYnSQXXyOonotm4RTjHRxNn9nHoUTL7e8ZCamwfdCxtZsi_W_manBVKZ3CpKG4mw2Qb0N6AM3_tdpbBvUgf9BqFfFU7JnUg06gjKrUVvKtIRv")** Let me be clear, Friend. Securing the border is not an issue that I hoped to be focused on as governor. But when nearly 2 million people have been apprehended by Customs and Border Protection agents in the last year alone, and countless more have eluded detection, ignoring it like Governor Kelly does is not an option. **Please, join me in this fight and add your name to stand strong for border security.[https://schmidtforkansas.com/stand-with-derek/](http://links.schmidtforkansas.com/u/click?_t=4eb8bd5dcca54a0b993a2eb1eb42ba73&_m=9f93ce5a325a40a680dab05b3cb21bfe&_e=197mjCJKQ70cLwihdY6R50Z6NRM0nghieZi6RxnOp8wb0fyQsXhOygnIrBGPiYa6N5r51Y6qDuOTWPNwfnua5A-Y5SzqYnKG1MKDDBC5Emo-MdttMFM1RgRr0NgQT8Gias22oVng9xce2-LDeCKc7zYfDkXsYdHh-GQqI1ymREK1DwdwN48D8FvGuKh47LnlIvSHIqhwwgEImFx69kmpdpEKHXElS18r11ARlI--EeucVr445UdNZUrUTr0nzt1qNt_Ty28EgEjBGIAihVQBj7q2QxeSZAsbslwVBvn0EX-NOkZHnDvvFFHt8aK0sk3HibJ47DqwGuMndn2B03Sa5LOOfg3ctBkTV-JCJtPXOYVlvzE5uZh7cxA6TOA20NZOYHmyt9m5kINmpPpNYKWbgNIOOr2KeAWnAy6OfRUKyVZnzCgOBNYACjbIpYd2kr7dyniTVyn5BZ0OQw2uCg48Za0rSBSLplHojPSxBfdl_bS1E9ZxKFSQuVFal2vS76JJ)** I really appreciate your support, Friend. This is one of the most important issues facing our country today, and from what I’ve just seen, it’s only on track to get worse from here. It means a lot to have you with me in this fight to turn things around and secure our border once and for all. Thanks, Derek Schmidt | |

clean_body: We’re all in to finish what we started in 2020. | | | Peter — Early voting starts in less than 6 days: We’re going all in to finish what we started in 2020. Thankfully, we’re in a better position to win. Why? Because more people know Jessica and more people are ready for new representation in TX-28. They know about Henry Cuellar’s failed record in Congress and are questioning if he’s fit to continue to represent TX-28 since he’s now under investigation by the FBI. We have less than one week left before early voting starts. Our team is in high drive to reach as many voters as possible. Early voting starts February 14th and goes through February 25th — so it’s all or nothing. If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: Together we will bring change to South Texas. Let’s win this, Team Cisneros | To give by check: PO Box 660 Laredo, TX 78042

2\. This district, which Trump won by DOUBLE DIGITS in 2016, is now EVEN REDDER after redistricting finished in Richmond.

_**The Democrat control of Naval Station Norfolk in Virginia's 2nd district stops NOW**_.

[](https://JaromeBellForCongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=998fb70d47f315dfa6664b71d&id=9523f48b34&e=af4b86f5c6)

So Mitch McConnell and his allies are launching their first barrage of attack ads to defeat me – and they're amassing tens of millions of dollars to run more in the months to come.
I'm counting on grassroots supporters like you to help me fight back – because this race is about moving our country forward. **It's about expanding our Senate majority so we can pass legislation that will move the needle toward progress on voting rights, climate change, the cost of living and more. **
I know deep in my soul that this people-powered movement CAN defeat Marco Rubio, but not without the resources it takes to compete in what experts believe could be the most expensive Senate race _ever_. **Time is running out, and I'm counting on your immediate help to hit this goal:**
**[Donate $5 or more to become an Election Year Member in my race for U.S. Senate and ensure I have the resources to defeat Marco Rubio, flip Florida blue and expand our Democratic Senate majority!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41573920/329413969/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2058-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYmY5NmRmMC0zNDg5LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_r-zdadtUW3d1ljt3OlZc-EhlCrXfHJ0sYzROVVKXRU=)**

Val Demings

That's why I just launched a major fundraising push to secure 10,000 Election Year Members. But with time running out before my midnight deadline, I'm falling massively short. My team pulled your membership record, so please take a look: | | SUPPORTER RECORD SUPPORTER: dpwillis67@gmail.com ELECTION YEAR MEMBER [D:RENEWAL] STATUS: PENDING SUGGESTED CONTRIBUTION: $5 DEADLINE: 11:59 p.m. = | | = The pathway before me is tough: Republicans have already sunk $10 million into on-the-ground organizing in Florida to keep our state red permanently. Marco Rubio and the GOP know that if we win here, Democrats are virtually guaranteed to keep control of the Senate. So Mitch McConnell and his allies are launching their first barrage of attack ads to defeat me – and they're amassing tens of millions of dollars to run more in the months to come. I'm counting on grassroots supporters like you to help me fight back – because this race is about moving our country forward. It's about expanding our Senate majority so we can pass legislation that will move the needle toward progress on voting rights, climate change, the cost of living and more. I know deep in my soul that this people-powered movement CAN defeat Marco Rubio, but not without the resources it takes to compete in what experts believe could be the most expensive Senate race ever. Time is running out, and I'm counting on your immediate help to hit this goal: = Thank you so much, Val Demings | | = Val Demings here: I can’t thank you enough for fighting alongside me to flip Florida blue. name: BetoORourke.com
subject: A different kind of campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
[1]Beto O'Rourke

On Friday, Beto kicked off our 12-day, 2,100-mile Drive for a Brighter
Texas, and momentum is spreading quickly! Check out these headlines:

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/52544?refcode=ema20220208-175299&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=175299%2E444211%2E1NnML2 ]Denton Record-Chronicle Headline[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/52544?refcode=ema20220208-175299&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=175299%2E444211%2E1NnML2 ]KTXS Headline[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/52544?refcode=ema20220208-175299&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1003&akid=175299%2E444211%2E1NnML2 ]Abilene Reporter News
Headline

At each stop, Beto is sharing his vision for a brighter Texas — and making
time to hear from people about their experience during last year's
preventable grid failure.

Our Campaign Manager, Nick, set a goal to raise $100,000 that will go
directly towards funding this drive — from organizing events to keeping
gas in Beto's truck — and so far, we're 62% of the way to our goal. [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/52544?refcode=ema20220208-175299&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1004&akid=175299%2E444211%2E1NnML2 ]We
still have a lot of distance to cover, so will you chip in
$3 or more to help fill Beto's gas tank?

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/52544?refcode=ema20220208-175299&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1023&akid=175299%2E444211%2E1NnML2 ]Contribute $3

We're
running a different kind of campaign than Greg Abbott, because Beto will
be a different kind of Governor.

When the winter storms struck last February, Greg Abbott went on Fox News
to spout conservative talking points. Beto went directly to help people on
the ground by passing out water and checking in on neighbors.

While Greg Abbott protects the profits of energy executives and refuses to
make needed updates to the power grid, Beto has a 5-point plan to prevent
another deadly power crisis.

And while Greg Abbott funds his campaign with million-dollar checks from
corporate mega-donors, Beto is funding this campaign with $5, $10, and $15
donations, so he can keep 100% of his focus on the people of this state.

The
differences couldn't be starker. Beto's on the road meeting thousands of
folks, listening to their concerns, and spreading our positive vision. He
needs to know that we've got his back.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/52544?refcode=ema20220208-175299&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1024&akid=175299%2E444211%2E1NnML2 ]Please, donate $3 or more today to fund our Drive for a
Brighter Texas and help Beto defeat Abbott come Election Day. Your gift
will directly help power our upcoming events in Tyler, Waco, Austin, San
Antonio, and many more cities and towns throughout Texas.

Thank you,

Beto for Texas

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/bft-unsubscribe/?t=1025&akid=175299%2E444211%2E1NnML2

Pol. Adv. Paid for by Beto for Texas.

body:
I am proud to have received the endorsement of Sunrise Chicago | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yOQozAy4249GfohatM8XLCP7Gyf6bzrkjN8sXh_JjXvDm21fvmGLhqUe-quR3_x0bPZYqqRmKw-ebpnqlyWdsbb4WUxyyDpjjPMxiSxHH8swcO4ART07TJ7OAre9NDyvoP_HsQb_ZZeaT9Q5ZhowRHFbAhzN_o2RIBr9bPlQxgHVSwFVrCS7NZ2sI_YloSW9qajRHkVyDSa2v04LOlAFt64IbmbFhZV-j1FYIHfdhq9hhwAYdw2PQHPYPnE0MCxI1hoAy84slVQFbLx6wWKC3eQvfriRJa6ytn788cpZJn9WxLyorgtUFeeQrodmup1lktNZa30RU-NvdC3nlhQiCcNEKD5-HfR0N4QhDuCTPDjuinsdtxnEeUV6iuXciIwag/3je/p_7NuDkBSW-dkz1wEZCgPg/h0/4dUhsm5rh3AJDnYqzLz8D2BB12PLjqCmxrs9x1F_w24) Team, I am very excited to share that Sunrise Chicago, a group at the epicenter of the Chicago climate movement, has endorsed my campaign for Congress. I think Eli, Sunrise Chicago’s hub coordinator said it best: “**When we fight for Environmental Justice, of course we’re fighting for decarbonization and an equitable clean energy transition. But we're also fighting for an end to the cycles of extraction and violence powered by corporate greed, oppressive institutions and corrupt politicians** —cycles we’ve watched play out across Chicago and the US.” [**Sunrise Chicago is the 24th organization or elected official to endorse this campaign and join our coalition. All of us together are going to win this. We have the people, now we just need to raise the money we need to fuel this campaign. Can you donate $15?**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wNcOc6YQXgT3QRvIzDhxESa0UDCdmrJTjw_uA1lszqD7PKRCdO7FrcJ8GDuaU-hcVO3guYHFUThbqki4Kdp62N6zYBxr78Kdyp1OC6eR6YwHm-Cxxn-IlWDSag7sA6HHVW7Fy8zzH1ldx61pQJ5VOdXbc4idcnj47iDbvNQxqmpvg6LIrA2L5a4k9FxHTydWUkmVZEonOmu3a4PhRFoTuj0njJfR7VHqvWGC5xtwAh_eL0xzG5nLsfJ7ifq2SOuYHVL0TU_UtPTiairu16zG3A9XdTeENQkU-xX5nOggxJCYmsqqWN9Z_msbmFsdVadhovJMAU7lgNa7Stq5HQ1P6z/3je/p_7NuDkBSW-dkz1wEZCgPg/h1/0Ee6hDOa1GivjG_7Y16ao_aDSenxvFgds50pyWHym6o) [Donate](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wNcOc6YQXgT3QRvIzDhxES6raV5uaRgAHd1avM-WcunABu6Uhglr7zUcZvQEiGRR7nDEjdyIgP0CiGmxiofJllYMW6I3CkhHOk1O5F6icrPZgfk6uv1uxEcTWr49RloR49UhxixsUKPRJDJoD_8BaP4n9eSPtsQtsKxQ5N_fpqqas_qhziLzjjpctaJkSxEISAlAcKKKUDSiYWPzU928TKtpuXj2_wz7sAb5H86mdHyG3m7sQ9HOPB_FwcEI7yyWvZkGJA6CXijfA7Ij73GJks78ggd5CBJby80COlV6hqxDql60_J2o4S41k8AcuEStHxqhwHPjSiUV6rgoH69NeW/3je/p_7NuDkBSW-dkz1wEZCgPg/h2/R7Yp3RevdEh5Pevs5a0ruIQAxWCOgY_DwAoxbotTSz8) There are no single issue campaigns. We cannot solve our climate crisis without addressing public safety, education, and healthcare. It is time for proactive leadership from representatives that acknowledge both the urgency and interconnectedness of the destructive cycles we all endure. If we are going to end the climate crisis, we need a Green New Deal to rapidly transition to a 100% clean and renewable energy economy— while also investing in the working-class communities who have been most impacted by the climate crisis. I am so proud to stand shoulder to shoulder with the inspiring young people at Sunrise Chicago in this critical fight for climate justice. [**Team, help our coalition stand up to corporate interests and the Chicago machine and win a just transition for working-class communities! Donate $15 now.**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wNcOc6YQXgT3QRvIzDhxESf870nElR_vyF8M9KC8S67mZOBc9UH9kPTuuzpZoozlomKLBYQKw9yGEPPoQPSE4qVplT2lkMHzrz7JaPKoeS3SkVhEI9YDdgfPWaW_UTm7dDorP3WeP8VQapl7NNEwD-6gpMx-A4rGOrXKE8V-GyYT1xbbpeJGI7_Jqd6f3NKd1PVtHHzmfsezu4B-3sVTjR-wRkXprJUb36gEM7OEajm6iAa2Sp_6cVsC1SAsxHOwiNWAv0NHjvfe8Ey992WKa4wF3LFi9Q0X_jtNVVtywaT8i9frDLsz0UI1azwVjCpo6FvTO0xPPXb40o1-e_nBKo/3je/p_7NuDkBSW-dkz1wEZCgPg/h3/x9D91Jn5YcGS-LSaR7iSqncTHZ7G3BFF8B3xJI-c1yM) In Solidarity, Kina Collins [Donate »](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yOQozAy4249GfohatM8XLCP7Gyf6bzrkjN8sXh_JjXvCmYnnW-6I0oaLoxnMYHNBs0zC9IaHV702RvnHGbmb4SqL3wdPfpZtnC86nQ77J0YA8-R7XMtpULvpgxoJ5R5_V0epLSoW8cP27X6EI1Ifhd_Jw61CwxA6SA9lNWof-kyrQT4Ci-8JRKTxRMa7PHV8a0X56INYDyrG1Nl8CW0Gx73sEqpZIE1GHJERS1tbnEAA0wVG_by3gYWRHhJVsn6t96aaN-xtnzKQceYAvdfsrgGq-TcHwHwMXYtQjBMKLZTf7eLCGCvmupNp3Wk6JXGCqqowN_YK8uaLW3-ZBQvmcInd2bHmodSwhLVi7ag1Qfr3iY7ME4dFFRN_b-t1F0mmY/3je/p_7NuDkBSW-dkz1wEZCgPg/h4/uJ7RIGslD4fGJd5rLHslCrglg3LBuxMtO7pu-sXVAAI) | To give by check:

clean_body: I am proud to have received the endorsement of Sunrise Chicago | | | Team, I am very excited to share that Sunrise Chicago, a group at the epicenter of the Chicago climate movement, has endorsed my campaign for Congress. I think Eli, Sunrise Chicago’s hub coordinator said it best: “When we fight for Environmental Justice, of course we’re fighting for decarbonization and an equitable clean energy transition. But we're also fighting for an end to the cycles of extraction and violence powered by corporate greed, oppressive institutions and corrupt politicians —cycles we’ve watched play out across Chicago and the US.” There are no single issue campaigns. We cannot solve our climate crisis without addressing public safety, education, and healthcare. It is time for proactive leadership from representatives that acknowledge both the urgency and interconnectedness of the destructive cycles we all endure. If we are going to end the climate crisis, we need a Green New Deal to rapidly transition to a 100% clean and renewable energy economy— while also investing in the working-class communities who have been most impacted by the climate crisis. I am so proud to stand shoulder to shoulder with the inspiring young people at Sunrise Chicago in this critical fight for climate justice. In Solidarity, Kina Collins | To give by check: Kina Collins for Congress 901 Lake Street, Unit 4093 Oak Park, IL 60301

name: Conservative Alerts
subject: NH Dems in disarray!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Hampshire Republican State Committee
body:
Tensions keep rising....
Dear Friend,

The New Hampshire Democrats can’t seem to even get along these days. A former member of the Democratic caucus wrote an open letter stating [“I’m changing my affiliation to independent because of the undemocratic nature of the state’s Democratic leadership. The irony is that the ‘Democratic’ party is the least democratic institution I’ve ever been part of.”](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fnhjournal.com%2Fformer-house-dems-open-letter-adds-to-ongoing-chaos-inside-caucus%2F/1/0100017eda98bdc3-2df1b0b4-0708-40e6-9b00-6b6f8c647840-000000/K1G15zmoAfZ_u5Nzh_UPB1thgZk=257)

[The New Hampshire Democratic Party seems to be mimicking what is happening on the national level. Party leadership is not only failing folks across the country but they can’t even hold onto support from their own caucus. ](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Fnh-gop%2Ffebruary22%3Fexitintent=true/1/0100017eda98bdc3-2df1b0b4-0708-40e6-9b00-6b6f8c647840-000000/n0pN-x9naP8a7lsIvejYY4EKeIY=257)

New Hampshire has a HUGE opportunity in 2022 to capitalize on the [FAILURES](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Fnh-gop%2Ffebruary22%3Fexitintent=true/2/0100017eda98bdc3-2df1b0b4-0708-40e6-9b00-6b6f8c647840-000000/EKp4lov6ao8Zy99JVc5reV3rrAk=257) of Democrats at the State Representative level all the way to the U.S. Senate.

[HOWEVER, we cannot do this without your help. The NHGOP cannot recruit, train, and support candidates without the support from our grassroots team. ](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Fnh-gop%2Ffebruary22%3Fexitintent=true/3/0100017eda98bdc3-2df1b0b4-0708-40e6-9b00-6b6f8c647840-000000/63zVuFI1kDsFWW3fI7-uNzx0PC4=257)

[Chip in today if you still support New Hampshire Republicans!](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Fnh-gop%2Ffebruary22%3Fexitintent=true/4/0100017eda98bdc3-2df1b0b4-0708-40e6-9b00-6b6f8c647840-000000/TZnywlORvfYjmUYml8PqKE_KuxQ=257)

Peter,

Democrats just went public with their online fundraising data for the second half of 2021, and the numbers we're seeing across the board are astonishing.

**Democrats are proving once again, as they did in 2020, that they're going to give us Republicans a run for our money - quite literally - in this year's midterm elections.**

If you've been following our Senate race in Georgia, then you already know polling shows our race is a dead heat. You may also know our Democrat opponent, Senator Raphael Warnock, is the #1 fundraiser in the entire country. But what we're now learning is that he raised over $11 million from an astounding 410,276 donors ONLINE in the last six months.

**Peter, that's a lot of money from a lot of donors.** In fact, he's building a massive online network of Democrat donors on the scale of a presidential campaign - not a normal Senate campaign.

That's why we're reaching out to you today with a simple request: **[will you join our grassroots army of conservative PATRIOTS who will propel us to victory in Georgia and flip the Senate in favor of Republicans?](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=1fdae87edcba48bd99e04f41c0dc16ce&_e=LUYcW5EsWnoKu2ttb566CINGH5X4GvIjmwnMwZQDKQgMllplHn9Rf3E2jju6AuhrPt0-Xr1hZZw5P9vrhStO8vvt4BUs7YBBuWJToLwxOwL0SldNIIe_UZY40cQ_T4QjiiiN7UGABkFI7W0BN2DzYRFA_Lsriy0KPUegb0cgwl8npmOY8JoOW5GKZF0dHLWC-ww-nfiXUfjVmO0vU80Yud5qHMrLFIty3Gv_JjsB7kz8C1R5IAK8g4dFnY0DEhz6wgH5z3nBuGrfq25DuEbjno-TPAFK_ttolNuv-gsOZCBtJLMNV9DdRPslA1klsCU0nUOD03SX8yVdAmScer0-fkc26YA8YrtZSg7dSknRrARQRONOommJc0d10tiZ2365Smiyl1MgCtbfBF-FQjWBrn2jI4WIBD5x882T5Kx0zLITVnZlFJFgOnhysJ-6bJupWMBu1u05ik2zntwqW5D9aP8UYtYEgegxVDBSTrOHV48%3D)**

**This month, we're setting a goal of recruiting 10,000 new donors so we can begin closing the financial lead that our opponent holds over our campaign at the moment.**

**[Can we count on you to make a gift of $3.50 or more today and add your name to our list of donors?](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=1fdae87edcba48bd99e04f41c0dc16ce&_e=LUYcW5EsWnoKu2ttb566CINGH5X4GvIjmwnMwZQDKQgMllplHn9Rf3E2jju6AuhrPt0-Xr1hZZw5P9vrhStO8vvt4BUs7YBBuWJToLwxOwL0SldNIIe_UZY40cQ_T4QjiiiN7UGABkFI7W0BN2DzYRFA_Lsriy0KPUegb0cgwl8npmOY8JoOW5GKZF0dHLWC-ww-nfiXUfjVmO0vU80Yud5qHMrLFIty3Gv_JjsB7kz8C1R5IAK8g4dFnY0DEhz6wgH5z3nBuGrfq25DuEbjnre3Ag78ZjZ8grjvnzHVIK_SGFpKYEqurpOcER3QsRD26vrMv0474teuTJFx5KyCzf1-KDIZzOrsjOw2O9YZ86wARsOdnTo0DD88pyPLPo7Ii7-X4gB-2kGM5uaTSuLf0anwbS0MtWYd1kOLbm5tZp1TBv0aOVuIN1Il1FN6ec3iNZUGnN01ukHnFUxEV3gRe2d1fIRJ_L5XIXdZAMi7SeU%3D)**

[** ADD YOUR NAME TO OUR LIST OF SUPPORTERS **](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=1fdae87edcba48bd99e04f41c0dc16ce&_e=LUYcW5EsWnoKu2ttb566CINGH5X4GvIjmwnMwZQDKQgMllplHn9Rf3E2jju6AuhrPt0-Xr1hZZw5P9vrhStO8vvt4BUs7YBBuWJToLwxOwL0SldNIIe_UZY40cQ_T4QjiiiN7UGABkFI7W0BN2DzYRFA_Lsriy0KPUegb0cgwl8npmOY8JoOW5GKZF0dHLWC-ww-nfiXUfjVmO0vU80Yud5qHMrLFIty3Gv_JjsB7kz8C1R5IAK8g4dFnY0DEhz6wgH5z3nBuGrfq25DuEbjnha3uY70tRggBew7IcqZmTsX7e17xty5jsyHV6BZKNWC6_hFXtkViUDQYF-lr2lT4bwnCM72FvVLTSJyV1EOBzH_xAR1_kLsMYRHBBNB4DQusC4-vTCJf_o8ObyplqhaBQxux3rNtUiQQclSC1hiK46MpeqmOxbep2VvF2497iFQp3C7xvU_vuk5WrjO6wJmEODN9xY56BI9OGirhtnepDA%3D)
**THERE IS NO SUGARCOATING THE FACTS. Our opponent is raising A LOT OF MONEY.**

Before we ever thought about entering the race, Senator Warnock was raising millions of dollars from hundreds of thousands of Democrat donors around the country. Now that we're all in, we must do everything we can - **each and every day** - to build a donor base of PATRIOTS that rivals his list of blue state supporters.

The Senate race in Georgia will most likely be the most expensive race in the country this year, so we can't do this without you on board.

**[If you haven't yet contributed to Team Herschel, can we count on you to stand with us now? If you have already given in the last six months, will you step up once more and help us again?](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=1fdae87edcba48bd99e04f41c0dc16ce&_e=LUYcW5EsWnoKu2ttb566CINGH5X4GvIjmwnMwZQDKQgMllplHn9Rf3E2jju6AuhrPt0-Xr1hZZw5P9vrhStO8vvt4BUs7YBBuWJToLwxOwL0SldNIIe_UZY40cQ_T4QjiiiN7UGABkFI7W0BN2DzYRFA_Lsriy0KPUegb0cgwl8npmOY8JoOW5GKZF0dHLWC-ww-nfiXUfjVmO0vU80Yud5qHMrLFIty3Gv_JjsB7kz8C1R5IAK8g4dFnY0DEhz6wgH5z3nBuGrfq25DuEbjntU0caimWdQJVy-urpZVboTcvd8A6G9BSJ_Y_SycNSwydA62ppXo-jzz9ERfgSnAEnJwMIdPQR9pn06GqFI8jG2ftkn_eQ9RiY9lNvYhtAuLVjNdwM1w5A-u8QvD7GRINdupnBLn974TvQgF6kAtrns8kjwy2gflbE43a8m7LgdXarA5-d2Y_5r_3cgvH7bd9DklB9bV5ysReBKGj2y-P4Y%3D)**

The Senate race in Georgia will most likely be the most expensive race in the country this year, so we can't do this without you on board. | Peter, Democrats just went public with their online fundraising data for the second half of 2021, and the numbers we're seeing across the board are astonishing. Democrats are proving once again, as they did in 2020, that they're going to give us Republicans a run for our money - quite literally - in this year's midterm elections. If you've been following our Senate race in Georgia, then you already know polling shows our race is a dead heat. You may also know our Democrat opponent, Senator Raphael Warnock, is the #1 fundraiser in the entire country. But what we're now learning is that he raised over $11 million from an astounding 410,276 donors ONLINE in the last six months. Peter, that's a lot of money from a lot of donors. In fact, he's building a massive online network of Democrat donors on the scale of a presidential campaign - not a normal Senate campaign. That's why we're reaching out to you today with a simple request: This month, we're setting a goal of recruiting 10,000 new donors so we can begin closing the financial lead that our opponent holds over our campaign at the moment. THERE IS NO SUGARCOATING THE FACTS. Our opponent is raising A LOT OF MONEY. Before we ever thought about entering the race, Senator Warnock was raising millions of dollars from hundreds of thousands of Democrat donors around the country. Now that we're all in, we must do everything we can - each and every day - to build a donor base of PATRIOTS that rivals his list of blue state supporters. The Senate race in Georgia will most likely be the most expensive race in the country this year, so we can't do this without you on board. Team Herschel is made stronger from folks just like you. We hope you will join our team today. Thanks for your consideration, Herschel Walker Republican Candidate for Senate P.S. name: Peter Welch
subject: I left college and became an organizer
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WELCH FOR VERMONT
body:
I wanted to share with you all why I have spent my career in public service, and what keeps me going.
# [](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/144?t=2&akid=99%2E61531%2EH01t9h)
Hello,
I wanted to share with you all why I have spent my career in public service, and what keeps me going. And that story starts when I was 20 years old and working as a community organizer, fighting housing discrimination in Chicago.
I worked with Black families in the Lawndale neighborhood in West Chicago, supporting their efforts to end the predatory practices of banks, brokers, and home sellers.
We’d watch banks buy houses, only to turn around and try to sell them to Black families for double the price. These banks did everything they could to get families on the hook for predatory mortgages and contracts. They made it almost impossible to miss a payment without losing the house completely, leaving families stranded with no home and no equity.
What struck me the most was that this was all legal. The laws allowed banks and speculators to discriminate against people because of the color of their skin. So together, we worked to stage demonstrations out in suburban Chicago, where the lenders lived. We organized rent payment strikes. We went toe-to-toe with Mayor Daley to end those contracts, and to save families in Chicago millions of dollars.
And at the end of the day, we successfully changed those contracts. But the fight opened my eyes to getting to the root of the problem — how the laws in place let racism flourish and become systematic. Our action made a difference, but only because of incredible courage, perseverance and risk on the part of these Black families were we able to bring about real change.
Sometimes, change feels like it will take too much, or too long, to make a tangible difference in our communities. But every little piece of work makes a difference. It makes a difference to show up and fight for what’s right. It makes a difference to listen to the communities you serve, and hear what they need.
That’s what I learned in Chicago, and that’s what I’ve brought with me to every job I’ve had since then.
My experience in Chicago led me to work in politics — to fight for what is right, to change laws and systems that are unjust, and to be a voice for those who have not always had a seat at the table. It’s how I serve my community now as Vermont’s Congressman, and how I would continue to serve as Vermont’s next Senator.
[**To help power this fight, consider chipping into our campaign today. Together, we can make real change for those who need it.**](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/1333?t=3&akid=99%2E61531%2EH01t9h)
_If you’ve saved payment info with ActBlue Express, you donation will process automatically:_

Peter

name: Tara Franklin
subject: Ingrid Centurion Campaign
body:
Good Evening Everyone

My name is Tara Franklin. I am working with Ingrid Centurion to help build
support and really work on the fundraising for the campaign. As we all lead
busy lives, it is often difficult to really jump in and assist with some of
the outside events. I am hoping that I can get a few of you to assist with
some fundraising calls.

I wanted to reach out and see who is willing to pull up their sleeves and
jump in with calling some of the potential donors that we have on our list.
If you are interested and willing to help out, we have a script that will
help you when calling and I will send you a list. The list is easy to

clean_body: Good Evening Everyone My name is Tara Franklin. I am working with Ingrid Centurion to help build support and really work on the fundraising for the campaign. As we all lead busy lives, it is often difficult to really jump in and assist with some of the outside events. I am hoping that I can get a few of you to assist with some fundraising calls. I wanted to reach out and see who is willing to pull up their sleeves and jump in with calling some of the potential donors that we have on our list. Best Regards Tara Franklin Team Ingrid 910-382-7450

| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001CJsK-BUMPWXkN4KDegfnIgAn-zrPszwJ-RGrQ4PcWWEEAyH_elhm6ECfbTtl-x1199auvde_ws-5gbsOLZylvPgT66m4k5Fi3HRD1_JbG_tH4IKZmGCMGMGExt59kTwd1dS-CLqnphLyNZGqYkEDA0RV-G-W1WK_RFlpVWCuhkFlDeqociEqu3nEKZ4D2DngYG0O6IuaHDw=&c=rCnlOy_TWr4PGo7sFyLorYHRYAYaFqqUde1F-lHJzVqP64o1FjWArg==&ch=cuQm9hpX6RJ5H-1w29ij76m72_SoiVPibNbI5Ad9fSCPy6Oq7HAY3w==)

| Peter,
A true leader has the strength and determination to stand up for what's right. From the Biden administration to the woke wannabes of corporate America, there is NO ONE that Governor DeSantis is afraid to call out and fight back against when he sees injustices taking place. When GoFundMe commandeered donations to the convoy of truckers standing up for their freedom, Governor DeSantis immediately took action and demanded an investigation into the company. Now is a time when leadership matters. We need leaders who are willing to demonstrate the courage to do what is necessary and hold bad-faith actors accountable. Governor DeSantis is that leader. He'll never back down and he'll never stand by and watch as Floridians and Americans are harmed by corrupt individuals and woke corporations advancing Democrats' extremist ideology. Thank you for fighting with us, Team DeSantis

name: Nancy Pelosi
subject: MSNBC (SHOCKING announcement)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nancy Pelosi for Congress
body:
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Kerry=20McQuisten=20for=20Oregon?=
subject: Election integrity thoughts...
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/71b3e8fd51c8/were-off-and-running-6756430?e=ae2345792a)
---
| |
---
| |
# Thoughts on election integrity...
Election integrity is a hot topic. I've heard _every_ Republican gubernatorial candidate publicly discuss this issue over the last few months. I've posted on Facebook about it a few times as well. Each candidate has a different point of view, however. I personally believe that if we don't have solid, fair elections, our entire Republic is in jeopardy, so there's really no topic more important.

Ironically, this discussion comes at the same time as a situation that happened with one of my meet and greets. Last December, my kind hosts for a Cave Junction gathering sent out over 400 invitations in the mail. Those invitations vanished into thin air, never to be seen ... until this week! Suddenly, all 400+ began to show up - without postmarks - in mailboxes around the area. For obvious reasons underscored here, I believe our mail-in voting system is fraught with opportunities for fraud. I'm old enough to remember going to the Wingville Grange with my parents to vote, and vastly preferred it. Voting was a community event back then, and I felt emotionally and mentally invested in the process. Most people knew casting that vote was both an honor and a duty as Oregonians and Americans. The vote-by-mail system was finally fully voted in by the people, after years of incremental implementation; it should be voted back out.

Cleanup of voter rolls should happen regularly. Oh, the stories I hear about deceased voters! Ballot harvesting as it now exists needs banned in Oregon.

Oregon does NOT use Dominion voting machines - or any voting machine for that matter. That's a myth.

Motor voter, in my opinion, is probably the biggest source of fraud - both intentional and accidental. I have heard at nearly every event I've had in every county from someone who checked their registration and found they had been moved against their wishes from Republican to NAV. The million NAVs we have in Oregon aren't all simply voters who are angry with both major parties. Many don't know they've become NAVs until their ballot doesn't arrive in the primary. By then, it's too late. We need some tough legislators in place who will tackle motor voter.

Finally, we need to address voter apathy._Republicans in our state sit on tens of thousands of ballots every election cycle._**Those votes did matter. Your voice does matter!** Turn in those ballots (at the dropbox) to the extent we overwhelm any cheating. Remind your friends and family to turn theirs in. # # #
Reminder! Get your tickets for my upcoming Salem fundraiser with Vance Day on my web site at **[Shop | Kerry McQuisten](https://KerryMcQuisten.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a6f5300a53ab781de615e5a1&id=f68fe7d186&e=ae2345792a). **
_**Please join my fight to save Oregon today! **_ Your donations help me stop my wealthy opposition from buying the primary with a flood of TV ads.**Your dollars will be effectively spent.** I'm willing to do all the work it takes, but I can't do it without you.

Yours,
_Kerry_

clean_body: | | | | | | | Thoughts on election integrity... Election integrity is a hot topic. I've heard every Republican gubernatorial candidate publicly discuss this issue over the last few months. I've posted on Facebook about it a few times as well. Each candidate has a different point of view, however. I personally believe that if we don't have solid, fair elections, our entire Republic is in jeopardy, so there's really no topic more important. Ironically, this discussion comes at the same time as a situation that happened with one of my meet and greets. Last December, my kind hosts for a Cave Junction gathering sent out over 400 invitations in the mail. Those invitations vanished into thin air, never to be seen ... until this week! Suddenly, all 400+ began to show up - without postmarks - in mailboxes around the area. For obvious reasons underscored here, I believe our mail-in voting system is fraught with opportunities for fraud. I'm old enough to remember going to the Wingville Grange with my parents to vote, and vastly preferred it. Voting was a community event back then, and I felt emotionally and mentally invested in the process. Most people knew casting that vote was both an honor and a duty as Oregonians and Americans. The vote-by-mail system was finally fully voted in by the people, after years of incremental implementation; it should be voted back out. Cleanup of voter rolls should happen regularly. Oh, the stories I hear about deceased voters! Ballot harvesting as it now exists needs banned in Oregon. Oregon does NOT use Dominion voting machines - or any voting machine for that matter. That's a myth. Motor voter, in my opinion, is probably the biggest source of fraud - both intentional and accidental. I have heard at nearly every event I've had in every county from someone who checked their registration and found they had been moved against their wishes from Republican to NAV. The million NAVs we have in Oregon aren't all simply voters who are angry with both major parties. Many don't know they've become NAVs until their ballot doesn't arrive in the primary. By then, it's too late. We need some tough legislators in place who will tackle motor voter. Finally, we need to address voter apathy.Republicans in our state sit on tens of thousands of ballots every election cycle.Those votes did matter. Your voice does matter! Turn in those ballots (at the dropbox) to the extent we overwhelm any cheating. Remind your friends and family to turn theirs in. # # # Reminder! Get your tickets for my upcoming Salem fundraiser with Vance Day on my web site at . Please join my fight to save Oregon today! Your donations help me stop my wealthy opposition from buying the primary with a flood of TV ads.Your dollars will be effectively spent. I'm willing to do all the work it takes, but I can't do it without you. Yours, Kerry | "DONATE TODAY!" | Your gift of $25, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or more will help me achieve critical goals like attending events in all 36 Oregon counties and buying TV advertising! LEARN MORE AT | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2022 Kerry McQuisten for Oregon, All rights reserved.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Captain=20Mike=20for=20Governor?=
subject: Gaining support! Peter, will you endorse my campaign too?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michael Brown for Governor • P
body:
“Michael Brown is my choice for Governor. As a business owner, I’m grateful that he understands how businesses in the state are hurting,” Singh said. | | | |
---
| | | Peter:

The momentum is growing. **Every day more and more Michiganders join the campaign.**

Today, I'm pleased to announce that business owner Sam Singh has endorsed my campaign.

This is what Sam had to say:
> “Michael Brown is my choice for Governor. As a business owner, I’m grateful that Michael understands how businesses in the state are hurting. Taxes are too high, and the regulations imposed on us make it difficult to conduct business."
Sam owns three petroleum stations as well as other businesses. He’s frustrated that sales taxes collected on gasoline do not go towards fixing roads.
---
|
---
|
> “I pay thousands of dollars to the state of Michigan in gas taxes, and I want every cent of that devoted to our roads and infrastructure. My customers want that too, and Michael Brown will make sure that happens.” – Sam Singh

I’m grateful for Sam’s support.

Gretchen Whitmer put thousands of Michiganders out of work and forced many small businesses to close because of her unlawful lockdown orders. **From day one I’ll be focused on creating a positive business-friendly environment** so we can compete with our neighboring states and expand opportunities in our state.

We need to revitalize Michigan. I'll **reduce the state income tax** on individuals and businesses, **repeal the tax on retirement benefits** , **reduce burdensome regulations** , and ensure that **sales taxes collected on gasoline purchases are earmarked for road improvements.**

I challenge you today: add your name to the growing list of endorsements.

Join Sam Singh and other business owners, as well as **State Representative Beth Griffin** , St. Joseph County **Sheriff Mark Lillywhite** , Berrien County **Prosecutor Steve Pierangeli** , Motor City Madman **Ted Nugent** , and many other Michigan citizens in supporting my campaign.

Together we can Fix Michigan.

Thank you,

Michael Brown
Republican for Governor

clean_body: We need Herschel Walker in the Senate running circles around Chuck Schumer, but it will be a costly battle. | Fellow Conservative, What if I told you we have a chance to... ...defeat one of the most liberal Democrats in the Senate? ...take back the Senate by winning just ONE race in Georgia? ...elect a conservative superstar and football hero to the United States Senate? What if I told you we can do ALL THREE? That's why I'm endorsing my friend, Herschel Walker. From crushing it on the college and professional football fields to owning a successful business and being a spokesman for an organization that provides mental health services for our troops, Herschel Walker has done just about everything. Now, he's taking on his next challenge and facing his biggest race yet by running for Senate. We need Herschel Walker in the Senate running circles around Chuck Schumer, but it will be a costly battle. His Democrat opponent Raphael Warnock is the #1 fundraising senator in the entire country. In fact, he raised $9.8 million in the past three months alone! If we're going to help Herschel win in Georgia and flip the Senate Majority red, he's going to need the critical resources to fund his campaign. That's where you and I come in. My very best, Nikki Haley | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but .

| Peter,
A true leader has the strength and determination to stand up for what's right. From the Biden administration to the woke wannabes of corporate America, there is NO ONE that Governor DeSantis is afraid to call out and fight back against when he sees injustices taking place. When GoFundMe commandeered donations to the convoy of truckers standing up for their freedom, Governor DeSantis immediately took action and demanded an investigation into the company. Now is a time when leadership matters. We need leaders who are willing to demonstrate the courage to do what is necessary and hold bad-faith actors accountable. Governor DeSantis is that leader. He'll never back down and he'll never stand by and watch as Floridians and Americans are harmed by corrupt individuals and woke corporations advancing Democrats' extremist ideology. Thank you for fighting with us, Team DeSantis

Mitch McConnell and Republicans are desperate to retake control of the Senate. We’re facing unprecedented levels of right-wing spending in Admiral Mike Franken’s campaign to defeat Chuck Grassley because Iowa will decide the majority.
__**FIRST:**__ Admiral Mike Franken announced he was running against Chuck Grassley – giving Democrats our best chance ever to turn Iowa blue.

name: Ben Samuels
subject: Black History Month
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BEN SAMUELS FOR CONGRESS
body:
Hey friends,
As we enter into February, it’s important to recognize that we’re entering into an important month. Black History Month is a time to acknowledge that we live in a nation with complex history and with an often difficult past. This month is a time to be honest with ourselves, recognize our past, and think about how we can make tomorrow a better place for all Americans.
Black History Month is also a time to reflect on all that Black American leaders have accomplished, in spite of the adversity that they have faced.
Remember those who came before us this month and made this country a better place.
Thank you,
Ben Samuels
Ben Samuels is a businessperson, an economic policy expert, and a bipartisan problem-solver running for Congress in Missouri’s 2nd Congressional District to bring jobs and opportunities back to the St. Louis area.
Support Ben's campaign for Congress by making a donation today.

body:
Only 1 week left to enter! | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/neilforarkansas/ar-15-giveaway-extension-5066141?e=eda539b26b)
---
