name: CharlesBooker.org
subject: Good news and bad news
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[1]Charles Booker

Peter, we have
good news and bad news.

We’ll start with the good — there’s been a lot of it lately. We just had
our biggest fundraising month since we launched our campaign, thousands of
y’all have given your personal endorsements, and we announced a state-wide
road trip to meet voters where they’re at. It’s clear that Kentucky is
hungry for the meaningful, progressive change our campaign is fighting
for.

But here’s the bad news: Rand Paul raised nearly $4 million in the final
quarter of 2021. His friends in Wall Street, Big Pharma, and the fossil
fuel industry are ramping up their donations to make sure Rand stays in
office.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220208?refcode=em20220208-1551&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&refcode2=1551_346206_vHX9w-&akid=1551%2E346206%2EvHX9w- ][IMG]

We’re gaining momentum — but it’s clear we urgently need to amp up our
fundraising so we can compete with Rand’s dark money and prepare for every
attack the GOP has planned this election. [ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220208?refcode=em20220208-1551&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&refcode2=1551_346206_vHX9w-&akid=1551%2E346206%2EvHX9w- ]Can you please make
a $5 donation right now to power our grassroots funded
campaign?

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220208?refcode=em20220208-1551&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&refcode2=1551_346206_vHX9w-&akid=1551%2E346206%2EvHX9w- ]Contribute $5

Charles always says that if you have faith just the size of a mustard
seed, you can move a mountain.

This grassroots movement has already moved mountains in the past months
since we launched our historic movement to replace Rand Paul. Together,
we’re proving what’s possible when we fight hard, fight together, and
fight for our common values.

The harsh truth is that Democrat fundraising totals across the country
have been dwarfed by far-right candidates like Rand Paul who are peddling
dangerous conspiracies. It’s urgent we catch up and make sure that we
continue hitting our monthly goals so we can do the organizing work that’s
necessary to win this race.

Rand Paul can spend as much as he wants in attack ads, but we know that’s
no match for the very real, personal conversations our volunteers are
having with voters in Kentucky. At the end of the day — our bold,
progressive agenda is the message that motivates voters.

We might not have as much money as Rand’s team has in the bank, but we
just need enough to power our voter outreach programs and make sure our
volunteers have the resources they need to keep organizing.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220208?refcode=em20220208-1551&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1023&refcode2=1551_346206_vHX9w-&akid=1551%2E346206%2EvHX9w- ]Can you chip in even just $5 to help us take our
campaign to the next level? We’re relying on donations from emails like
this one to make sure we have the resources to power our voter outreach
and organizing efforts in every corner of Kentucky.

Keep fighting,

Team Booker

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20220208-1551-footer&t=1024&refcode2=1551_346206_vHX9w-&akid=1551%2E346206%2EvHX9w-

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1551%2E346206%2EvHX9w-

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: Henry Cuellar
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Jessica Cisneros has less than a week to go before in-person early
voting begins!

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/93354?refcode=em20220208-21888&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=21888%2E1203867%2EW4hwna ]Can you split a contribution between Jessica and Justice Democrats
right away so we can defeat Henry Cuellar?

Peter,

Justice Democrat Jessica Cisneros is facing an anti-abortion,
corporate-backed Democrat that has millions in campaign cash from Big
Pharma, fossil fuel executives, and private prisons. His name is Henry
Cuellar and he’s the most conservative Democrat in the House.

AND, Cuellar is getting investigated by the FBI. If we have a chance to
lift Jessica to victory, it’s right now. The cloud of an FBI investigation
is hanging over Cuellar and he just accepted an award from an extreme
anti-abortion group. Jessica can absolutely win this race, but Cuellar has
more than $2 million of campaign cash — nearly 5 times more than Jessica.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/93354?refcode=em20220208-21888&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=21888%2E1203867%2EW4hwna ]Can you help Jessica close the gap and have enough money to expand the
Squad in Congress? Split a donation between Jessica and Justice Democrats
right away — in-person early voting in this race starts in LESS THAN A
WEEK.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/93354?refcode=em20220208-21888&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=21888%2E1203867%2EW4hwna ]Contribute $3

Nearly 90% of Congressional races are won by the candidate who spends more
money. But, we’ve won races with less money, like when Alexandria
Ocasio-Cortez beat a high-ranking corporate Democrat in 2018. But it’s
really hard to do, and that’s one of the reasons AOC’s victory shocked the
political establishment so much.

Jessica has been building a campaign to win since 2019. This is her second
challenge against Cuellar. Another Justice Democrat shocked the political
establishment when she ran a second time: Cori Bush.

Jessica can win her race with less money,
Peter, and Justice Democrats
can once again shock the political establishment. But we need to tighten
the gap and ensure Jessica has the resources to reach as many voters as
possible before in-person early voting starts next week, and primary
election day comes on March 1.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/93354?refcode=em20220208-21888&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1023&akid=21888%2E1203867%2EW4hwna ]Rush a $3 donation to Jessica and Justice Democrats
right now. Jessica’s campaign will be spending a lot of money in the next
few weeks on voter outreach, but so will Cuellar’s campaign. Help us
defeat the last anti-abortion Democrat in the House by helping us close
the fundraising gap today.

We can only win these upset primary victories with your
help, Peter.

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1024&akid=21888%2E1203867%2EW4hwna ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1025&akid=21888%2E1203867%2EW4hwna ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20220208-21888-footer&t=1026&refcode2=21888_1203867_W4hwna&akid=21888%2E1203867%2EW4hwna

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1027&akid=21888%2E1203867%2EW4hwna

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: Team Biaggi
subject: Everyone will be watching
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alessandra Biaggi for Congress
body:
What if we told you that this is going to be a short primary, and every donation we receive in these first few days goes farther than at any other point in the campaign?
#
Friends —
Please let us explain why it's so important that you make a contribution to Alessandra Biaggi's campaign before midnight tonight.
The truth is that our opponents have already raised hundreds of thousands of dollars, so every donation we receive in these first few days will go a long way in helping us to organize and win — and when we file our first fundraising report, everyone will be looking to see how many donations we received.
Individual donations are especially important, because Alessandra isn’t taking corporate PAC money and can’t self-fund her campaign.
So please — help Alessandra launch strong. Let’s send her to Congress so she can keep fighting for all of us like she has in the State Senate.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Niki=20Conforti?=
subject: What About Our Borders?
body:
| | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/521321d73c6e/conforti-for-congress-6789509?e=25f4fa3311)
---
| | |
---
| | | Dear Peter,

How ironic!!

This administration is sending thousands of our young men and women to protect the borders of Ukraine. Yet they have done nothing to protect our own borders.

In 2021, over 2 million undocumented aliens have crossed the southern border of our country with no effort to stop them. With them, these migrants have brought disease, crime and drugs. They are being flown in the dead of night to US cities across the country. They are given checks to help them get settled. Their children are given special tutors, while our children struggle every day to get back to a normal school life as a result of the regulations pushed by this administration.

Our communities are being put at risk while our armed forces are being shipped out to protect foreign countries!

When I get to Congress, I will fight to protect our borders and our citizens. We must end the influx and give our Border Control units the resources they need to close US borders!

If you want your US Congressional Representative to fight for you and your rights, vote Conforti for Congress 2022!
Please consider donating to the Conforti for Congress campaign. [Click here](https://conforti4congress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7fd34b7284bf7f5e87a4e45e5&id=22f6461f86&e=25f4fa3311)
---
| Thank you,

Niki Conforti
Candidate
Illinois 6th Congressional District

disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DURANT FOR SENATE
body:
My opponents are the swamp

| [](http://links.durantforsenate.com/u/click?_t=02743ebc773d4d56aaad0942d1097fe3&_m=12e98d5574a04eb68e59d880a3dda87c&_e=p-tLUS_HbJ6kclUg-7EZmRP8j_Io54LaQ1VaoAYnfgNz6WBdTUgbxYcBCai3SS0H7JhgGi6z_BR_Odh6_WNidRmBzkoIYhkpiuGFgNux1llpMYK1t012AfbFHvKdXZokb__XI6ow6I7fWPR4YoCYV4MbhFhnuyqChOVMEdEDyyZFWL-AnJ2rguNvSXlpDSfjEpc6Nz7jHVgasmB0Dr6TdglUV0l4Wt_X4UmFK9EjHkhfwhhUGk-96TTNOE6pz-B8A9eLuxEdYiFT8YdAfqfdWuYJ6aGaqvcHnZ1hHt1vgRAeQi2hN23zJoKEoLMbYhDD0CWMKLMF30xjruPr5oNhqxU-XzTEB8xfyIkZQvnePzrBIFhKY1SmmgqCqzM9LZvWnRzRMTVkSw5smoW9GMlq35dRdXF43gEhTpqaauSw5kCg5ibK47Yua6FblHz4PkNSDivkqVn_8LvwHyfr59Ex5-fc7c7mt9y5MybswT6d0aJHIqLH5mzaB_Ec-XEztVyZelx99NLFbWDdfDvFQY5zrqTv4Dd3V5fp86METlh8bhNERI1JXc1C6_n7X6kJS99J)

Friends,

**I know that I’m not your typical Senate candidate.** I’m not a Career Politician, a Washington insider, or a wealthy billionaire. I’m just a humble guy who wants to serve America any way that he can.

I’m Mike Durant. You might recognize my story from the movie _Black Hawk Down_. I was a Black Hawk pilot in Mogadishu in 1993. I was captured and held as a Prisoner of War for 11 days. Through my 22 years in the Army, I learned the value of service and the power of sacrifice.

I will always put honor, country, and mission above all else.

[**Join my team today >>>**](http://links.durantforsenate.com/u/click?_t=02743ebc773d4d56aaad0942d1097fe3&_m=12e98d5574a04eb68e59d880a3dda87c&_e=p-tLUS_HbJ6kclUg-7EZmRP8j_Io54LaQ1VaoAYnfgNz6WBdTUgbxYcBCai3SS0H7JhgGi6z_BR_Odh6_WNidRmBzkoIYhkpiuGFgNux1llpMYK1t012AfbFHvKdXZokb__XI6ow6I7fWPR4YoCYV4MbhFhnuyqChOVMEdEDyyZFWL-AnJ2rguNvSXlpDSfjEpc6Nz7jHVgasmB0Dr6TdglUV0l4Wt_X4UmFK9EjHkhfwhhUGk-96TTNOE6pz-B8A9eLuxEdYiFT8YdAfqfdWuYJ6aGaqvcHnZ1hHt1vgRAeQi2hN23zJoKEoLMbYhDD0CWMKLMF30xjruPr5oNhqxU-XzTEB8xfyIkZQvnePzpJbsEcWsdcyuuiFIieQVnt1zXk_Qo-YYBdYyst4zMrEVpPJnPbiMuGOmhNwpar76hk7Ox7dzjB7Nj2y5Iny6GCpuR-9BRSsAmYRmbo6_4jQ5zK8raWdhXT-UUaeI5zFZ6aLQ2-7jsnXRs0xI_zsZg7QCH2ucPTQZx9paCVeR1p6T7M3pyDB7b3CgiWMq6GfTdfzk28ceTi5-SxZS2VXL8W)

I believe in America and all that it stands for. I believe in the American dream, our American values, and that America is the best country in the world. I will do anything I can to make sure that our communities, our people, and our borders are safe.

**I’m not running for Senate for the power or the prestige – I’ll leave that to my opponents. I’m signing up for one more tour of duty to serve _you_.**

I’m running against the very definition of Career Politicians. These are people who have been in DC for countless years, cozying up to the insiders and staying distant from their constituents. They promise to change things – but they’ve already had that chance.

It’s time to send an outsider to shake things up. I’ll fight for you. I’m not afraid to put it all on the line.
**Chip in today
🇺🇸 🇺🇸 🇺🇸**
| [**CHIP IN $5**](http://links.durantforsenate.com/u/click?_t=02743ebc773d4d56aaad0942d1097fe3&_m=12e98d5574a04eb68e59d880a3dda87c&_e=p-tLUS_HbJ6kclUg-7EZmRP8j_Io54LaQ1VaoAYnfgNz6WBdTUgbxYcBCai3SS0H7JhgGi6z_BR_Odh6_WNidRmBzkoIYhkpiuGFgNux1llpMYK1t012AfbFHvKdXZokb__XI6ow6I7fWPR4YoCYV4MbhFhnuyqChOVMEdEDyyZFWL-AnJ2rguNvSXlpDSfjEpc6Nz7jHVgasmB0Dr6TdglUV0l4Wt_X4UmFK9EjHkhfwhhUGk-96TTNOE6pz-B8A9eLuxEdYiFT8YdAfqfdWuYJ6aGaqvcHnZ1hHt1vgRAeQi2hN23zJoKEoLMbYhDD0CWMKLMF30xjruPr5oNhq4YxTBaUaGl7L921lBpv_3_it7yaVmlBQCUkwkPDVgjRq8oofIlPXzZnwWtKl6TZuRt_yCPC-8SThKgFXz0Qyin1hLLpFqH6TqGgkRI117PQd1dJZLGjP6yd6pInKRIQ2loI15-YpYEAIoX0wjnmUkFL0aOXRZ43v2BrHhajm73VMMzOn40fFClnNS3InuArjqX6Cs3g7MWtfVjhiWacKmCQfeWxB4rnj8Lv5RRL1BA7VyTBxPFa66GoaN-M4bsvVQ%3D%3D)

clean_body: My opponents are the swamp | Friends, I know that I’m not your typical Senate candidate. I’m not a Career Politician, a Washington insider, or a wealthy billionaire. I’m just a humble guy who wants to serve America any way that he can. I’m Mike Durant. You might recognize my story from the movie Black Hawk Down. I was a Black Hawk pilot in Mogadishu in 1993. I was captured and held as a Prisoner of War for 11 days. Through my 22 years in the Army, I learned the value of service and the power of sacrifice. I will always put honor, country, and mission above all else. I believe in America and all that it stands for. I believe in the American dream, our American values, and that America is the best country in the world. I will do anything I can to make sure that our communities, our people, and our borders are safe. I’m not running for Senate for the power or the prestige – I’ll leave that to my opponents. I’m signing up for one more tour of duty to serve you. I’m running against the very definition of Career Politicians. These are people who have been in DC for countless years, cozying up to the insiders and staying distant from their constituents. They promise to change things – but they’ve already had that chance. It’s time to send an outsider to shake things up. I’ll fight for you. I’m not afraid to put it all on the line. Chip in today 🇺🇸 🇺🇸 🇺🇸 | Thank you, Mike Durant, Black Hawk Down PAID FOR BY DURANT FOR SENATE Not authorized by any other candidate. DURANT FOR SENATE PO Box 11548 Huntsville, AL 35814 Mike Durant is retired from the U.S. Army, where he served for 22 years. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Departments of Army or Defense. Don't want to receive our emails anymore?

clean_body: But Pelosi is dead set on stopping us... | Peter, Our chances of FIRING Nancy Pelosi have never been better... But control of the House will still come down to a handful of key races – including this toss-up Arizona district where conservative fighter Juan Ciscomani will go toe-to-toe with a radical, Pelosi-backed socialist. With so much riding on the outcome of this one critical race, Nancy Pelosi and her DCCC are gearing up to spend MILLIONS here in Arizona to try and torpedo Juan’s campaign. That’s why I promised him I’d reach out to every grassroots patriot I know to help him marshal the resources he needs to FIGHT BACK. As Republican Whip, I know what a successful conservative fighter looks like, and Juan is exactly the type of Representative we need to get America back on the right track. He embodies the American dream, and I know he’ll fight for YOU each and every day in the halls of Congress. That’s why I was proud to endorse his grassroots campaign: But Nancy Pelosi will stop at nothing to save her House majority, and she’s doing everything she can to destroy all the momentum Juan’s built. I hope I can count on YOU to help power us to victory in this critical race. Thank you, Steve Scalise House Republican Whip PAID FOR BY CISCOMANI FOR CONGRESS P.O. Box 35103 Tucson, AZ 85740

name: PramilaForCongress.com
subject: An uphill battle on climate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
To address the ever more frequent and serious climate disasters, Pramila is fighting for frontline communities and climate resiliency.
#
**Peter, we need to take action on climate change now.**
Extreme winter weather is again hitting communities across the country not prepared for freezing temperatures, ice, and snow. Last summer, historic high temperatures in the Pacific Northwest caused roads to buckle under the stress of the heat. These historic weather events are getting worse and more frequent.
To address the ever more frequent and serious climate disasters, Pramila is fighting for frontline communities and climate resiliency. Two weeks ago, she introduced the Climate Resilience Workforce Act. In response to massive, expensive efforts to clean up and rebuild damaged homes and infrastructure, Pramila’s bill would invest in a skilled workforce capable of responding to and preparing for the destructive impacts of climate change.
**But we know this is an uphill battle.** Fossil fuel companies, their lobbyists, and their corporate PACs don’t want to see investments in fighting climate change. The GOP doesn’t even want to acknowledge that climate change exists. If we’re going to pass any legislation to address the climate crisis it’s going to take a major fight.
[**Peter, can you chip in $3 to support Pramila’s fight to act on climate change? It’s going to take a movement to overcome the interests of corporations and the extreme GOP.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/9930?refcode=em20220208-1016&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=1016%2E420207%2EQ3qpns)
**[Chip in $3](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/9930?refcode=em20220208-1016&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=1016%2E420207%2EQ3qpns)**
Disaster recovery work is a multi-billion dollar industry, and it's often dangerous. Yet the workers on the frontlines often lack basic protections. If we create millions of good-paying, union jobs and center the very communities disproportionately impacted by climate disaster, we can finally build back better, greener, and stronger.
In solidarity,
Team Jayapal

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20220208-1016-footer&t=21&refcode2=1016_420207_Q3qpns&akid=1016%2E420207%2EQ3qpns)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=22&akid=1016%2E420207%2EQ3qpns)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=23&akid=1016%2E420207%2EQ3qpns)

name: Sarah Sample
subject: Laura Neuman for Governor Campaign
body:
Hey Peter,

This is Sarah with the Laura Neuman for Governor campaign. I noticed you
signed up via our "Join the Team" form and wanted to touch base. Is there a
particular way you would like to be involved?

We are getting our volunteer operations up and running and would like to
include you on the communications that best suit your interest. Generally,
we are looking for people to host fundraisers in their homes and
businesses, put up signs, make phone calls, share on social media and send
emails to your network. Let me know what you think and we would be happy to
get you involved.

In case you haven't seen it yet, this is the campaign launch video
<https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=DEZ8Im7YRTA&t=9s>. It's having an
incredible impact for our campaign so I just wanted to send it along in
case you hadn't seen it. Below is also the share link for Facebook if you
are willing to help us spread the word.

Facebook Video Share Page
<https://www.facebook.com/laura.neuman.maryland/videos/963744117601331>

All the best,
Sarah Sample

name: Laura Loomer
subject: They said I had a “melt down”
body:
I can’t stop laughing at the Fake News, Left Wing Media.
| | | | [](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/o2SQEKVtXrZehhpnvBGOdA/nu9RwKietujmqulDV4OcPw) | Patriot,

[](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/o2SQEKVtXrZehhpnvBGOdA/nu9RwKietujmqulDV4OcPw) I can’t stop laughing at the Fake News, Left-Wing Media.

Last week, my appeal over a ruling in favor of the Council on American Islamic Relations (CAIR) was denied by a judge.

In 2019, I sued CAIR, after they launched a secret lobbying campaign to pressure the executives at Twitter to permanently ban me – as reported by the _Wall Street Journal_.

Predictably, _The Daily Beast_ ran with the headline, “Laura Loomer Melts Down Over Being Forced to Pay Muslim Rights Group.”

I’m pretty sure that day I was focused and hard at work just as I am every day. And I’m 100% positive I intentionally ignored my phone when the "reporter" from the _Daily Beast_ called me.

Paying $123,000 to a group that has been designated as a terrorist organization by the UAE was the last thing on my mind, because guess what? I’m not going to pay them!

But, if anything, the ruling has further focused my energy to expose CAIR and their backing of Islamist-controlled plants in our government like Ilhan Omar and Rashida Tlaib.

[**You can help me step up my investigative work**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/o2SQEKVtXrZehhpnvBGOdA/nu9RwKietujmqulDV4OcPw) so I can show the Left and Islamic terror groups like CAIR all around the world, **that Laura Loomer won’t be melting down . . . ever**.

Since I began exposing the Islamic influence in our government, the money flowing to jihadi candidates through traceable and legal means, has all but disappeared.

Ever since I did a detailed investigative piece exposing them, the main Muslim PAC, EMGAGE PAC, doesn’t even raise that much money anymore.

This means Islamic organizations like CAIR are finding other means to support their candidates for office, and I’m going to find the paper trail and follow it all the way to Washington.

[**Help fund my continued investigation into Jihadi candidates and their Islamist backers so I can show patriots how corrupt these Jihadis masking as politicians truly are.**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/o2SQEKVtXrZehhpnvBGOdA/nu9RwKietujmqulDV4OcPw)

For instance, Ilhan Omar, who has been endorsed by CAIR, filed a financial disclosure report last year that showed her net worth go from a negative balance to over a million dollars. Why? Because she included her husband’s assets that are up to a million dollars, thanks to his job with eStreet Group, a political consulting firm.

And who did Ilhan Omar’s campaign pay $3.7 million dollars to in the last election cycle? That’s right, her new husband’s firm . . . oh and don’t worry, I’m not talking about her brother that she married.

They are divorced, now that she’s found a D.C. consultant to funnel millions of dollars to.

Maybe Ilhan Omar should express more gratitude to America because punishment for adultery in her home country of Somalia is death by stoning!

This is just the tip of the iceberg, and my research team has a ton of digging to do, so [**please help me fund their costs by chipping in today**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/o2SQEKVtXrZehhpnvBGOdA/nu9RwKietujmqulDV4OcPw).

Thanks so much for all that you do, and stay tuned!

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

P.S. My legal team and I are planning on appealing this recent decision, and don’t worry, none of your funds will go toward paying CAIR, because I’m simply not going to pay ransom to terrorists.

---
(C) 2022 Illoominate Media
720 Lucerne Ave, #1465
LAKE WORTH, FL. 33460
[Unsubscribe](https://libersend.loomered.com/unsubscribe/wJCYyn7638HXOcoR8928MiNxO5nXTgGo6s7D8pT0763BW8929so/jNrcjifZkRuM7634SQt2EHxg/nu9RwKietujmqulDV4OcPw)
[View Web Version](https://libersend.loomered.com/w/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/jNrcjifZkRuM7634SQt2EHxg/nu9RwKietujmqulDV4OcPw)

---

body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=2274%2E3611125%2Eg6YZTf ][IMG]

Folks—[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/7320?t=1007&akid=2274%2E3611125%2Eg6YZTf ]I’m about to ask you to chip in $5 toward my grassroots
campaign. But first, I want to tell you why I’m confident we can prove the
skeptics wrong and win this battleground race.

1. Republican Senator Rob Portman is retiring, leaving Ohio’s Senate seat
wide open. Republicans are fighting it out in a messy and expensive
primary—giving us a stronger chance of flipping this seat blue.
2. Ohio already has a Democratic Senator. Sherrod Brown has proven that
Ohioans want to elect a Senator who puts workers first.
3. A recent poll has me within single digits of my Republican opponents.
It’s still early in the race, and the more we get our message out, the
more voters we’ll win over.
4. Working people are fed up and ready for change. I’ve been traveling
all over the state, and Ohioans are sick of handouts for big
corporations and billionaires—they want good-paying jobs, health care
they can afford, and a fair shot for their kids to succeed.
5. We have grassroots momentum. While my rich Republican opponents are
propping up their campaigns with millions of their own dollars, we’re
powered by folks who chip in $5, $25, or $100 at a time.

So, yes, we have a real path to winning this race—but it will
take everything we have to pull it off.

Here’s my ask: [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/7320?t=1008&akid=2274%2E3611125%2Eg6YZTf ]Will you chip in $5 or more to help us keep up our
grassroots energy and hit our fundraising goals?

Together, I know we can get this done.

—Tim

name: Team AOC
subject: Tell the FDA to reverse this discriminatory blood ban
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
The current FDA policy banning sexually active gay and bisexual men from donating blood not only stigmitizes the LGBTQIA+ community, but undermines crucial efforts to stabilize our nation’s blood supply amid the Covid-19 pandemic.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20220208-2775-header&t=1&akid=2775%2E2526796%2EzAPKEE)
Here’s the situation:
According to the American Red Cross, blood shortages in the United States have reached crisis proportions due to the Covid-19 pandemic.1
**Despite these circumstances, the FDA still prohibits sexually active gay and bisexual men from donating blood.** This antiqued policy is not based on current science, undermines efforts to stabilize our nation’s blood supply, and perpetuates the stigmatization of the LGBTQIA+ community.
If the FDA were to reverse this ban and allow gay and bisexual men to donate blood regardless of their sexual activity, up to 615,300 pints of blood could potentially be added to the system each year.2
**That’s why Alexandria is joining Rep. Carolyn Maloney in urging the FDA to revisit its current policy,** so that every person who wishes to donate blood safely in the United States has the opportunity to do so.
[Will you join Alexandria in urging the FDA lift this discriminatory policy by sharing sharing your support on Twitter? Together we can continue our fight to advocate for LGBTQIA+ individuals and public health.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/10388?t=2&akid=2775%2E2526796%2EzAPKEE)
**[Share on Twitter](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/10388?t=3&akid=2775%2E2526796%2EzAPKEE)**
**Currently, the FDA states that it has _no_ specific timeline or plan to change its policy,** which is why it’s so important that we show urgent support for lifting this ban.
The FDA’s current policy dates back to the 1980s when gay and bisexual men were considered to be at high risk for HIV and AIDS transmission.3 But while important advances in blood screening and safety technology have been made, this policy has remained unchanged.
The fact is that policies like these continue to stigmatize the LGBTQIA+ community while blocking public health advances, and it’s time for change.
[If you agree that everyone who wishes to safely donate blood in the United States should have the opportunity to do so, please join us in this fight and share your support for lifting the blood ban on Twitter.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/10388?t=4&akid=2775%2E2526796%2EzAPKEE)
In solidarity,
Team AOC
P.S. Did you know there is a national blood crisis? The nation’s dangerously low blood supply levels have forced some hospitals to defer patients from major surgery, including organ transplants. [If you can help by donating blood, click here to make an appointment with the Red Cross to give blood.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/10377?t=5&akid=2775%2E2526796%2EzAPKEE)

* * *
1, 2 - [Consumer Reports](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/10378?t=6&akid=2775%2E2526796%2EzAPKEE)
3 - [The Hill](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/10379?t=7&akid=2775%2E2526796%2EzAPKEE)

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ocasio-campaign?refcode=em20220208-2775-P_ENG_ANO_ORG&t=8&refcode2=2775_2526796_zAPKEE&akid=2775%2E2526796%2EzAPKEE)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20220208-2775-P_ENG_ANO_ORG&t=9&akid=2775%2E2526796%2EzAPKEE)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=10&akid=2775%2E2526796%2EzAPKEE) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=11&akid=2775%2E2526796%2EzAPKEE) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=12&akid=2775%2E2526796%2EzAPKEE)
---|---|---
Email us: [us@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: us@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=13&akid=2775%2E2526796%2EzAPKEE)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=14&akid=2775%2E2526796%2EzAPKEE)

name: Patriot Updates
subject: 🚨 All aboard the Trump Train 🚨
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ted Budd for Senate
body:
Don’t let the Democrats take our country
---
| | | | | | |
---
| |
---

Fellow Conservative,

Look, Ron DeSantis is supposed to stand up for ALL Floridians. **Instead he’s just thrown an already vulnerable Florida community UNDER THE BUS!**
